authors_text: Wentong Li,Wenyu Liu,Jianke Zhu,Miaomiao Cui,Xiansheng Hua,Lei Zhang
title: Box-supervised Instance Segmentation with Level Set Evolution
title_zh: 具有水平集演化的盒监督实例分割
abstract: In contrast to the fully supervised methods using pixel-wise mask labels, box-supervised instance segmentation takes advantage of the simple box annotations, which has recently attracted a lot of research attentions. In this paper, we propose a novel single-shot box-supervised instance segmentation approach, which integrates the classical level set model with deep neural network delicately. Specifically, our proposed method iteratively learns a series of level sets through a continuous Chan-Vese energy-based function in an end-to-end fashion. A simple mask supervised SOLOv2 model is adapted to predict the instance-aware mask map as the level set for each instance. Both the input image and its deep features are employed as the input data to evolve the level set curves, where a box projection function is employed to obtain the initial boundary. By minimizing the fully differentiable energy function, the level set for each instance is iteratively optimized within its corresponding bounding box annotation. The experimental results on four challenging benchmarks demonstrate the leading performance of our proposed approach to robust instance segmentation in various scenarios. The code is available at: https://github.com/LiWentomng/boxlevelset.

abstract_zh: 与使用像素级掩模标签的完全监督方法相比，框监督实例分割利用简单的框注释，最近引起了很多研究关注。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的单次框监督实例分割方法，它将经典水平集模型与深度神经网络巧妙地结合在一起。具体来说，我们提出的方法通过连续的基于 Chan-Vese 能量的函数以端到端的方式迭代学习一系列水平集。一个简单的掩模监督 SOLOv2 模型适用于预测实例感知掩模图作为每个实例的水平集。输入图像及其深层特征都被用作输入数据来演化水平集曲线，其中使用盒投影函数来获得初始边界。通过最小化完全可微的能量函数，每个实例的水平集在其相应的边界框注释内迭代优化。四个具有挑战性的基准的实验结果证明了我们提出的方法在各种场景下的鲁棒实例分割的领先性能。代码位于：https://github.com/LiWentomng/boxlevelset。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于边界框监督的实例分割方法，通过结合水平集演化模型与深度学习实现高效分割。
AI.motivation: 传统像素级标注成本高昂，而边界框标注更易获取。现有方法在复杂场景下分割精度不足，需探索更高效的监督方式。
AI.method: 融合Chan-Vese能量函数与SOLOv2模型，利用深度特征迭代优化水平集曲线，通过边界框投影初始化分割边界。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上取得领先性能，证明方法在复杂场景下的鲁棒性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过深度学习与水平集模型的结合，实现了无需像素级标注的高效实例分割，为弱监督分割提供新思路。

authors_text: Jianggang Zhu,Zheng Wang,Jingjing Chen,Yi-Ping Phoebe Chen,Yu-Gang Jiang
title: Balanced Contrastive Learning for Long-Tailed Visual Recognition
title_zh: 长尾视觉识别的平衡对比学习
abstract: Real-world data typically follow a long-tailed distribution, where a few majority categories occupy most of the data while most minority categories contain a limited number of samples. Classification models minimizing cross-entropy struggle to represent and classify the tail classes. Although the problem of learning unbiased classifiers has been well studied, methods for representing imbalanced data are under-explored. In this paper, we focus on representation learning for imbalanced data. Recently, supervised contrastive learning has shown promising performance on balanced data recently. However, through our theoretical analysis, we find that for long-tailed data, it fails to form a regular simplex which is an ideal geometric configuration for representation learning. To correct the optimization behavior of SCL and further improve the performance of long-tailed visual recognition, we propose a novel loss for balanced contrastive learning (BCL). Compared with SCL, we have two improvements in BCL: class-averaging, which balances the gradient contribution of negative classes; class-complement, which allows all classes to appear in every mini-batch. The proposed balanced contrastive learning (BCL) method satisfies the condition of forming a regular simplex and assists the optimization of cross-entropy. Equipped with BCL, the proposed two-branch framework can obtain a stronger feature representation and achieve competitive performance on long-tailed benchmark datasets such as CIFAR-10-LT, CIFAR-100-LT, ImageNet-LT, and iNaturalist2018. Our code is available at https://github.com/FlamieZhu/BCL .

abstract_zh: 现实世界的数据通常遵循长尾分布，其中少数多数类别占据大部分数据，而大多数少数类别包含有限数量的样本。分类模型最小化交叉熵来表示和分类尾部类别。尽管学习无偏分类器的问题已得到充分研究，但表示不平衡数据的方法尚未得到充分探索。在本文中，我们重点关注不平衡数据的表示学习。最近，监督对比学习最近在平衡数据上显示出了有希望的性能。然而，通过我们的理论分析，我们发现对于长尾数据，它无法形成表示学习的理想几何配置的正则单纯形。为了纠正 SCL 的优化行为并进一步提高长尾视觉识别的性能，我们提出了一种新的平衡对比学习（BCL）损失。与SCL相比，我们在BCL中有两个改进：类平均，平衡负类的梯度贡献；类补集，允许所有类出现在每个小批量中。所提出的平衡对比学习（BCL）方法满足形成正则单纯形的条件并辅助交叉熵的优化。配备BCL，所提出的两分支框架可以获得更强的特征表示，并在CIFAR-10-LT、CIFAR-100-LT、ImageNet-LT和iNaturalist2018等长尾基准数据集上实现有竞争力的性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/FlamieZhu/BCL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种平衡对比学习方法（BCL），用于解决长尾视觉识别中类别不平衡导致的表示学习问题。
AI.motivation: 现实数据常呈现长尾分布，现有对比学习方法在长尾数据上无法形成理想几何结构，导致尾部类别识别效果差。
AI.method: 设计BCL损失函数，包含类平均（平衡负类梯度贡献）和类补全（确保每批次包含所有类别）两个改进，使表示学习满足正则单纯形条件。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10-LT、ImageNet-LT等长尾数据集上取得竞争性性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: BCL通过优化对比学习机制有效提升长尾视觉识别性能，为不平衡数据表示学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Menglin Yang,Zhihao Li,Min Zhou,Jiahong Liu,Irwin King
title: HICF: Hyperbolic Informative Collaborative Filtering
title_zh: HICF：双曲信息协同过滤
comment: Proceedings of the 28th ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (KDD '22)
comments: Proceedings of the 28th ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (KDD '22)
abstract: Considering the prevalence of the power-law distribution in user-item networks, hyperbolic space has attracted considerable attention and achieved impressive performance in the recommender system recently. The advantage of hyperbolic recommendation lies in that its exponentially increasing capacity is well-suited to describe the power-law distributed user-item network whereas the Euclidean equivalent is deficient. Nonetheless, it remains unclear which kinds of items can be effectively recommended by the hyperbolic model and which cannot. To address the above concerns, we take the most basic recommendation technique, collaborative filtering, as a medium, to investigate the behaviors of hyperbolic and Euclidean recommendation models. The results reveal that (1) tail items get more emphasis in hyperbolic space than that in Euclidean space, but there is still ample room for improvement; (2) head items receive modest attention in hyperbolic space, which could be considerably improved; (3) and nonetheless, the hyperbolic models show more competitive performance than Euclidean models. Driven by the above observations, we design a novel learning method, named hyperbolic informative collaborative filtering (HICF), aiming to compensate for the recommendation effectiveness of the head item while at the same time improving the performance of the tail item. The main idea is to adapt the hyperbolic margin ranking learning, making its pull and push procedure geometric-aware, and providing informative guidance for the learning of both head and tail items. Extensive experiments back up the analytic findings and also show the effectiveness of the proposed method. The work is valuable for personalized recommendations since it reveals that the hyperbolic space facilitates modeling the tail item, which often represents user-customized preferences or new products.

The advantage of hyperbolic recommendation lies in that its exponentially increasing capacity is well-suited to describe the power-law distributed user-item network whereas the Euclidean equivalent is deficient. Nonetheless, it remains unclear which kinds of items can be effectively recommended by the hyperbolic model and which cannot. To address the above concerns, we take the most basic recommendation technique, collaborative filtering, as a medium, to investigate the behaviors of hyperbolic and Euclidean recommendation models. The results reveal that (1) tail items get more emphasis in hyperbolic space than that in Euclidean space, but there is still ample room for improvement; (2) head items receive modest attention in hyperbolic space, which could be considerably improved; (3) and nonetheless, the hyperbolic models show more competitive performance than Euclidean models. Driven by the above observations, we design a novel learning method, named hyperbolic informative collaborative filtering (HICF), aiming to compensate for the recommendation effectiveness of the head item while at the same time improving the performance of the tail item. The main idea is to adapt the hyperbolic margin ranking learning, making its pull and push procedure geometric-aware, and providing informative guidance for the learning of both head and tail items. Extensive experiments back up the analytic findings and also show the effectiveness of the proposed method. The work is valuable for personalized recommendations since it reveals that the hyperbolic space facilitates modeling the tail item, which often represents user-customized preferences or new products.
abstract_zh: 考虑到幂律分布在用户-项目网络中的普遍存在，双曲空间最近引起了相当大的关注，并在推荐系统中取得了令人印象深刻的性能。双曲线推荐的优点在于其指数增长的容量非常适合描述幂律分布式用户-项目网络，而欧几里德等价物则有缺陷。尽管如此，目前还不清楚双曲线模型可以有效推荐哪些类型的项目，哪些不能。为了解决上述问题，我们以最基本的推荐技术——协同过滤为媒介，研究双曲和欧几里德推荐模型的行为。结果表明：（1）尾项在双曲空间中比在欧氏空间中更受重视，但仍有很大的改进空间； (2) 头部项目在双曲空间中受到适度关注，这可以得到相当大的改进； (3) 尽管如此，双曲模型比欧几里得模型表现出更具竞争力的性能。在上述观察的驱动下，我们设计了一种新颖的学习方法，称为双曲信息协同过滤（HICF），旨在补偿头项的推荐效果，同时提高尾项的性能。主要思想是适应双曲线边缘排序学习，使其拉推过程具有几何感知，并为头项和尾项的学习提供信息指导。大量的实验支持了分析结果，也证明了所提出方法的有效性。这项工作对于个性化推荐很有价值，因为它揭示了双曲空间有助于对尾部项目进行建模，尾部项目通常代表用户定制的偏好或新产品。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双曲空间的协同过滤方法HICF，旨在改进推荐系统中头部和尾部物品的推荐效果。
AI.motivation: 双曲空间虽能有效建模尾部物品，但对头部物品关注不足，且现有方法对两类物品的推荐效果均有提升空间。
AI.method: 设计几何感知的双曲边距排序学习，通过调整拉推过程为头部和尾部物品提供信息指导，构建HICF模型。
AI.result: 实验表明HICF显著提升头部物品推荐效果，同时保持尾部物品优势，整体性能优于欧氏空间模型。
AI.conclusion: HICF通过几何感知机制有效平衡了头部与尾部物品推荐，验证了双曲空间在个性化推荐中的价值。

search_text: HICF: Hyperbolic Informative Collaborative Filtering HICF：双曲信息协同过滤 Considering the prevalence of the power-law distribution in user-item networks, hyperbolic space has attracted considerable attention and achieved impressive performance in the recommender system recently. The advantage of hyperbolic recommendation lies in that its exponentially increasing capacity is well-suited to describe the power-law distributed user-item network whereas the Euclidean equivalent is deficient. Nonetheless, it remains unclear which kinds of items can be effectively recommended by the hyperbolic model and which cannot. To address the above concerns, we take the most basic recommendation technique, collaborative filtering, as a medium, to investigate the behaviors of hyperbolic and Euclidean recommendation models. The results reveal that (1) tail items get more emphasis in hyperbolic space than that in Euclidean space, but there is still ample room for improvement; (2) head items receive modest attention in hyperbolic space, which could be considerably improved; (3) and nonetheless, the hyperbolic models show more competitive performance than Euclidean models. Driven by the above observations, we design a novel learning method, named hyperbolic informative collaborative filtering (HICF), aiming to compensate for the recommendation effectiveness of the head item while at the same time improving the performance of the tail item. The main idea is to adapt the hyperbolic margin ranking learning, making its pull and push procedure geometric-aware, and providing informative guidance for the learning of both head and tail items. Extensive experiments back up the analytic findings and also show the effectiveness of the proposed method. The work is valuable for personalized recommendations since it reveals that the hyperbolic space facilitates modeling the tail item, which often represents user-customized preferences or new products. 考虑到幂律分布在用户-项目网络中的普遍存在，双曲空间最近引起了相当大的关注，并在推荐系统中取得了令人印象深刻的性能。双曲线推荐的优点在于其指数增长的容量非常适合描述幂律分布式用户-项目网络，而欧几里德等价物则有缺陷。尽管如此，目前还不清楚双曲线模型可以有效推荐哪些类型的项目，哪些不能。为了解决上述问题，我们以最基本的推荐技术——协同过滤为媒介，研究双曲和欧几里德推荐模型的行为。结果表明：（1）尾项在双曲空间中比在欧氏空间中更受重视，但仍有很大的改进空间； (2) 头部项目在双曲空间中受到适度关注，这可以得到相当大的改进； (3) 尽管如此，双曲模型比欧几里得模型表现出更具竞争力的性能。在上述观察的驱动下，我们设计了一种新颖的学习方法，称为双曲信息协同过滤（HICF），旨在补偿头项的推荐效果，同时提高尾项的性能。主要思想是适应双曲线边缘排序学习，使其拉推过程具有几何感知，并为头项和尾项的学习提供信息指导。大量的实验支持了分析结果，也证明了所提出方法的有效性。这项工作对于个性化推荐很有价值，因为它揭示了双曲空间有助于对尾部项目进行建模，尾部项目通常代表用户定制的偏好或新产品。 本文提出一种基于双曲空间的协同过滤方法HICF，旨在改进推荐系统中头部和尾部物品的推荐效果。 Menglin Yang,Zhihao Li,Min Zhou,Jiahong Liu,Irwin King cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Ali Ayub,Chrystopher L. Nehaniv,Kerstin Dautenhahn
title: Don't Forget to Buy Milk: Contextually Aware Grocery Reminder Household Robot
title_zh: 不要忘记买牛奶：具有情境感知的杂货提醒家用机器人
abstract: Assistive robots operating in household environments would require items to be available in the house to perform assistive tasks. However, when these items run out, the assistive robot must remind its user to buy the missing items. In this paper, we present a computational architecture that can allow a robot to learn personalized contextual knowledge of a household through interactions with its user. The architecture can then use the learned knowledge to make predictions about missing items from the household over a long period of time. The architecture integrates state-of-the-art perceptual learning algorithms, cognitive models of memory encoding and learning, a reasoning module for predicting missing items from the household, and a graphical user interface (GUI) to interact with the user. The architecture is integrated with the Fetch mobile manipulator robot and validated in a large indoor environment with multiple contexts and objects. Our experimental results show that the robot can adapt to an environment by learning contextual knowledge through interactions with its user. The robot can also use the learned knowledge to correctly predict missing items over multiple weeks and it is robust against sensory and perceptual errors.
summary: Assistive robots operating in household environments would require items to be available in the house to perform assistive tasks. However, when these items run out, the assistive robot must remind its user to buy the missing items. In this paper, we present a computational architecture that can allow a robot to learn personalized contextual knowledge of a household through interactions with its user. The architecture can then use the learned knowledge to make predictions about missing items from the household over a long period of time. The architecture integrates state-of-the-art perceptual learning algorithms, cognitive models of memory encoding and learning, a reasoning module for predicting missing items from the household, and a graphical user interface (GUI) to interact with the user. The architecture is integrated with the Fetch mobile manipulator robot and validated in a large indoor environment with multiple contexts and objects. Our experimental results show that the robot can adapt to an environment by learning contextual knowledge through interactions with its user. The robot can also use the learned knowledge to correctly predict missing items over multiple weeks and it is robust against sensory and perceptual errors.
abstract_zh: 在家庭环境中运行的辅助机器人需要家里有可用的物品来执行辅助任务。然而，当这些物品用完时，辅助机器人必须提醒用户购买缺少的物品。在本文中，我们提出了一种计算架构，可以让机器人通过与用户的交互来学习家庭的个性化情境知识。然后，该架构可以使用学到的知识来预测家庭在很长一段时间内丢失的物品。该架构集成了最先进的感知学习算法、记忆编码和学习的认知模型、用于预测家庭中丢失物品的推理模块以及用于与用户交互的图形用户界面（GUI）。该架构与 Fetch 移动机械手机器人集成，并在具有多个上下文和对象的大型室内环境中进行了验证。我们的实验结果表明，机器人可以通过与用户的交互来学习上下文知识来适应环境。机器人还可以利用学到的知识在数周内正确预测丢失的物品，并且它对感官和知觉错误具有很强的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种家用机器人系统，通过学习家庭环境的个性化上下文知识，预测缺失物品并提醒用户购买。
AI.motivation: 辅助机器人需在家庭环境中提醒用户补充耗尽物品，但现有方法缺乏对家庭场景的长期个性化适应能力。
AI.method: 整合感知学习算法、认知记忆模型、推理模块与GUI界面，结合Fetch机器人进行多场景验证。
AI.result: 机器人通过用户互动学习环境知识，可准确预测多周内缺失物品，且对感知误差具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该架构验证了上下文感知家庭机器人的可行性，为长期家庭辅助任务提供了可扩展的解决方案。

authors_text: Xulong Shi,Zhi Qi,Jiaxuan Cai,Keqi Fu,Yaru Zhao,Zan Li,Xuanyu Liu,Hao Liu
title: RepBNN: towards a precise Binary Neural Network with Enhanced Feature Map via Repeating
title_zh: RepBNN：通过重复实现具有增强特征图的精确二元神经网络
comment: This paper has absolutely nothing to do with repvgg, rep means repeating
comments: This paper has absolutely nothing to do with repvgg, rep means repeating
abstract: Binary neural network (BNN) is an extreme quantization version of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) with all features and weights mapped to just 1-bit. Although BNN saves a lot of memory and computation demand to make CNN applicable on edge or mobile devices, BNN suffers the drop of network performance due to the reduced representation capability after binarization. In this paper, we propose a new replaceable and easy-to-use convolution module RepConv, which enhances feature maps through replicating input or output along channel dimension by $β$ times without extra cost on the number of parameters and convolutional computation. We also define a set of RepTran rules to use RepConv throughout BNN modules like binary convolution, fully connected layer and batch normalization. Experiments demonstrate that after the RepTran transformation, a set of highly cited BNNs have achieved universally better performance than the original BNN versions. For example, the Top-1 accuracy of Rep-ReCU-ResNet-20, i.e., a RepBconv enhanced ReCU-ResNet-20, reaches 88.97% on CIFAR-10, which is 1.47% higher than that of the original network. And Rep-AdamBNN-ReActNet-A achieves 71.342% Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, a fresh state-of-the-art result of BNNs. Code and models are available at:https://github.com/imfinethanks/Rep_AdamBNN.
summary: Binary neural network (BNN) is an extreme quantization version of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) with all features and weights mapped to just 1-bit. Although BNN saves a lot of memory and computation demand to make CNN applicable on edge or mobile devices, BNN suffers the drop of network performance due to the reduced representation capability after binarization. In this paper, we propose a new replaceable and easy-to-use convolution module RepConv, which enhances feature maps through replicating input or output along channel dimension by $β$ times without extra cost on the number of parameters and convolutional computation. We also define a set of RepTran rules to use RepConv throughout BNN modules like binary convolution, fully connected layer and batch normalization. Experiments demonstrate that after the RepTran transformation, a set of highly cited BNNs have achieved universally better performance than the original BNN versions. For example, the Top-1 accuracy of Rep-ReCU-ResNet-20, i.e., a RepBconv enhanced ReCU-ResNet-20, reaches 88.97% on CIFAR-10, which is 1.47% higher than that of the original network. And Rep-AdamBNN-ReActNet-A achieves 71.342% Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, a fresh state-of-the-art result of BNNs. Code and models are available at:https://github.com/imfinethanks/Rep_AdamBNN.
abstract_zh: 二元神经网络 (BNN) 是卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的极端量化版本，所有特征和权重仅映射到 1 位。虽然 BNN 节省了大量的内存和计算需求，使 CNN 适用于边缘或移动设备，但由于二值化后表示能力下降，BNN 遭受网络性能下降。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的可替换且易于使用的卷积模块RepConv，它通过沿通道维度将输入或输出复制$β$倍来增强特征图，而无需在参数数量和卷积计算上产生额外成本。我们还定义了一组 RepTran 规则，以便在整个 BNN 模块（例如二值卷积、全连接层和批量归一化）中使用 RepConv。实验表明，经过 RepTran 转换后，一组被高度引用的 BNN 普遍取得了比原始 BNN 版本更好的性能。例如，Rep-ReCU-ResNet-20（即RepBconv增强型ReCU-ResNet-20）的Top-1准确率在CIFAR-10上达到88.97%，比原始网络提高了1.47%。 Rep-AdamBNN-ReActNet-A 在 ImageNet 上实现了 71.342% 的 Top-1 准确率，这是 BNN 的最新成果。代码和模型可在以下位置获取：https://github.com/imfinethanks/Rep_AdamBNN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RepBNN方法，通过引入可重复的卷积模块RepConv和RepTran规则提升二值神经网络（BNN）的性能。
AI.motivation: 二值神经网络（BNN）因量化导致表示能力下降而性能不足，需在不增加参数和计算量的前提下增强特征图。
AI.method: 设计RepConv模块通过通道维度重复输入/输出β次增强特征图，并定义RepTran规则将RepConv应用于BNN的卷积、全连接层和归一化模块。
AI.result: 实验显示RepBNN在CIFAR-10上Top-1准确率提升1.47%（88.97%），在ImageNet上达到71.342%（SOTA）。
AI.conclusion: RepBNN通过RepConv和RepTran规则有效提升BNN性能，代码已开源，为轻量化模型设计提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出RepBNN方法，通过引入可重复的卷积模块RepConv和RepTran规则提升二值神经网络（BNN）的性能。
ai_content.motivation: 二值神经网络（BNN）因量化导致表示能力下降而性能不足，需在不增加参数和计算量的前提下增强特征图。

search_text: RepBNN: towards a precise Binary Neural Network with Enhanced Feature Map via Repeating RepBNN：通过重复实现具有增强特征图的精确二元神经网络 Binary neural network (BNN) is an extreme quantization version of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) with all features and weights mapped to just 1-bit. Although BNN saves a lot of memory and computation demand to make CNN applicable on edge or mobile devices, BNN suffers the drop of network performance due to the reduced representation capability after binarization. In this paper, we propose a new replaceable and easy-to-use convolution module RepConv, which enhances feature maps through replicating input or output along channel dimension by $β$ times without extra cost on the number of parameters and convolutional computation. We also define a set of RepTran rules to use RepConv throughout BNN modules like binary convolution, fully connected layer and batch normalization. Experiments demonstrate that after the RepTran transformation, a set of highly cited BNNs have achieved universally better performance than the original BNN versions. For example, the Top-1 accuracy of Rep-ReCU-ResNet-20, i.e., a RepBconv enhanced ReCU-ResNet-20, reaches 88.97% on CIFAR-10, which is 1.47% higher than that of the original network. And Rep-AdamBNN-ReActNet-A achieves 71.342% Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, a fresh state-of-the-art result of BNNs. Code and models are available at:https://github.com/imfinethanks/Rep_AdamBNN. 二元神经网络 (BNN) 是卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的极端量化版本，所有特征和权重仅映射到 1 位。虽然 BNN 节省了大量的内存和计算需求，使 CNN 适用于边缘或移动设备，但由于二值化后表示能力下降，BNN 遭受网络性能下降。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的可替换且易于使用的卷积模块RepConv，它通过沿通道维度将输入或输出复制$β$倍来增强特征图，而无需在参数数量和卷积计算上产生额外成本。我们还定义了一组 RepTran 规则，以便在整个 BNN 模块（例如二值卷积、全连接层和批量归一化）中使用 RepConv。实验表明，经过 RepTran 转换后，一组被高度引用的 BNN 普遍取得了比原始 BNN 版本更好的性能。例如，Rep-ReCU-ResNet-20（即RepBconv增强型ReCU-ResNet-20）的Top-1准确率在CIFAR-10上达到88.97%，比原始网络提高了1.47%。 Rep-AdamBNN-ReActNet-A 在 ImageNet 上实现了 71.342% 的 Top-1 准确率，这是 BNN 的最新成果。代码和模型可在以下位置获取：https://github.com/imfinethanks/Rep_AdamBNN。 本文提出RepBNN方法，通过引入可重复的卷积模块RepConv和RepTran规则提升二值神经网络（BNN）的性能。 Xulong Shi,Zhi Qi,Jiaxuan Cai,Keqi Fu,Yaru Zhao,Zan Li,Xuanyu Liu,Hao Liu cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Chengxu Liu,Huan Yang,Jianlong Fu,Xueming Qian
title: TTVFI: Learning Trajectory-Aware Transformer for Video Frame Interpolation
title_zh: TTVFI：用于视频帧插值的学习轨迹感知变压器
abstract: Video frame interpolation (VFI) aims to synthesize an intermediate frame between two consecutive frames. State-of-the-art approaches usually adopt a two-step solution, which includes 1) generating locally-warped pixels by flow-based motion estimations, 2) blending the warped pixels to form a full frame through deep neural synthesis networks. However, due to the inconsistent warping from the two consecutive frames, the warped features for new frames are usually not aligned, which leads to distorted and blurred frames, especially when large and complex motions occur. To solve this issue, in this paper we propose a novel Trajectory-aware Transformer for Video Frame Interpolation (TTVFI). In particular, we formulate the warped features with inconsistent motions as query tokens, and formulate relevant regions in a motion trajectory from two original consecutive frames into keys and values. Self-attention is learned on relevant tokens along the trajectory to blend the pristine features into intermediate frames through end-to-end training. Experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms other state-of-the-art methods in four widely-used VFI benchmarks. Both code and pre-trained models will be released soon.
summary: Video frame interpolation (VFI) aims to synthesize an intermediate frame between two consecutive frames. State-of-the-art approaches usually adopt a two-step solution, which includes 1) generating locally-warped pixels by flow-based motion estimations, 2) blending the warped pixels to form a full frame through deep neural synthesis networks. However, due to the inconsistent warping from the two consecutive frames, the warped features for new frames are usually not aligned, which leads to distorted and blurred frames, especially when large and complex motions occur. To solve this issue, in this paper we propose a novel Trajectory-aware Transformer for Video Frame Interpolation (TTVFI). In particular, we formulate the warped features with inconsistent motions as query tokens, and formulate relevant regions in a motion trajectory from two original consecutive frames into keys and values. Self-attention is learned on relevant tokens along the trajectory to blend the pristine features into intermediate frames through end-to-end training. Experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms other state-of-the-art methods in four widely-used VFI benchmarks. Both code and pre-trained models will be released soon.
abstract_zh: 视频帧插值（VFI）旨在合成两个连续帧之间的中间帧。最先进的方法通常采用两步解决方案，其中包括1）通过基于流的运动估计生成局部扭曲像素，2）通过深度神经合成网络混合扭曲像素以形成全帧。然而，由于两个连续帧的扭​​曲不一致，新帧的扭曲特征通常不对齐，这导致帧扭曲和模糊，特别是当发生大而复杂的运动时。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的用于视频帧插值的轨迹感知变压器（TTVFI）。特别是，我们将运动不一致的扭曲特征制定为查询标记，并将两个原始连续帧的运动轨迹中的相关区域制定为键和值。沿轨迹学习相关标记的自注意力，通过端到端训练将原始特征融合到中间帧中。实验结果表明，我们的方法在四个广泛使用的 VFI 基准测试中优于其他最先进的方法。代码和预训练模型都将很快发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于轨迹感知Transformer的视频帧插值方法（TTVFI），旨在解决传统方法在处理复杂运动时产生的帧失真和模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频帧插值方法因两帧间运动不一致导致生成的中间帧出现对齐误差，尤其在大范围复杂运动场景下易产生扭曲和模糊。
AI.method: 将不一致运动的 warped 特征建模为查询token，从原始两帧的运动轨迹中提取相关区域作为键值token，通过轨迹上的自注意力机制实现特征融合。
AI.result: 在四个主流VFI基准测试中优于现有SOTA方法，代码和预训练模型即将开源。
AI.conclusion: 轨迹感知Transformer有效解决了运动不一致性问题，为复杂场景下的视频帧插值提供了新思路。

authors_text: Lei Tan,Pingyang Dai,Rongrong Ji,Yongjian Wu
title: Dynamic Prototype Mask for Occluded Person Re-Identification
title_zh: 用于被遮挡人员重新识别的动态原型掩模
abstract: Although person re-identification has achieved an impressive improvement in recent years, the common occlusion case caused by different obstacles is still an unsettled issue in real application scenarios. Existing methods mainly address this issue by employing body clues provided by an extra network to distinguish the visible part. Nevertheless, the inevitable domain gap between the assistant model and the ReID datasets has highly increased the difficulty to obtain an effective and efficient model. To escape from the extra pre-trained networks and achieve an automatic alignment in an end-to-end trainable network, we propose a novel Dynamic Prototype Mask (DPM) based on two self-evident prior knowledge. Specifically, we first devise a Hierarchical Mask Generator which utilizes the hierarchical semantic to select the visible pattern space between the high-quality holistic prototype and the feature representation of the occluded input image. Under this condition, the occluded representation could be well aligned in a selected subspace spontaneously. Then, to enrich the feature representation of the high-quality holistic prototype and provide a more complete feature space, we introduce a Head Enrich Module to encourage different heads to aggregate different patterns representation in the whole image. Extensive experimental evaluations conducted on occluded and holistic person re-identification benchmarks demonstrate the superior performance of the DPM over the state-of-the-art methods. The code is released at https://github.com/stone96123/DPM.
summary: Although person re-identification has achieved an impressive improvement in recent years, the common occlusion case caused by different obstacles is still an unsettled issue in real application scenarios. Existing methods mainly address this issue by employing body clues provided by an extra network to distinguish the visible part. Nevertheless, the inevitable domain gap between the assistant model and the ReID datasets has highly increased the difficulty to obtain an effective and efficient model. To escape from the extra pre-trained networks and achieve an automatic alignment in an end-to-end trainable network, we propose a novel Dynamic Prototype Mask (DPM) based on two self-evident prior knowledge. Specifically, we first devise a Hierarchical Mask Generator which utilizes the hierarchical semantic to select the visible pattern space between the high-quality holistic prototype and the feature representation of the occluded input image. Under this condition, the occluded representation could be well aligned in a selected subspace spontaneously. Then, to enrich the feature representation of the high-quality holistic prototype and provide a more complete feature space, we introduce a Head Enrich Module to encourage different heads to aggregate different patterns representation in the whole image. Extensive experimental evaluations conducted on occluded and holistic person re-identification benchmarks demonstrate the superior performance of the DPM over the state-of-the-art methods. The code is released at https://github.com/stone96123/DPM.
abstract_zh: 尽管近年来行人重识别取得了令人瞩目的进步，但在实际应用场景中，由不同障碍物引起的常见遮挡情况仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。现有的方法主要通过利用额外网络提供的身体线索来区分可见部分来解决这个问题。然而，辅助模型和 ReID 数据集之间不可避免的领域差距极大地增加了获得有效且高效模型的难度。为了摆脱额外的预训练网络并在端到端可训练网络中实现自动对齐，我们基于两个不言而喻的先验知识提出了一种新颖的动态原型掩模（DPM）。具体来说，我们首先设计了一个分层掩模生成器，它利用分层语义来选择高质量整体原型和被遮挡输入图像的特征表示之间的可见模式空间。在这种情况下，被遮挡的表示可以自发地在选定的子空间中很好地对齐。然后，为了丰富高质量整体原型的特征表示并提供更完整的特征空间，我们引入了 Head Enrich Module 来鼓励不同的头聚合整个图像中的不同模式表示。对遮挡和整体人员重新识别基准进行的广泛实验评估表明，DPM 的性能优于最先进的方法。代码发布于 https://github.com/stone96123/DPM。

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态原型掩码（DPM）方法，解决遮挡场景下行人重识别（ReID）的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖额外网络提取身体线索，但存在辅助模型与ReID数据集间的领域差异问题，导致模型效果受限。
AI.method: 基于两个先验知识设计DPM：1）分层掩码生成器通过语义层次选择可见特征空间；2）头部丰富模块聚合多模式特征，提升原型表示完整性。
AI.result: 在遮挡与完整行人ReID基准测试中，DPM优于现有最先进方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: DPM通过端到端网络实现遮挡特征对齐，无需额外预训练模块，在遮挡场景下取得更优性能。

Nevertheless, the inevitable domain gap between the assistant model and the ReID datasets has highly increased the difficulty to obtain an effective and efficient model. To escape from the extra pre-trained networks and achieve an automatic alignment in an end-to-end trainable network, we propose a novel Dynamic Prototype Mask (DPM) based on two self-evident prior knowledge. Specifically, we first devise a Hierarchical Mask Generator which utilizes the hierarchical semantic to select the visible pattern space between the high-quality holistic prototype and the feature representation of the occluded input image. Under this condition, the occluded representation could be well aligned in a selected subspace spontaneously. Then, to enrich the feature representation of the high-quality holistic prototype and provide a more complete feature space, we introduce a Head Enrich Module to encourage different heads to aggregate different patterns representation in the whole image. Extensive experimental evaluations conducted on occluded and holistic person re-identification benchmarks demonstrate the superior performance of the DPM over the state-of-the-art methods. The code is released at https://github.com/stone96123/DPM. 尽管近年来行人重识别取得了令人瞩目的进步，但在实际应用场景中，由不同障碍物引起的常见遮挡情况仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。现有的方法主要通过利用额外网络提供的身体线索来区分可见部分来解决这个问题。然而，辅助模型和 ReID 数据集之间不可避免的领域差距极大地增加了获得有效且高效模型的难度。为了摆脱额外的预训练网络并在端到端可训练网络中实现自动对齐，我们基于两个不言而喻的先验知识提出了一种新颖的动态原型掩模（DPM）。具体来说，我们首先设计了一个分层掩模生成器，它利用分层语义来选择高质量整体原型和被遮挡输入图像的特征表示之间的可见模式空间。在这种情况下，被遮挡的表示可以自发地在选定的子空间中很好地对齐。然后，为了丰富高质量整体原型的特征表示并提供更完整的特征空间，我们引入了 Head Enrich Module 来鼓励不同的头聚合整个图像中的不同模式表示。对遮挡和整体人员重新识别基准进行的广泛实验评估表明，DPM 的性能优于最先进的方法。代码发布于 https://github.com/stone96123/DPM。 本文提出动态原型掩码（DPM）方法，解决遮挡场景下行人重识别（ReID）的挑战。 Lei Tan,Pingyang Dai,Rongrong Ji,Yongjian Wu cs.CV

authors_text: Fei Pan,Sungsu Hur,Seokju Lee,Junsik Kim,In So Kweon
title: ML-BPM: Multi-teacher Learning with Bidirectional Photometric Mixing for Open Compound Domain Adaptation in Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: ML-BPM：利用双向光度混合进行多教师学习，实现语义分割中的开放复合域适应
abstract: Open compound domain adaptation (OCDA) considers the target domain as the compound of multiple unknown homogeneous subdomains. The goal of OCDA is to minimize the domain gap between the labeled source domain and the unlabeled compound target domain, which benefits the model generalization to the unseen domains. Current OCDA for semantic segmentation methods adopt manual domain separation and employ a single model to simultaneously adapt to all the target subdomains. However, adapting to a target subdomain might hinder the model from adapting to other dissimilar target subdomains, which leads to limited performance. In this work, we introduce a multi-teacher framework with bidirectional photometric mixing to separately adapt to every target subdomain. First, we present an automatic domain separation to find the optimal number of subdomains. On this basis, we propose a multi-teacher framework in which each teacher model uses bidirectional photometric mixing to adapt to one target subdomain. Furthermore, we conduct an adaptive distillation to learn a student model and apply consistency regularization to improve the student generalization. Experimental results on benchmark datasets show the efficacy of the proposed approach for both the compound domain and the open domains against existing state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Open compound domain adaptation (OCDA) considers the target domain as the compound of multiple unknown homogeneous subdomains. The goal of OCDA is to minimize the domain gap between the labeled source domain and the unlabeled compound target domain, which benefits the model generalization to the unseen domains. Current OCDA for semantic segmentation methods adopt manual domain separation and employ a single model to simultaneously adapt to all the target subdomains. However, adapting to a target subdomain might hinder the model from adapting to other dissimilar target subdomains, which leads to limited performance. In this work, we introduce a multi-teacher framework with bidirectional photometric mixing to separately adapt to every target subdomain. First, we present an automatic domain separation to find the optimal number of subdomains. On this basis, we propose a multi-teacher framework in which each teacher model uses bidirectional photometric mixing to adapt to one target subdomain. Furthermore, we conduct an adaptive distillation to learn a student model and apply consistency regularization to improve the student generalization. Experimental results on benchmark datasets show the efficacy of the proposed approach for both the compound domain and the open domains against existing state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 开放复合域适应（OCDA）将目标域视为多个未知同质子域的复合体。 OCDA 的目标是最小化标记的源域和未标记的复合目标域之间的域差距，这有利于模型泛化到不可见的域。当前用于语义分割方法的 OCDA 采用手动域分离，并采用单一模型同时适应所有目标子域。然而，适应目标子域可能会阻碍模型适应其他不同的目标子域，从而导致性能有限。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个具有双向光度混合的多教师框架，以分别适应每个目标子域。首先，我们提出自动域分离来找到最佳的子域数量。在此基础上，我们提出了一种多教师框架，其中每个教师模型使用双向光度混合来适应一个目标子域。此外，我们进行自适应蒸馏来学习学生模型并应用一致性正则化来提高学生泛化能力。基准数据集的实验结果表明，与现有最先进的方法相比，所提出的方法对于复合域和开放域的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ML-BPM方法，通过多教师框架与双向光度混合技术，解决开放复合域自适应（OCDA）中语义分割模型的域差距问题。
AI.motivation: 现有OCDA方法依赖手动域分离和单模型适应，导致不同子域间相互干扰，限制了模型性能。
AI.method: 自动识别子域数量，构建多教师框架使每个教师独立适应单个子域，结合双向光度混合与自适应蒸馏训练学生模型，并引入一致性正则化。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上，该方法在复合域和开放域任务中均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: ML-BPM通过解耦子域适应过程，有效提升了语义分割模型在未知复合域中的泛化能力。

authors_text: Jiashu Wu,Hao Dai,Yang Wang,Yong Zhang,Dong Huang,Chengzhong Xu
title: PackCache: An Online Cost-driven Data Caching Algorithm in the Cloud
title_zh: PackCache：一种在线成本驱动的云端数据缓存算法
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Computers
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Computers
abstract: In this paper, we study a data caching problem in the cloud environment, where multiple frequently co-utilised data items could be packed as a single item being transferred to serve a sequence of data requests dynamically with reduced cost. To this end, we propose an online algorithm with respect to a homogeneous cost model, called PackCache, that can leverage the FP-Tree technique to mine those frequently co-utilised data items for packing whereby the incoming requests could be cost-effectively served online by exploiting the concept of anticipatory caching. We show the algorithm is 2αcompetitive, reaching the lower bound of the competitive ratio for any deterministic online algorithm on the studied caching problem, and also time and space efficient to serve the requests. Finally, we evaluate the performance of the algorithm via experimental studies to show its actual cost-effectiveness and scalability.
summary: In this paper, we study a data caching problem in the cloud environment, where multiple frequently co-utilised data items could be packed as a single item being transferred to serve a sequence of data requests dynamically with reduced cost. To this end, we propose an online algorithm with respect to a homogeneous cost model, called PackCache, that can leverage the FP-Tree technique to mine those frequently co-utilised data items for packing whereby the incoming requests could be cost-effectively served online by exploiting the concept of anticipatory caching. We show the algorithm is 2αcompetitive, reaching the lower bound of the competitive ratio for any deterministic online algorithm on the studied caching problem, and also time and space efficient to serve the requests. Finally, we evaluate the performance of the algorithm via experimental studies to show its actual cost-effectiveness and scalability.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了云环境中的数据缓存问题，其中多个经常共同使用的数据项可以打包为单个项目进行传输，以降低成本动态地服务一系列数据请求。为此，我们提出了一种关于同质成本模型的在线算法，称为 PackCache，它可以利用 FP-Tree 技术来挖掘那些经常共同使用的数据项进行打包，从而通过利用预期缓存的概念，可以经济高效地在线服务传入请求。我们证明该算法具有 2α 竞争性，达到了所研究的缓存问题上任何确定性在线算法的竞争比下限，并且在服务请求方面具有时间和空间效率。最后，我们通过实验研究评估算法的性能，以展示其实际的成本效益和可扩展性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PackCache的在线成本驱动数据缓存算法，用于在云计算环境中优化数据请求的处理成本。
AI.motivation: 在云计算环境中，频繁共同使用的数据项可以被打包成一个项目进行传输，从而减少处理数据请求的成本。然而，现有的在线缓存算法未能有效利用这种打包策略。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种在线算法PackCache，利用FP-Tree技术挖掘频繁共同使用的数据项，并采用前瞻性缓存的概念来有效处理数据请求。
AI.result: 实验表明，PackCache算法在成本效益和可扩展性方面表现出色，其竞争比达到下限，且在时间和空间效率上表现良好。
AI.conclusion: PackCache算法在云计算环境中能够有效降低数据请求的处理成本，具有较高的实际应用价值。

authors_text: Christopher Wiedeman,Ge Wang
title: Decorrelative Network Architecture for Robust Electrocardiogram Classification
title_zh: 用于鲁棒心电图分类的去相关网络架构
abstract: Artificial intelligence has made great progress in medical data analysis, but the lack of robustness and trustworthiness has kept these methods from being widely deployed. As it is not possible to train networks that are accurate in all scenarios, models must recognize situations where they cannot operate confidently. Bayesian deep learning methods sample the model parameter space to estimate uncertainty, but these parameters are often subject to the same vulnerabilities, which can be exploited by adversarial attacks. We propose a novel ensemble approach based on feature decorrelation and Fourier partitioning for teaching networks diverse complementary features, reducing the chance of perturbation-based fooling. We test our approach on single and multi-channel electrocardiogram classification, and adapt adversarial training and DVERGE into the Bayesian ensemble framework for comparison. Our results indicate that the combination of decorrelation and Fourier partitioning generally maintains performance on unperturbed data while demonstrating superior robustness and uncertainty estimation on projected gradient descent and smooth adversarial attacks of various magnitudes. Furthermore, our approach does not require expensive optimization with adversarial samples, adding much less compute to the training process than adversarial training or DVERGE. These methods can be applied to other tasks for more robust and trustworthy models.
summary: Artificial intelligence has made great progress in medical data analysis, but the lack of robustness and trustworthiness has kept these methods from being widely deployed. As it is not possible to train networks that are accurate in all scenarios, models must recognize situations where they cannot operate confidently. Bayesian deep learning methods sample the model parameter space to estimate uncertainty, but these parameters are often subject to the same vulnerabilities, which can be exploited by adversarial attacks. We propose a novel ensemble approach based on feature decorrelation and Fourier partitioning for teaching networks diverse complementary features, reducing the chance of perturbation-based fooling. We test our approach on single and multi-channel electrocardiogram classification, and adapt adversarial training and DVERGE into the Bayesian ensemble framework for comparison. Our results indicate that the combination of decorrelation and Fourier partitioning generally maintains performance on unperturbed data while demonstrating superior robustness and uncertainty estimation on projected gradient descent and smooth adversarial attacks of various magnitudes. Furthermore, our approach does not require expensive optimization with adversarial samples, adding much less compute to the training process than adversarial training or DVERGE. These methods can be applied to other tasks for more robust and trustworthy models.
abstract_zh: 人工智能在医疗数据分析方面取得了巨大进步，但缺乏鲁棒性和可信性使这些方法无法得到广泛部署。由于不可能训练出在所有情况下都准确的网络，因此模型必须识别无法自信运行的情况。贝叶斯深度学习方法对模型参数空间进行采样以估计不确定性，但这些参数通常存在相同的漏洞，可被对抗性攻击利用。我们提出了一种基于特征去相关和傅立叶划分的新颖集成方法，用于教授网络不同的互补特征，减少基于扰动的愚弄的机会。我们在单通道和多通道心电图分类上测试我们的方法，并将对抗性训练和 DVERGE 调整到贝叶斯集成框架中进行比较。我们的结果表明，去相关和傅立叶划分的组合通常可以保持未扰动数据的性能，同时对投影梯度下降和各种程度的平滑对抗攻击表现出卓越的鲁棒性和不确定性估计。此外，我们的方法不需要对对抗性样本进行昂贵的优化，与对抗性训练或 DVERGE 相比，在训练过程中添加的计算量要少得多。这些方法可以应用于其他任务，以获得更稳健、更值得信赖的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于特征解相关和傅里叶分区的集成网络架构，用于提升心电图分类的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有AI模型在医疗数据分析中存在鲁棒性不足和可信度低的问题，尤其易受对抗攻击影响，需开发无需昂贵对抗样本训练的可靠方法。
AI.method: 通过特征解相关与傅里叶分区技术训练多样化互补特征的集成网络，并结合贝叶斯框架与对抗训练、DVERGE方法进行对比验证。
AI.result: 该方法在未受扰数据上保持性能的同时，显著提升对梯度投影下降和光滑对抗攻击的鲁棒性，且训练计算成本低于对抗训练和DVERGE。
AI.conclusion: 解相关与傅里叶分区结合的架构为构建更可靠、高效的医疗AI模型提供了新思路，适用于其他领域以增强模型可信度。

search_text: Decorrelative Network Architecture for Robust Electrocardiogram Classification 用于鲁棒心电图分类的去相关网络架构 Artificial intelligence has made great progress in medical data analysis, but the lack of robustness and trustworthiness has kept these methods from being widely deployed. As it is not possible to train networks that are accurate in all scenarios, models must recognize situations where they cannot operate confidently. Bayesian deep learning methods sample the model parameter space to estimate uncertainty, but these parameters are often subject to the same vulnerabilities, which can be exploited by adversarial attacks. We propose a novel ensemble approach based on feature decorrelation and Fourier partitioning for teaching networks diverse complementary features, reducing the chance of perturbation-based fooling. We test our approach on single and multi-channel electrocardiogram classification, and adapt adversarial training and DVERGE into the Bayesian ensemble framework for comparison. Our results indicate that the combination of decorrelation and Fourier partitioning generally maintains performance on unperturbed data while demonstrating superior robustness and uncertainty estimation on projected gradient descent and smooth adversarial attacks of various magnitudes. Furthermore, our approach does not require expensive optimization with adversarial samples, adding much less compute to the training process than adversarial training or DVERGE. These methods can be applied to other tasks for more robust and trustworthy models. 人工智能在医疗数据分析方面取得了巨大进步，但缺乏鲁棒性和可信性使这些方法无法得到广泛部署。由于不可能训练出在所有情况下都准确的网络，因此模型必须识别无法自信运行的情况。贝叶斯深度学习方法对模型参数空间进行采样以估计不确定性，但这些参数通常存在相同的漏洞，可被对抗性攻击利用。我们提出了一种基于特征去相关和傅立叶划分的新颖集成方法，用于教授网络不同的互补特征，减少基于扰动的愚弄的机会。我们在单通道和多通道心电图分类上测试我们的方法，并将对抗性训练和 DVERGE 调整到贝叶斯集成框架中进行比较。我们的结果表明，去相关和傅立叶划分的组合通常可以保持未扰动数据的性能，同时对投影梯度下降和各种程度的平滑对抗攻击表现出卓越的鲁棒性和不确定性估计。此外，我们的方法不需要对对抗性样本进行昂贵的优化，与对抗性训练或 DVERGE 相比，在训练过程中添加的计算量要少得多。这些方法可以应用于其他任务，以获得更稳健、更值得信赖的模型。 本文提出一种基于特征解相关和傅里叶分区的集成网络架构，用于提升心电图分类的鲁棒性。 Christopher Wiedeman,Ge Wang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Nirmalya Thakur,Chia Y. Han
title: Indoor Localization for Personalized Ambient Assisted Living of Multiple Users in Multi-Floor Smart Environments
title_zh: 多层智能环境中多个用户的个性化环境辅助生活的室内定位
abstract: This paper presents a multifunctional interdisciplinary framework that makes four scientific contributions towards the development of personalized ambient assisted living, with a specific focus to address the different and dynamic needs of the diverse aging population in the future of smart living environments. First, it presents a probabilistic reasoning-based mathematical approach to model all possible forms of user interactions for any activity arising from the user diversity of multiple users in such environments. Second, it presents a system that uses this approach with a machine learning method to model individual user profiles and user-specific user interactions for detecting the dynamic indoor location of each specific user. Third, to address the need to develop highly accurate indoor localization systems for increased trust, reliance, and seamless user acceptance, the framework introduces a novel methodology where two boosting approaches Gradient Boosting and the AdaBoost algorithm are integrated and used on a decision tree-based learning model to perform indoor localization. Fourth, the framework introduces two novel functionalities to provide semantic context to indoor localization in terms of detecting each user's floor-specific location as well as tracking whether a specific user was located inside or outside a given spatial region in a multi-floor-based indoor setting. These novel functionalities of the proposed framework were tested on a dataset of localization-related Big Data collected from 18 different users who navigated in 3 buildings consisting of 5 floors and 254 indoor spatial regions. The results show that this approach of indoor localization for personalized AAL that models each specific user always achieves higher accuracy as compared to the traditional approach of modeling an average user.
summary: This paper presents a multifunctional interdisciplinary framework that makes four scientific contributions towards the development of personalized ambient assisted living, with a specific focus to address the different and dynamic needs of the diverse aging population in the future of smart living environments. First, it presents a probabilistic reasoning-based mathematical approach to model all possible forms of user interactions for any activity arising from the user diversity of multiple users in such environments. Second, it presents a system that uses this approach with a machine learning method to model individual user profiles and user-specific user interactions for detecting the dynamic indoor location of each specific user. Third, to address the need to develop highly accurate indoor localization systems for increased trust, reliance, and seamless user acceptance, the framework introduces a novel methodology where two boosting approaches Gradient Boosting and the AdaBoost algorithm are integrated and used on a decision tree-based learning model to perform indoor localization. Fourth, the framework introduces two novel functionalities to provide semantic context to indoor localization in terms of detecting each user's floor-specific location as well as tracking whether a specific user was located inside or outside a given spatial region in a multi-floor-based indoor setting. These novel functionalities of the proposed framework were tested on a dataset of localization-related Big Data collected from 18 different users who navigated in 3 buildings consisting of 5 floors and 254 indoor spatial regions. The results show that this approach of indoor localization for personalized AAL that models each specific user always achieves higher accuracy as compared to the traditional approach of modeling an average user.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一个多功能的跨学科框架，该框架为个性化环境辅助生活的发展做出了四项科学贡献，特别关注于解决未来智能生活环境中多样化老年人口的不同和动态需求。首先，它提出了一种基于概率推理的数学方法，用于对此类环境中由多个用户的用户多样性引起的任何活动的所有可能形式的用户交互进行建模。其次，它提出了一种系统，该系统使用这种方法和机器学习方法来对个人用户配置文件和特定于用户的用户交互进行建模，以检测每个特定用户的动态室内位置。第三，为了满足开发高精度室内定位系统以增加信任、依赖和无缝用户接受度的需求，该框架引入了一种新颖的方法，其中集成了两种增强方法梯度增强和 AdaBoost 算法，并在基于决策树的学习模型上使用来执行室内定位。第四，该框架引入了两个新颖的功能，为室内定位提供语义上下文，即检测每个用户的特定楼层位置以及跟踪特定用户是否位于基于多层的室内设置中给定空间区域的内部或外部。所提出框架的这些新颖功能在与本地化相关的大数据数据集上进行了测试，这些数据集是从 18 个不同用户收集的，这些用户在 3 座建筑物（包括 5 层和 254 个室内空间区域）中进行导航。结果表明，与对普通用户进行建模的传统方法相比，这种对每个特定用户进行建模的个性化 AAL 室内定位方法始终能够实现更高的准确度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多楼层智能环境中的个性化室内定位框架，以满足多用户动态需求。
AI.motivation: 为应对未来智能生活环境中多样化老年群体的动态需求，需开发高精度、个性化的室内定位系统以提升用户信任与接受度。
AI.method: 结合概率推理与机器学习方法，集成梯度提升和AdaBoost算法于决策树模型，并引入两项新功能以检测楼层特定位置及空间区域状态。
AI.result: 基于18名用户在3栋建筑254个区域的数据测试表明，该框架在个性化建模下定位准确率优于传统平均用户模型。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过建模个体用户实现了更精准的室内定位，为多用户智能环境下的个性化辅助生活提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Jingwang Ling,Zhibo Wang,Ming Lu,Quan Wang,Chen Qian,Feng Xu
title: Structure-aware Editable Morphable Model for 3D Facial Detail Animation and Manipulation
title_zh: 用于 3D 面部细节动画和操作的结构感知可编辑变形模型
abstract: Morphable models are essential for the statistical modeling of 3D faces. Previous works on morphable models mostly focus on large-scale facial geometry but ignore facial details. This paper augments morphable models in representing facial details by learning a Structure-aware Editable Morphable Model (SEMM). SEMM introduces a detail structure representation based on the distance field of wrinkle lines, jointly modeled with detail displacements to establish better correspondences and enable intuitive manipulation of wrinkle structure. Besides, SEMM introduces two transformation modules to translate expression blendshape weights and age values into changes in latent space, allowing effective semantic detail editing while maintaining identity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed model compactly represents facial details, outperforms previous methods in expression animation qualitatively and quantitatively, and achieves effective age editing and wrinkle line editing of facial details. Code and model are available at https://github.com/gerwang/facial-detail-manipulation.
summary: Morphable models are essential for the statistical modeling of 3D faces. Previous works on morphable models mostly focus on large-scale facial geometry but ignore facial details. This paper augments morphable models in representing facial details by learning a Structure-aware Editable Morphable Model (SEMM). SEMM introduces a detail structure representation based on the distance field of wrinkle lines, jointly modeled with detail displacements to establish better correspondences and enable intuitive manipulation of wrinkle structure. Besides, SEMM introduces two transformation modules to translate expression blendshape weights and age values into changes in latent space, allowing effective semantic detail editing while maintaining identity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed model compactly represents facial details, outperforms previous methods in expression animation qualitatively and quantitatively, and achieves effective age editing and wrinkle line editing of facial details. Code and model are available at https://github.com/gerwang/facial-detail-manipulation.
abstract_zh: 可变形模型对于 3D 人脸统计建模至关重要。之前关于可变形模型的研究大多关注大规模的面部几何形状，但忽略了面部细节。本文通过学习结构感知可编辑变形模型（SEMM）来增强可变形模型在表示面部细节方面的能力。 SEMM 引入了基于皱纹线距离场的细节结构表示，与细节位移联合建模，以建立更好的对应关系并实现皱纹结构的直观操作。此外，SEMM 引入了两个转换模块，将表达混合形状权重和年龄值转换为潜在空间的变化，从而在保持身份的同时允许有效的语义细节编辑。大量实验表明，该模型能够紧凑地表达面部细节，在定性和定量上优于之前的表情动画方法，并实现了面部细节的有效年龄编辑和皱纹线编辑。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/gerwang/facial-detail-manipulation 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结构感知可编辑的可变形模型（SEMM），用于增强3D面部细节的动画生成与编辑。
AI.motivation: 传统可变形模型侧重于面部整体几何结构，忽视了皱纹等细节特征的建模与编辑需求。
AI.method: 通过学习皱纹线距离场与细节位移的联合表示，构建结构感知的细节表示；引入表达混合形状权重和年龄值的转换模块，实现语义细节编辑。
AI.result: 实验表明，SEMM在表情动画质量、年龄编辑和皱纹线编辑任务中均优于现有方法，且能保持身份一致性。
AI.conclusion: SEMM通过结构感知的细节建模与语义编辑模块，有效提升了3D面部细节的表示与操控能力。

search_text: Structure-aware Editable Morphable Model for 3D Facial Detail Animation and Manipulation 用于 3D 面部细节动画和操作的结构感知可编辑变形模型 Morphable models are essential for the statistical modeling of 3D faces. Previous works on morphable models mostly focus on large-scale facial geometry but ignore facial details. This paper augments morphable models in representing facial details by learning a Structure-aware Editable Morphable Model (SEMM). SEMM introduces a detail structure representation based on the distance field of wrinkle lines, jointly modeled with detail displacements to establish better correspondences and enable intuitive manipulation of wrinkle structure. Besides, SEMM introduces two transformation modules to translate expression blendshape weights and age values into changes in latent space, allowing effective semantic detail editing while maintaining identity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed model compactly represents facial details, outperforms previous methods in expression animation qualitatively and quantitatively, and achieves effective age editing and wrinkle line editing of facial details. Code and model are available at https://github.com/gerwang/facial-detail-manipulation. 可变形模型对于 3D 人脸统计建模至关重要。之前关于可变形模型的研究大多关注大规模的面部几何形状，但忽略了面部细节。本文通过学习结构感知可编辑变形模型（SEMM）来增强可变形模型在表示面部细节方面的能力。 SEMM 引入了基于皱纹线距离场的细节结构表示，与细节位移联合建模，以建立更好的对应关系并实现皱纹结构的直观操作。此外，SEMM 引入了两个转换模块，将表达混合形状权重和年龄值转换为潜在空间的变化，从而在保持身份的同时允许有效的语义细节编辑。大量实验表明，该模型能够紧凑地表达面部细节，在定性和定量上优于之前的表情动画方法，并实现了面部细节的有效年龄编辑和皱纹线编辑。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/gerwang/facial-detail-manipulation 获取。 本文提出了一种结构感知可编辑的可变形模型（SEMM），用于增强3D面部细节的动画生成与编辑。 Jingwang Ling,Zhibo Wang,Ming Lu,Quan Wang,Chen Qian,Feng Xu cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Darshan Gera,Badveeti Naveen Siva Kumar,Bobbili Veerendra Raj Kumar,S Balasubramanian
title: SS-MFAR : Semi-supervised Multi-task Facial Affect Recognition
title_zh: SS-MFAR：半监督多任务面部表情识别
abstract: Automatic affect recognition has applications in many areas such as education, gaming, software development, automotives, medical care, etc. but it is non trivial task to achieve appreciable performance on in-the-wild data sets. In-the-wild data sets though represent real-world scenarios better than synthetic data sets, the former ones suffer from the problem of incomplete labels. Inspired by semi-supervised learning, in this paper, we introduce our submission to the Multi-Task-Learning Challenge at the 4th Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) 2022 Competition. The three tasks that are considered in this challenge are valence-arousal(VA) estimation, classification of expressions into 6 basic (anger, disgust, fear, happiness, sadness, surprise), neutral, and the 'other' category and 12 action units(AU) numbered AU-{1,2,4,6,7,10,12,15,23,24,25,26}. Our method Semi-supervised Multi-task Facial Affect Recognition titled SS-MFAR uses a deep residual network with task specific classifiers for each of the tasks along with adaptive thresholds for each expression class and semi-supervised learning for the incomplete labels. Source code is available at https://github.com/1980x/ABAW2022DMACS.
summary: Automatic affect recognition has applications in many areas such as education, gaming, software development, automotives, medical care, etc. but it is non trivial task to achieve appreciable performance on in-the-wild data sets. In-the-wild data sets though represent real-world scenarios better than synthetic data sets, the former ones suffer from the problem of incomplete labels. Inspired by semi-supervised learning, in this paper, we introduce our submission to the Multi-Task-Learning Challenge at the 4th Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) 2022 Competition. The three tasks that are considered in this challenge are valence-arousal(VA) estimation, classification of expressions into 6 basic (anger, disgust, fear, happiness, sadness, surprise), neutral, and the 'other' category and 12 action units(AU) numbered AU-{1,2,4,6,7,10,12,15,23,24,25,26}. Our method Semi-supervised Multi-task Facial Affect Recognition titled SS-MFAR uses a deep residual network with task specific classifiers for each of the tasks along with adaptive thresholds for each expression class and semi-supervised learning for the incomplete labels. Source code is available at https://github.com/1980x/ABAW2022DMACS.
abstract_zh: 自动情感识别在教育、游戏、软件开发、汽车、医疗保健等许多领域都有应用，但在野外数据集上实现可观的性能并不是一件简单的任务。尽管野外数据集比合成数据集更好地代表了现实世界的场景，但前者存在标签不完整的问题。受半监督学习的启发，在本文中，我们介绍了我们在 2022 年第四届野外情感行为分析 (ABAW) 竞赛中提交的多任务学习挑战赛。此挑战中考虑的三个任务是效价唤醒 (VA) 估计、将表情分类为 6 个基本类别（愤怒、厌恶、恐惧、幸福、悲伤、惊讶）、中立和“其他”类别以及编号为 AU-{1,2,4,6,7,10,12,15,23,24,25,26} 的 12 个动作单元 (AU)。我们的名为 SS-MFAR 的半监督多任务面部表情识别方法使用深度残差网络，其中每个任务具有特定于任务的分类器，以及每个表情类别的自适应阈值和针对不完整标签的半监督学习。源代码可在 https://github.com/1980x/ABAW2022DMACS 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出半监督多任务面部情感识别方法SS-MFAR，用于解决真实场景下情感识别数据标签不完整的问题。
AI.motivation: 真实场景数据集存在标签不完整问题，传统方法难以有效利用有限标注数据提升多任务情感识别性能。
AI.method: 基于深度残差网络构建多任务分类器，结合自适应表达阈值与半监督学习策略处理不完整标签。
AI.result: 在ABAW2022竞赛中完成多任务情感识别挑战，包含效价-唤醒估计、7类表情分类及12个动作单元检测。
AI.conclusion: 半监督学习有效缓解标签不完整性问题，多任务架构提升面部情感识别在真实场景下的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Zhao Song,Zhaozhuo Xu,Yuanyuan Yang,Lichen Zhang
title: Accelerating Frank-Wolfe Algorithm using Low-Dimensional and Adaptive Data Structures
title_zh: 使用低维和自适应数据结构加速 Frank-Wolfe 算法
abstract: In this paper, we study the problem of speeding up a type of optimization algorithms called Frank-Wolfe, a conditional gradient method. We develop and employ two novel inner product search data structures, improving the prior fastest algorithm in [Shrivastava, Song and Xu, NeurIPS 2021]. * The first data structure uses low-dimensional random projection to reduce the problem to a lower dimension, then uses efficient inner product data structure. It has preprocessing time $\tilde O(nd^{ω-1}+dn^{1+o(1)})$ and per iteration cost $\tilde O(d+n^ρ)$ for small constant $ρ$. * The second data structure leverages the recent development in adaptive inner product search data structure that can output estimations to all inner products. It has preprocessing time $\tilde O(nd)$ and per iteration cost $\tilde O(d+n)$. The first algorithm improves the state-of-the-art (with preprocessing time $\tilde O(d^2n^{1+o(1)})$ and per iteration cost $\tilde O(dn^ρ)$) in all cases, while the second one provides an even faster preprocessing time and is suitable when the number of iterations is small.
summary: In this paper, we study the problem of speeding up a type of optimization algorithms called Frank-Wolfe, a conditional gradient method. We develop and employ two novel inner product search data structures, improving the prior fastest algorithm in [Shrivastava, Song and Xu, NeurIPS 2021]. * The first data structure uses low-dimensional random projection to reduce the problem to a lower dimension, then uses efficient inner product data structure. It has preprocessing time $\tilde O(nd^{ω-1}+dn^{1+o(1)})$ and per iteration cost $\tilde O(d+n^ρ)$ for small constant $ρ$. * The second data structure leverages the recent development in adaptive inner product search data structure that can output estimations to all inner products. It has preprocessing time $\tilde O(nd)$ and per iteration cost $\tilde O(d+n)$. The first algorithm improves the state-of-the-art (with preprocessing time $\tilde O(d^2n^{1+o(1)})$ and per iteration cost $\tilde O(dn^ρ)$) in all cases, while the second one provides an even faster preprocessing time and is suitable when the number of iterations is small.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了加速一种称为 Frank-Wolfe 的优化算法（一种条件梯度方法）的问题。我们开发并采用了两种新颖的内积搜索数据结构，改进了 [Shrivastava, Song 和 Xu, NeurIPS 2021] 中现有的最快算法。 * 第一个数据结构使用低维随机投影将问题降低到较低维度，然后使用高效的内积数据结构。对于小常数$ρ$，它的预处理时间为$\tilde O(nd^{ω-1}+dn^{1+o(1)})$，每次迭代成本为$\tilde O(d+n^ρ)$。 * 第二种数据结构利用了自适应内积搜索数据结构的最新发展，可以输出对所有内积的估计。它的预处理时间为$\tilde O(nd)$，每次迭代成本为$\tilde O(d+n)$。第一个算法在所有情况下都改进了最先进的算法（预处理时间 $\tilde O(d^2n^{1+o(1)})$ 和每次迭代成本 $\tilde O(dn^ρ)$），而第二个算法提供了更快的预处理时间，并且适合迭代次数较少的情况。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种新型内积搜索数据结构，加速Frank-Wolfe优化算法的计算效率。
AI.motivation: Frank-Wolfe算法在大规模优化问题中面临计算效率瓶颈，需改进其内积计算步骤以提升性能。
AI.method: 设计低维随机投影数据结构（降维后使用高效内积结构）和自适应内积搜索数据结构（支持批量内积估计）。
AI.result: 第一种方法预处理时间降至$\	ilde O(nd^{ω-1}+dn^{1+o(1)})$，迭代成本$\	ilde O(d+n^ρ)$；第二种方法预处理时间$\	ilde O(nd)$，迭代成本$\	ilde O(d+n)$，均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 低维结构在通用场景下表现更优，自适应结构适合迭代次数较少的场景，为优化算法提供新思路。

It has preprocessing time $\tilde O(nd^{ω-1}+dn^{1+o(1)})$ and per iteration cost $\tilde O(d+n^ρ)$ for small constant $ρ$. * The second data structure leverages the recent development in adaptive inner product search data structure that can output estimations to all inner products. It has preprocessing time $\tilde O(nd)$ and per iteration cost $\tilde O(d+n)$. The first algorithm improves the state-of-the-art (with preprocessing time $\tilde O(d^2n^{1+o(1)})$ and per iteration cost $\tilde O(dn^ρ)$) in all cases, while the second one provides an even faster preprocessing time and is suitable when the number of iterations is small. 在本文中，我们研究了加速一种称为 Frank-Wolfe 的优化算法（一种条件梯度方法）的问题。我们开发并采用了两种新颖的内积搜索数据结构，改进了 [Shrivastava, Song 和 Xu, NeurIPS 2021] 中现有的最快算法。 * 第一个数据结构使用低维随机投影将问题降低到较低维度，然后使用高效的内积数据结构。对于小常数$ρ$，它的预处理时间为$\tilde O(nd^{ω-1}+dn^{1+o(1)})$，每次迭代成本为$\tilde O(d+n^ρ)$。 * 第二种数据结构利用了自适应内积搜索数据结构的最新发展，可以输出对所有内积的估计。它的预处理时间为$\tilde O(nd)$，每次迭代成本为$\tilde O(d+n)$。第一个算法在所有情况下都改进了最先进的算法（预处理时间 $\tilde O(d^2n^{1+o(1)})$ 和每次迭代成本 $\tilde O(dn^ρ)$），而第二个算法提供了更快的预处理时间，并且适合迭代次数较少的情况。 本文提出两种新型内积搜索数据结构，加速Frank-Wolfe优化算法的计算效率。 Zhao Song,Zhaozhuo Xu,Yuanyuan Yang,Lichen Zhang cs.DS

authors_text: Boris Babenko,Ilana Traynis,Christina Chen,Preeti Singh,Akib Uddin,Jorge Cuadros,Lauren P. Daskivich,April Y. Maa,Ramasamy Kim,Eugene Yu-Chuan Kang,Yossi Matias,Greg S. Corrado,Lily Peng,Dale R. Webster,Christopher Semturs,Jonathan Krause,Avinash V. Varadarajan,Naama Hammel,Yun Liu
title: Discovering novel systemic biomarkers in photos of the external eye
title_zh: 在外眼照片中发现新颖的全身生物标志物
abstract: External eye photos were recently shown to reveal signs of diabetic retinal disease and elevated HbA1c. In this paper, we evaluate if external eye photos contain information about additional systemic medical conditions. We developed a deep learning system (DLS) that takes external eye photos as input and predicts multiple systemic parameters, such as those related to the liver (albumin, AST); kidney (eGFR estimated using the race-free 2021 CKD-EPI creatinine equation, the urine ACR); bone & mineral (calcium); thyroid (TSH); and blood count (Hgb, WBC, platelets). Development leveraged 151,237 images from 49,015 patients with diabetes undergoing diabetic eye screening in 11 sites across Los Angeles county, CA. Evaluation focused on 9 pre-specified systemic parameters and leveraged 3 validation sets (A, B, C) spanning 28,869 patients with and without diabetes undergoing eye screening in 3 independent sites in Los Angeles County, CA, and the greater Atlanta area, GA. We compared against baseline models incorporating available clinicodemographic variables (e.g. age, sex, race/ethnicity, years with diabetes). Relative to the baseline, the DLS achieved statistically significant superior performance at detecting AST>36, calcium<8.6, eGFR<60, Hgb<11, platelets<150, ACR>=300, and WBC<4 on validation set A (a patient population similar to the development sets), where the AUC of DLS exceeded that of the baseline by 5.2-19.4%. On validation sets B and C, with substantial patient population differences compared to the development sets, the DLS outperformed the baseline for ACR>=300 and Hgb<11 by 7.3-13.2%. Our findings provide further evidence that external eye photos contain important biomarkers of systemic health spanning multiple organ systems. Further work is needed to investigate whether and how these biomarkers can be translated into clinical impact.

abstract_zh: 最近的外眼照片显示出糖尿病性视网膜疾病和 HbA1c 升高的迹象。在本文中，我们评估外眼照片是否包含有关其他全身医疗状况的信息。我们开发了一个深度学习系统（DLS），它以外眼照片作为输入并预测多个系统参数，例如与肝脏相关的参数（白蛋白、AST）；肾脏（使用无种族 2021 CKD-EPI 肌酐方程估计 eGFR，尿液 ACR）；骨骼和矿物质（钙）；甲状腺（TSH）；和血细胞计数（Hgb、WBC、血小板）。开发过程中利用了 49,015 名糖尿病患者的 151,237 张图像，这些患者在加利福尼亚州洛杉矶县的 11 个地点接受了糖尿病眼部筛查。评估重点关注 9 个预先指定的系统参数，并利用 3 个验证集（A、B、C），涵盖 28,869 名糖尿病患者和非糖尿病患者，这些患者在加利福尼亚州洛杉矶县和佐治亚州大亚特兰大地区的 3 个独立地点接受眼部筛查。我们与纳入可用临床人口统计学变量（例如年龄、性别、种族/民族、患糖尿病年数）的基线模型进行了比较。相对于基线，DLS 在验证集 A（与开发集类似的患者群体）上检测 AST>36、钙<8.6、eGFR<60、Hgb<11、血小板<150、ACR>=300 和 WBC<4 方面取得了统计学上显着的优越性能，其中 DLS 的 AUC 超出基线 5.2-19.4%。在验证集 B 和 C 上，与开发集相比，患者群体存在显着差异，DLS 的 ACR>=300 和 Hgb<11 的基线表现优于基线 7.3-13.2%。我们的研究结果提供了进一步的证据，证明外眼照片包含跨越多个器官系统的系统健康的重要生物标志物。需要进一步的工作来研究这些生物标志物是否以及如何转化为临床影响。

AI.tldr: 本文评估外部眼照片是否能揭示其他系统性健康状况，并开发深度学习系统进行预测。
AI.motivation: 先前研究发现外部眼照片可检测糖尿病视网膜病变和HbA1c，但尚未探索其对其他系统性疾病的预测能力。
AI.method: 利用151,237张糖尿病患者眼底照片训练深度学习模型，预测肝肾功能、骨代谢、甲状腺及血细胞计数等9项指标，并在三个独立验证集上与基线模型对比。
AI.result: 在验证集A中，模型对7项指标的AUC提升5.2-19.4%；在差异较大的验证集B/C中，对ACR≥300和Hgb<11的预测仍优于基线7.3-13.2%。
AI.conclusion: 外部眼照片包含多器官系统健康生物标志物，但需进一步研究其临床转化价值。

authors_text: Neil Nie,Samir Yitzhak Gadre,Kiana Ehsani,Shuran Song
title: Structure from Action: Learning Interactions for Articulated Object 3D Structure Discovery
title_zh: 从动作中构建结构：学习交互以发现铰接对象 3D 结构
abstract: We introduce Structure from Action (SfA), a framework to discover 3D part geometry and joint parameters of unseen articulated objects via a sequence of inferred interactions. Our key insight is that 3D interaction and perception should be considered in conjunction to construct 3D articulated CAD models, especially for categories not seen during training. By selecting informative interactions, SfA discovers parts and reveals occluded surfaces, like the inside of a closed drawer. By aggregating visual observations in 3D, SfA accurately segments multiple parts, reconstructs part geometry, and infers all joint parameters in a canonical coordinate frame. Our experiments demonstrate that a SfA model trained in simulation can generalize to many unseen object categories with diverse structures and to real-world objects. Empirically, SfA outperforms a pipeline of state-of-the-art components by 25.4 3D IoU percentage points on unseen categories, while matching already performant joint estimation baselines.
summary: We introduce Structure from Action (SfA), a framework to discover 3D part geometry and joint parameters of unseen articulated objects via a sequence of inferred interactions. Our key insight is that 3D interaction and perception should be considered in conjunction to construct 3D articulated CAD models, especially for categories not seen during training. By selecting informative interactions, SfA discovers parts and reveals occluded surfaces, like the inside of a closed drawer. By aggregating visual observations in 3D, SfA accurately segments multiple parts, reconstructs part geometry, and infers all joint parameters in a canonical coordinate frame. Our experiments demonstrate that a SfA model trained in simulation can generalize to many unseen object categories with diverse structures and to real-world objects. Empirically, SfA outperforms a pipeline of state-of-the-art components by 25.4 3D IoU percentage points on unseen categories, while matching already performant joint estimation baselines.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了“动作结构”(SfA)，这是一个通过一系列推断交互来发现 3D 零件几何形状和不可见铰接对象的关节参数的框架。我们的主要见解是，应结合考虑 3D 交互和感知来构建 3D 铰接式 CAD 模型，特别是对于训练期间未看到的类别。通过选择信息交互，SfA 可以发现零件并揭示被遮挡的表面，例如关闭的抽屉的内部。通过聚合 3D 视觉观察结果，SfA 可以准确分割多个零件、重建零件几何形状，并推断规范坐标系中的所有关节参数。我们的实验表明，经过模拟训练的 SfA 模型可以推广到许多具有不同结构的看不见的对象类别和现实世界的对象。根据经验，SfA 在未见过的类别上比最先进组件的管道高出 25.4 个 3D IoU 个百分点，同时匹配已经表现良好的联合估计基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Structure from Action (SfA)的框架，通过推断交互序列来发现未见过的可变形物体的3D结构。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理训练时未见过的物体类别及遮挡结构（如抽屉内部）时效果有限，需结合交互与感知联合建模以提升3D重建能力。
AI.method: SfA通过选择信息量大的交互动作，聚合3D视觉观测数据，实现多部件分割、几何重建及关节参数推断，并在规范坐标系中统一表示。
AI.result: 模拟训练的SfA模型在未见过的物体类别和真实物体上均表现优异，3D IoU指标超越现有方法25.4个百分点，且匹配先进关节估计基线。
AI.conclusion: SfA框架通过交互与感知的联合建模，有效解决了可变形物体3D结构发现问题，展现了强大的跨类别泛化能力。

search_text: Structure from Action: Learning Interactions for Articulated Object 3D Structure Discovery 从动作中构建结构：学习交互以发现铰接对象 3D 结构 We introduce Structure from Action (SfA), a framework to discover 3D part geometry and joint parameters of unseen articulated objects via a sequence of inferred interactions. Our key insight is that 3D interaction and perception should be considered in conjunction to construct 3D articulated CAD models, especially for categories not seen during training. By selecting informative interactions, SfA discovers parts and reveals occluded surfaces, like the inside of a closed drawer. By aggregating visual observations in 3D, SfA accurately segments multiple parts, reconstructs part geometry, and infers all joint parameters in a canonical coordinate frame. Our experiments demonstrate that a SfA model trained in simulation can generalize to many unseen object categories with diverse structures and to real-world objects. Empirically, SfA outperforms a pipeline of state-of-the-art components by 25.4 3D IoU percentage points on unseen categories, while matching already performant joint estimation baselines. 我们引入了“动作结构”(SfA)，这是一个通过一系列推断交互来发现 3D 零件几何形状和不可见铰接对象的关节参数的框架。我们的主要见解是，应结合考虑 3D 交互和感知来构建 3D 铰接式 CAD 模型，特别是对于训练期间未看到的类别。通过选择信息交互，SfA 可以发现零件并揭示被遮挡的表面，例如关闭的抽屉的内部。通过聚合 3D 视觉观察结果，SfA 可以准确分割多个零件、重建零件几何形状，并推断规范坐标系中的所有关节参数。我们的实验表明，经过模拟训练的 SfA 模型可以推广到许多具有不同结构的看不见的对象类别和现实世界的对象。根据经验，SfA 在未见过的类别上比最先进组件的管道高出 25.4 个 3D IoU 个百分点，同时匹配已经表现良好的联合估计基线。 本文提出了一种名为Structure from Action (SfA)的框架，通过推断交互序列来发现未见过的可变形物体的3D结构。 Neil Nie,Samir Yitzhak Gadre,Kiana Ehsani,Shuran Song cs.CV

authors_text: Tomas Cabezon Pedroso,Javier Del Ser,Natalia Diaz-Rodrıguez
title: Capabilities, Limitations and Challenges of Style Transfer with CycleGANs: A Study on Automatic Ring Design Generation
title_zh: CycleGAN 风格迁移的能力、局限性和挑战：自动环设计生成的研究
abstract: Rendering programs have changed the design process completely as they permit to see how the products will look before they are fabricated. However, the rendering process is complicated and takes a significant amount of time, not only in the rendering itself but in the setting of the scene as well. Materials, lights and cameras need to be set in order to get the best quality results. Nevertheless, the optimal output may not be obtained in the first render. This all makes the rendering process a tedious process. Since Goodfellow et al. introduced Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) in 2014 [1], they have been used to generate computer-assigned synthetic data, from non-existing human faces to medical data analysis or image style transfer. GANs have been used to transfer image textures from one domain to another. However, paired data from both domains was needed. When Zhu et al. introduced the CycleGAN model, the elimination of this expensive constraint permitted transforming one image from one domain into another, without the need for paired data. This work validates the applicability of CycleGANs on style transfer from an initial sketch to a final render in 2D that represents a 3D design, a step that is paramount in every product design process. We inquiry the possibilities of including CycleGANs as part of the design pipeline, more precisely, applied to the rendering of ring designs. Our contribution entails a crucial part of the process as it allows the customer to see the final product before buying. This work sets a basis for future research, showing the possibilities of GANs in design and establishing a starting point for novel applications to approach crafts design.

abstract_zh: 渲染程序完全改变了设计过程，因为它们允许在制造之前查看产品的外观。然而，渲染过程很复杂，并且需要花费大量时间，不仅在渲染本身，而且在场景设置方面也是如此。需要设置材质、灯光和相机才能获得最佳质量的结果。然而，在第一次渲染中可能无法获得最佳输出。这一切都使得渲染过程成为一个繁琐的过程。自古德费罗等人以来。 2014 年推出了生成对抗网络（GAN）[1]，它们已被用于生成计算机分配的合成数据，从不存在的人脸到医学数据分析或图像风格转换。 GAN 已被用来将图像纹理从一个域转移到另一个域。然而，需要来自两个域的配对数据。当朱等人。引入了 CycleGAN 模型，消除了这种昂贵的约束，允许将一幅图像从一个域转换到另一个域，而不需要配对数据。这项工作验证了 CycleGAN 在从初始草图到代表 3D 设计的最终 2D 渲染的风格转换方面的适用性，这是每个产品设计过程中至关重要的一步。我们询问将 CycleGAN 作为设计流程一部分的可能性，更准确地说，应用于环形设计的渲染。我们的贡献是整个过程的关键部分，因为它允许客户在购买前看到最终产品。这项工作为未来的研究奠定了基础，展示了 GAN 在设计中的可能性，并为工艺品设计的新颖应用奠定了起点。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用CycleGANs进行风格迁移在自动戒指设计生成中的可行性，旨在简化设计流程并提升客户预览体验。
AI.motivation: 传统渲染过程复杂耗时，且需大量参数调整，而CycleGANs无需配对数据即可实现跨域风格迁移，为设计流程提供新思路。
AI.method: 基于CycleGAN模型，将初始草图风格迁移至最终渲染结果，验证其在2D到3D设计表示中的适用性。
AI.result: 实验表明CycleGANs可有效实现从草图到最终渲染的风格迁移，为设计流程自动化提供了可行方案。
AI.conclusion: CycleGANs在设计领域具有潜力，为未来探索GANs在工艺设计等新型应用奠定了基础。

authors_text: Emily McMilin
title: Selection Bias Induced Spurious Correlations in Large Language Models
title_zh: 选择偏差导致大型语言模型中的虚假相关性
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, Published at the ICML 2022 Workshop on Spurious Correlations, Invariance, and Stability
comments: 8 pages, 5 figures, Published at the ICML 2022 Workshop on Spurious Correlations, Invariance, and Stability
abstract: In this work we show how large language models (LLMs) can learn statistical dependencies between otherwise unconditionally independent variables due to dataset selection bias. To demonstrate the effect, we developed a masked gender task that can be applied to BERT-family models to reveal spurious correlations between predicted gender pronouns and a variety of seemingly gender-neutral variables like date and location, on pre-trained (unmodified) BERT and RoBERTa large models. Finally, we provide an online demo, inviting readers to experiment further.
summary: In this work we show how large language models (LLMs) can learn statistical dependencies between otherwise unconditionally independent variables due to dataset selection bias. To demonstrate the effect, we developed a masked gender task that can be applied to BERT-family models to reveal spurious correlations between predicted gender pronouns and a variety of seemingly gender-neutral variables like date and location, on pre-trained (unmodified) BERT and RoBERTa large models. Finally, we provide an online demo, inviting readers to experiment further.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们展示了大型语言模型 (LLM) 如何学习由于数据集选择偏差而导致的无条件独立变量之间的统计依赖性。为了证明这一效果，我们开发了一个可应用于 BERT 系列模型的屏蔽性别任务，以在预训练（未经修改）的 BERT 和 RoBERTa 大型模型上揭示预测的性别代词与各种看似性别中性的变量（例如日期和位置）之间的虚假相关性。最后，我们提供了一个在线演示，邀请读者进一步实验。

AI.tldr: 本文研究大型语言模型因数据集选择偏差而产生的虚假相关性问题，并通过设计掩码性别任务验证该现象。
AI.motivation: 现有大型语言模型可能因训练数据的选择偏差导致对无关变量的虚假关联，但这一问题尚未被充分探讨。
AI.method: 开发掩码性别任务，通过BERT和RoBERTa模型分析预测性别代词与日期、位置等中性变量的关联性。
AI.result: 实验发现预训练模型存在显著的虚假相关性，且提供在线演示验证该现象。
AI.conclusion: 数据选择偏差会使模型学习到不真实的统计依赖，需在训练和评估中关注数据偏差问题。

authors_text: Siamul Karim Khan,Patrick Tinsley,Adam Czajka
title: DeformIrisNet: An Identity-Preserving Model of Iris Texture Deformation
title_zh: DeformIrisNet：虹膜纹理变形的身份保留模型
comment: Accepted to the IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2023
comments: Accepted to the IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2023
abstract: Nonlinear iris texture deformations due to pupil size variations are one of the main factors responsible for within-class variance of genuine comparison scores in iris recognition. In dominant approaches to iris recognition, the size of a ring-shaped iris region is linearly scaled to a canonical rectangle, used further in encoding and matching. However, the biological complexity of the iris sphincter and dilator muscles causes the movements of iris features to be nonlinear in a function of pupil size, and not solely organized along radial paths. Alternatively to the existing theoretical models based on the biomechanics of iris musculature, in this paper we propose a novel deep autoencoder-based model that can effectively learn complex movements of iris texture features directly from the data. The proposed model takes two inputs, (a) an ISO-compliant near-infrared iris image with initial pupil size, and (b) the binary mask defining the target shape of the iris. The model makes all the necessary nonlinear deformations to the iris texture to match the shape of the iris in an image (a) with the shape provided by the target mask (b). The identity-preservation component of the loss function helps the model in finding deformations that preserve identity and not only the visual realism of the generated samples. We also demonstrate two immediate applications of this model: better compensation for iris texture deformations in iris recognition algorithms, compared to linear models, and the creation of a generative algorithm that can aid human forensic examiners, who may need to compare iris images with a large difference in pupil dilation. We offer the source codes and model weights available along with this paper.
summary: Nonlinear iris texture deformations due to pupil size variations are one of the main factors responsible for within-class variance of genuine comparison scores in iris recognition. In dominant approaches to iris recognition, the size of a ring-shaped iris region is linearly scaled to a canonical rectangle, used further in encoding and matching. However, the biological complexity of the iris sphincter and dilator muscles causes the movements of iris features to be nonlinear in a function of pupil size, and not solely organized along radial paths. Alternatively to the existing theoretical models based on the biomechanics of iris musculature, in this paper we propose a novel deep autoencoder-based model that can effectively learn complex movements of iris texture features directly from the data. The proposed model takes two inputs, (a) an ISO-compliant near-infrared iris image with initial pupil size, and (b) the binary mask defining the target shape of the iris. The model makes all the necessary nonlinear deformations to the iris texture to match the shape of the iris in an image (a) with the shape provided by the target mask (b). The identity-preservation component of the loss function helps the model in finding deformations that preserve identity and not only the visual realism of the generated samples. We also demonstrate two immediate applications of this model: better compensation for iris texture deformations in iris recognition algorithms, compared to linear models, and the creation of a generative algorithm that can aid human forensic examiners, who may need to compare iris images with a large difference in pupil dilation. We offer the source codes and model weights available along with this paper.
abstract_zh: 由于瞳孔大小变化导致的非线性虹膜纹理变形是导致虹膜识别中真实比较分数的类内方差的主要因素之一。在虹膜识别的主流方法中，环形虹膜区域的大小被线性缩放为规范矩形，进一步用于编码和匹配。然而，虹膜括约肌和扩张肌的生物复杂性导致虹膜特征的运动在瞳孔大小的函数中是非线性的，并且不仅仅沿着径向路径组织。作为基于虹膜肌肉组织生物力学的现有理论模型的替代方案，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于深度自动编码器的模型，可以直接从数据中有效地学习虹膜纹理特征的复杂运动。所提出的模型采用两个输入：(a) 具有初始瞳孔大小的符合 ISO 标准的近红外虹膜图像，以及 (b) 定义虹膜目标形状的二元掩模。该模型对虹膜纹理进行所有必要的非线性变形，以使图像 (a) 中虹膜的形状与目标掩模 (b) 提供的形状相匹配。损失函数的身份保留部分有助于模型找到保留身份的变形，而不仅仅是生成样本的视觉真实感。我们还演示了该模型的两个直接应用：与线性模型相比，可以更好地补偿虹膜识别算法中的虹膜纹理变形，以及创建可以帮助人类法医检查人员的生成算法，他们可能需要比较瞳孔扩张差异较大的虹膜图像。我们随本文提供了源代码和模型权重。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度自编码器的虹膜纹理变形模型DeformIrisNet，通过非线性变形补偿瞳孔变化导致的虹膜特征位移，同时保持身份信息一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有虹膜识别方法采用线性缩放处理瞳孔变化引起的纹理变形，但无法准确模拟虹膜括约肌和扩张肌的生物力学非线性运动，导致同类样本比对分数方差增大。
AI.method: 构建双输入自编码器网络，输入包括ISO标准近红外虹膜图像和目标形状二值掩码，通过身份保持损失函数约束变形过程，实现非线性纹理重映射。
AI.result: 模型在虹膜识别算法中实现优于线性模型的变形补偿效果，并可生成辅助法医比对的差异瞳孔直径虹膜图像，开源代码和模型权重已提供。
AI.conclusion: 提出的端到端深度学习框架有效解决了虹膜生物力学非线性变形建模难题，为提升虹膜识别鲁棒性和法医图像分析提供了新方法。
