authors_text: Zihao Wang,Ravi Suppiah
title: Upper Limb Movement Recognition utilising EEG and EMG Signals for Rehabilitative Robotics
title_zh: 利用脑电图和肌电图信号进行康复机器人上肢运动识别
comment: 20 pages, 11 figures, 2 tables; Thesis for Undergraduate Research Project in Computing, NUS; Accepted by Future of Information and Communication Conference 2023, San Francisco
comments: 20 pages, 11 figures, 2 tables; Thesis for Undergraduate Research Project in Computing, NUS; Accepted by Future of Information and Communication Conference 2023, San Francisco
abstract: Upper limb movement classification, which maps input signals to the target activities, is a key building block in the control of rehabilitative robotics. Classifiers are trained for the rehabilitative system to comprehend the desires of the patient whose upper limbs do not function properly. Electromyography (EMG) signals and Electroencephalography (EEG) signals are used widely for upper limb movement classification. By analysing the classification results of the real-time EEG and EMG signals, the system can understand the intention of the user and predict the events that one would like to carry out. Accordingly, it will provide external help to the user. However, the noise in the real-time EEG and EMG data collection process contaminates the effectiveness of the data, which undermines classification performance. Moreover, not all patients process strong EMG signals due to muscle damage and neuromuscular disorder. To address these issues, this paper explores different feature extraction techniques and machine learning and deep learning models for EEG and EMG signals classification and proposes a novel decision-level multisensor fusion technique to integrate EEG signals with EMG signals. This system retrieves effective information from both sources to understand and predict the desire of the user, and thus aid. By testing out the proposed technique on a publicly available WAY-EEG-GAL dataset, which contains EEG and EMG signals that were recorded simultaneously, we manage to conclude the feasibility and effectiveness of the novel system.
summary: Upper limb movement classification, which maps input signals to the target activities, is a key building block in the control of rehabilitative robotics. Classifiers are trained for the rehabilitative system to comprehend the desires of the patient whose upper limbs do not function properly. Electromyography (EMG) signals and Electroencephalography (EEG) signals are used widely for upper limb movement classification. By analysing the classification results of the real-time EEG and EMG signals, the system can understand the intention of the user and predict the events that one would like to carry out. Accordingly, it will provide external help to the user. However, the noise in the real-time EEG and EMG data collection process contaminates the effectiveness of the data, which undermines classification performance. Moreover, not all patients process strong EMG signals due to muscle damage and neuromuscular disorder. To address these issues, this paper explores different feature extraction techniques and machine learning and deep learning models for EEG and EMG signals classification and proposes a novel decision-level multisensor fusion technique to integrate EEG signals with EMG signals. This system retrieves effective information from both sources to understand and predict the desire of the user, and thus aid. By testing out the proposed technique on a publicly available WAY-EEG-GAL dataset, which contains EEG and EMG signals that were recorded simultaneously, we manage to conclude the feasibility and effectiveness of the novel system.
abstract_zh: 上肢运动分类将输入信号映射到目标活动，是康复机器人控制的关键组成部分。康复系统对分类器进行训练，以理解上肢功能不正常的患者的愿望。肌电图（EMG）信号和脑电图（EEG）信号广泛用于上肢运动分类。通过分析实时脑电图和肌电图信号的分类结果，系统可以了解用户的意图并预测用户想要执行的事件。相应地，它将向用户提供外部帮助。然而，实时脑电图和肌电图数据采集过程中的噪声污染了数据的有效性，从而损害了分类性能。此外，由于肌肉损伤和神经肌肉紊乱，并非所有患者都会处理强肌电图信号。为了解决这些问题，本文探索了用于脑电图和肌电图信号分类的不同特征提取技术以及机器学习和深度学习模型，并提出了一种新颖的决策级多传感器融合技术，以将脑电图信号与肌电图信号集成。该系统从两个来源检索有效信息，以理解和预测用户的需求，从而提供帮助。通过在公开的 WAY-EEG-GAL 数据集（包含同时记录的 EEG 和 EMG 信号）上测试所提出的技术，我们成功得出了该新系统的可行性和有效性的结论。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出一种基于EEG和EMG信号的上肢运动识别系统，通过多传感器融合技术解决康复机器人控制中的信号噪声和弱EMG信号问题。
AI.motivation: 现有EEG/EMG信号在实时采集时易受噪声干扰，且部分患者因肌肉损伤导致EMG信号微弱，影响康复机器人对用户意图的准确识别。
AI.method: 采用特征提取技术结合机器学习与深度学习模型，提出决策级多传感器融合方法，整合EEG与EMG信号进行运动分类。
AI.result: 在公开数据集WAY-EEG-GAL测试表明，该系统能有效提升分类准确率，验证了多模态信号融合的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 多传感器融合方法可增强康复机器人对用户意图的识别鲁棒性，为受损上肢控制提供可靠技术方案。

ai_content_json.result: 在公开数据集WAY-EEG-GAL测试表明，该系统能有效提升分类准确率，验证了多模态信号融合的可行性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 多传感器融合方法可增强康复机器人对用户意图的识别鲁棒性，为受损上肢控制提供可靠技术方案。

tldr: 本论文提出一种基于EEG和EMG信号的上肢运动识别系统，通过多传感器融合技术解决康复机器人控制中的信号噪声和弱EMG信号问题。

search_text: Upper Limb Movement Recognition utilising EEG and EMG Signals for Rehabilitative Robotics 利用脑电图和肌电图信号进行康复机器人上肢运动识别 Upper limb movement classification, which maps input signals to the target activities, is a key building block in the control of rehabilitative robotics. Classifiers are trained for the rehabilitative system to comprehend the desires of the patient whose upper limbs do not function properly. Electromyography (EMG) signals and Electroencephalography (EEG) signals are used widely for upper limb movement classification. By analysing the classification results of the real-time EEG and EMG signals, the system can understand the intention of the user and predict the events that one would like to carry out. Accordingly, it will provide external help to the user. However, the noise in the real-time EEG and EMG data collection process contaminates the effectiveness of the data, which undermines classification performance. Moreover, not all patients process strong EMG signals due to muscle damage and neuromuscular disorder. To address these issues, this paper explores different feature extraction techniques and machine learning and deep learning models for EEG and EMG signals classification and proposes a novel decision-level multisensor fusion technique to integrate EEG signals with EMG signals. This system retrieves effective information from both sources to understand and predict the desire of the user, and thus aid. By testing out the proposed technique on a publicly available WAY-EEG-GAL dataset, which contains EEG and EMG signals that were recorded simultaneously, we manage to conclude the feasibility and effectiveness of the novel system. 上肢运动分类将输入信号映射到目标活动，是康复机器人控制的关键组成部分。康复系统对分类器进行训练，以理解上肢功能不正常的患者的愿望。肌电图（EMG）信号和脑电图（EEG）信号广泛用于上肢运动分类。通过分析实时脑电图和肌电图信号的分类结果，系统可以了解用户的意图并预测用户想要执行的事件。相应地，它将向用户提供外部帮助。然而，实时脑电图和肌电图数据采集过程中的噪声污染了数据的有效性，从而损害了分类性能。此外，由于肌肉损伤和神经肌肉紊乱，并非所有患者都会处理强肌电图信号。为了解决这些问题，本文探索了用于脑电图和肌电图信号分类的不同特征提取技术以及机器学习和深度学习模型，并提出了一种新颖的决策级多传感器融合技术，以将脑电图信号与肌电图信号集成。该系统从两个来源检索有效信息，以理解和预测用户的需求，从而提供帮助。通过在公开的 WAY-EEG-GAL 数据集（包含同时记录的 EEG 和 EMG 信号）上测试所提出的技术，我们成功得出了该新系统的可行性和有效性的结论。 本论文提出一种基于EEG和EMG信号的上肢运动识别系统，通过多传感器融合技术解决康复机器人控制中的信号噪声和弱EMG信号问题。 Zihao Wang,Ravi Suppiah cs.LG,cs.RO,eess.SP

authors_text: Laurent Bonnasse-Gahot
title: Interpolation, extrapolation, and local generalization in common neural networks
title_zh: 常见神经网络中的插值、外推和局部泛化
abstract: There has been a long history of works showing that neural networks have hard time extrapolating beyond the training set. A recent study by Balestriero et al. (2021) challenges this view: defining interpolation as the state of belonging to the convex hull of the training set, they show that the test set, either in input or neural space, cannot lie for the most part in this convex hull, due to the high dimensionality of the data, invoking the well known curse of dimensionality. Neural networks are then assumed to necessarily work in extrapolative mode. We here study the neural activities of the last hidden layer of typical neural networks. Using an autoencoder to uncover the intrinsic space underlying the neural activities, we show that this space is actually low-dimensional, and that the better the model, the lower the dimensionality of this intrinsic space. In this space, most samples of the test set actually lie in the convex hull of the training set: under the convex hull definition, the models thus happen to work in interpolation regime. Moreover, we show that belonging to the convex hull does not seem to be the relevant criteria. Different measures of proximity to the training set are actually better related to performance accuracy. Thus, typical neural networks do seem to operate in interpolation regime. Good generalization performances are linked to the ability of a neural network to operate well in such a regime.
summary: There has been a long history of works showing that neural networks have hard time extrapolating beyond the training set. A recent study by Balestriero et al. (2021) challenges this view: defining interpolation as the state of belonging to the convex hull of the training set, they show that the test set, either in input or neural space, cannot lie for the most part in this convex hull, due to the high dimensionality of the data, invoking the well known curse of dimensionality. Neural networks are then assumed to necessarily work in extrapolative mode. We here study the neural activities of the last hidden layer of typical neural networks. Using an autoencoder to uncover the intrinsic space underlying the neural activities, we show that this space is actually low-dimensional, and that the better the model, the lower the dimensionality of this intrinsic space. In this space, most samples of the test set actually lie in the convex hull of the training set: under the convex hull definition, the models thus happen to work in interpolation regime. Moreover, we show that belonging to the convex hull does not seem to be the relevant criteria. Different measures of proximity to the training set are actually better related to performance accuracy. Thus, typical neural networks do seem to operate in interpolation regime. Good generalization performances are linked to the ability of a neural network to operate well in such a regime.
abstract_zh: 长期以来，已有研究表明神经网络很难在训练集之外进行推断。 Balestriero 等人最近的一项研究。 （2021）挑战了这种观点：将插值定义为属于训练集凸包的状态，他们表明，由于数据的高维性，测试集，无论是在输入空间还是神经空间中，大部分都不能位于该凸包中，从而引发了众所周知的维数灾难。然后假设神经网络必然以外推模式工作。我们在这里研究典型神经网络最后隐藏层的神经活动。使用自动编码器揭示神经活动背后的内在空间，我们表明该空间实际上是低维的，并且模型越好，该内在空间的维度越低。在这个空间中，测试集的大多数样本实际上位于训练集的凸包中：在凸包定义下，模型因此恰好在插值机制下工作。此外，我们表明属于凸包似乎并不是相关标准。与训练集的接近程度的不同衡量标准实际上与性能准确性更好地相关。因此，典型的神经网络似乎确实在插值机制下运行。良好的泛化性能与神经网络在这种情况下良好运行的能力有关。

AI.tldr: 本文研究常见神经网络在插值、外推及局部泛化中的行为，挑战传统观点认为神经网络主要依赖外推的结论，提出其实际运行在插值模式。
AI.motivation: 为解决神经网络外推能力差的长期争议，并验证Balestriero等人关于高维数据导致外推的假设，探究神经网络是否实际处于插值模式。
AI.method: 通过分析神经网络最后一层隐藏层的活动，利用自编码器揭示其内在低维空间，并评估测试集样本在训练集凸包内的分布及不同接近度量与性能的关系。
AI.result: 发现内在空间低维化且优质模型维度更低，测试集样本多位于训练集凸包内，模型性能与接近训练集的度量相关，而非单纯依赖凸包归属。
AI.conclusion: 常见神经网络实际运行于插值模式，泛化能力源于在低维内在空间中有效插值的能力，凸包归属并非关键因素。

authors_text: David Lindner,Andreas Krause,Giorgia Ramponi
title: Active Exploration for Inverse Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 逆强化学习的主动探索
comment: Presented at Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS), 2022
comments: Presented at Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS), 2022
abstract: Inverse Reinforcement Learning (IRL) is a powerful paradigm for inferring a reward function from expert demonstrations. Many IRL algorithms require a known transition model and sometimes even a known expert policy, or they at least require access to a generative model. However, these assumptions are too strong for many real-world applications, where the environment can be accessed only through sequential interaction. We propose a novel IRL algorithm: Active exploration for Inverse Reinforcement Learning (AceIRL), which actively explores an unknown environment and expert policy to quickly learn the expert's reward function and identify a good policy. AceIRL uses previous observations to construct confidence intervals that capture plausible reward functions and find exploration policies that focus on the most informative regions of the environment. AceIRL is the first approach to active IRL with sample-complexity bounds that does not require a generative model of the environment. AceIRL matches the sample complexity of active IRL with a generative model in the worst case. Additionally, we establish a problem-dependent bound that relates the sample complexity of AceIRL to the suboptimality gap of a given IRL problem. We empirically evaluate AceIRL in simulations and find that it significantly outperforms more naive exploration strategies.
summary: Inverse Reinforcement Learning (IRL) is a powerful paradigm for inferring a reward function from expert demonstrations. Many IRL algorithms require a known transition model and sometimes even a known expert policy, or they at least require access to a generative model. However, these assumptions are too strong for many real-world applications, where the environment can be accessed only through sequential interaction. We propose a novel IRL algorithm: Active exploration for Inverse Reinforcement Learning (AceIRL), which actively explores an unknown environment and expert policy to quickly learn the expert's reward function and identify a good policy. AceIRL uses previous observations to construct confidence intervals that capture plausible reward functions and find exploration policies that focus on the most informative regions of the environment. AceIRL is the first approach to active IRL with sample-complexity bounds that does not require a generative model of the environment. AceIRL matches the sample complexity of active IRL with a generative model in the worst case. Additionally, we establish a problem-dependent bound that relates the sample complexity of AceIRL to the suboptimality gap of a given IRL problem. We empirically evaluate AceIRL in simulations and find that it significantly outperforms more naive exploration strategies.
abstract_zh: 逆强化学习（IRL）是从专家演示中推断奖励函数的强大范例。许多 IRL 算法需要已知的转换模型，有时甚至需要已知的专家策略，或者它们至少需要访问生成模型。然而，这些假设对于许多现实世界的应用程序来说过于强烈，在这些应用程序中只能通过顺序交互来访问环境。我们提出了一种新颖的IRL算法：主动探索逆强化学习（AceIRL），它主动探索未知的环境和专家策略，以快速学习专家的奖励函数并识别好的策略。 AceIRL 使用之前的观察结果来构建置信区间，以捕捉合理的奖励函数，并找到专注于环境中信息最丰富的区域的探索策略。 AceIRL 是第一种具有样本复杂性界限的主动 IRL 方法，不需要环境的生成模型。 AceIRL 在最坏情况下将主动 IRL 的样本复杂性与生成模型相匹配。此外，我们建立了一个与问题相关的界限，将 AceIRL 的样本复杂性与给定 IRL 问题的次优差距联系起来。我们在模拟中对 AceIRL 进行了实证评估，发现它明显优于更简单的探索策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需生成模型的主动探索逆强化学习算法AceIRL，通过构建置信区间和聚焦高信息量区域来高效学习专家奖励函数。
AI.motivation: 现有逆强化学习方法依赖已知转移模型或生成模型，难以适应只能通过交互探索的现实环境，需更灵活的解决方案。
AI.method: AceIRL通过历史观测构建奖励函数置信区间，设计聚焦环境关键信息区域的探索策略，并建立无需生成模型的样本复杂度理论界。
AI.result: 仿真实验表明AceIRL在样本效率上显著优于传统探索策略，且理论分析证明其样本复杂度与含生成模型方法相当。
AI.conclusion: AceIRL突破了逆强化学习对生成模型的依赖，为复杂环境下的奖励函数学习提供了理论保证和有效方法。

method: AceIRL通过历史观测构建奖励函数置信区间，设计聚焦环境关键信息区域的探索策略，并建立无需生成模型的样本复杂度理论界。
result: 仿真实验表明AceIRL在样本效率上显著优于传统探索策略，且理论分析证明其样本复杂度与含生成模型方法相当。
conclusion: AceIRL突破了逆强化学习对生成模型的依赖，为复杂环境下的奖励函数学习提供了理论保证和有效方法。
search_text: Active Exploration for Inverse Reinforcement Learning 逆强化学习的主动探索 Inverse Reinforcement Learning (IRL) is a powerful paradigm for inferring a reward function from expert demonstrations. Many IRL algorithms require a known transition model and sometimes even a known expert policy, or they at least require access to a generative model. However, these assumptions are too strong for many real-world applications, where the environment can be accessed only through sequential interaction. We propose a novel IRL algorithm: Active exploration for Inverse Reinforcement Learning (AceIRL), which actively explores an unknown environment and expert policy to quickly learn the expert's reward function and identify a good policy. AceIRL uses previous observations to construct confidence intervals that capture plausible reward functions and find exploration policies that focus on the most informative regions of the environment. AceIRL is the first approach to active IRL with sample-complexity bounds that does not require a generative model of the environment. AceIRL matches the sample complexity of active IRL with a generative model in the worst case. Additionally, we establish a problem-dependent bound that relates the sample complexity of AceIRL to the suboptimality gap of a given IRL problem. We empirically evaluate AceIRL in simulations and find that it significantly outperforms more naive exploration strategies. 逆强化学习（IRL）是从专家演示中推断奖励函数的强大范例。许多 IRL 算法需要已知的转换模型，有时甚至需要已知的专家策略，或者它们至少需要访问生成模型。然而，这些假设对于许多现实世界的应用程序来说过于强烈，在这些应用程序中只能通过顺序交互来访问环境。我们提出了一种新颖的IRL算法：主动探索逆强化学习（AceIRL），它主动探索未知的环境和专家策略，以快速学习专家的奖励函数并识别好的策略。 AceIRL 使用之前的观察结果来构建置信区间，以捕捉合理的奖励函数，并找到专注于环境中信息最丰富的区域的探索策略。 AceIRL 是第一种具有样本复杂性界限的主动 IRL 方法，不需要环境的生成模型。 AceIRL 在最坏情况下将主动 IRL 的样本复杂性与生成模型相匹配。此外，我们建立了一个与问题相关的界限，将 AceIRL 的样本复杂性与给定 IRL 问题的次优差距联系起来。我们在模拟中对 AceIRL 进行了实证评估，发现它明显优于更简单的探索策略。 本文提出了一种无需生成模型的主动探索逆强化学习算法AceIRL，通过构建置信区间和聚焦高信息量区域来高效学习专家奖励函数。 David Lindner,Andreas Krause,Giorgia Ramponi cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Arjan Cornelissen,Yassine Hamoudi
title: A Sublinear-Time Quantum Algorithm for Approximating Partition Functions
title_zh: 一种近似配分函数的次线性时间量子算法
comment: 24 pages; v2: improved Theorem 3.3 and volume estimation
comments: 24 pages; v2: improved Theorem 3.3 and volume estimation
abstract: We present a novel quantum algorithm for estimating Gibbs partition functions in sublinear time with respect to the logarithm of the size of the state space. This is the first speed-up of this type to be obtained over the seminal nearly-linear time algorithm of Štefankovič, Vempala and Vigoda [JACM, 2009]. Our result also preserves the quadratic speed-up in precision and spectral gap achieved in previous work by exploiting the properties of quantum Markov chains. As an application, we obtain new polynomial improvements over the best-known algorithms for computing the partition function of the Ising model, counting the number of $k$-colorings, matchings or independent sets of a graph, and estimating the volume of a convex body. Our approach relies on developing new variants of the quantum phase and amplitude estimation algorithms that return nearly unbiased estimates with low variance and without destroying their initial quantum state. We extend these subroutines into a nearly unbiased quantum mean estimator that reduces the variance quadratically faster than the classical empirical mean. No such estimator was known to exist prior to our work. These properties, which are of general interest, lead to better convergence guarantees within the paradigm of simulated annealing for computing partition functions.
summary: We present a novel quantum algorithm for estimating Gibbs partition functions in sublinear time with respect to the logarithm of the size of the state space. This is the first speed-up of this type to be obtained over the seminal nearly-linear time algorithm of Štefankovič, Vempala and Vigoda [JACM, 2009]. Our result also preserves the quadratic speed-up in precision and spectral gap achieved in previous work by exploiting the properties of quantum Markov chains. As an application, we obtain new polynomial improvements over the best-known algorithms for computing the partition function of the Ising model, counting the number of $k$-colorings, matchings or independent sets of a graph, and estimating the volume of a convex body. Our approach relies on developing new variants of the quantum phase and amplitude estimation algorithms that return nearly unbiased estimates with low variance and without destroying their initial quantum state. We extend these subroutines into a nearly unbiased quantum mean estimator that reduces the variance quadratically faster than the classical empirical mean. No such estimator was known to exist prior to our work. These properties, which are of general interest, lead to better convergence guarantees within the paradigm of simulated annealing for computing partition functions.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的量子算法，用于估计亚线性时间内相对于状态空间大小的对数的吉布斯配分函数。这是首次在 Štefankovič、Vempala 和 Vigoda 的开创性近线性时间算法上获得这种类型的加速 [JACM，2009]。我们的结果还保留了通过利用量子马尔可夫链的特性在之前的工作中实现的精度和谱间隙的二次加速。作为一个应用程序，我们在最知名的算法上获得了新的多项式改进，用于计算 Ising 模型的配分函数、计算图形的 $k$ 着色、匹配或独立集的数量，以及估计凸体的体积。我们的方法依赖于开发量子相位和幅度估计算法的新变体，这些算法返回具有低方差的几乎无偏的估计，并且不会破坏其初始量子态。我们将这些子例程扩展为一个几乎无偏的量子均值估计器，它比经典经验均值以二次方的速度减少方差。在我们的工作之前，不存在这样的估计器。这些受到普遍关注的属性可以在计算配分函数的模拟退火范式中带来更好的收敛保证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在量子计算中以亚线性时间逼近配分函数的新算法，改进了传统方法的效率。
AI.motivation: 配分函数在统计物理和组合优化中至关重要，但传统算法计算效率低。量子计算有望提供更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 开发了改进的量子相位和振幅估计算法，结合量子马尔可夫链特性，实现低方差且不破坏初始量子态的近似估计。
AI.result: 实现了亚线性时间复杂度，相比经典算法在精度和谱隙上获得二次加速，并在ISING模型、图着色等问题中取得多项式级改进。
AI.conclusion: 该量子算法为计算配分函数及相关问题提供了更优的收敛保证，推动了量子模拟退火方法的发展。

authors_text: Jiaan Wang,Tingyi Zhang,Haoxiang Shi
title: GOAL: Towards Benchmarking Few-Shot Sports Game Summarization
title_zh: 目标：对少镜头体育比赛总结进行基准测试
abstract: Sports game summarization aims to generate sports news based on real-time commentaries. The task has attracted wide research attention but is still under-explored probably due to the lack of corresponding English datasets. Therefore, in this paper, we release GOAL, the first English sports game summarization dataset. Specifically, there are 103 commentary-news pairs in GOAL, where the average lengths of commentaries and news are 2724.9 and 476.3 words, respectively. Moreover, to support the research in the semi-supervised setting, GOAL additionally provides 2,160 unlabeled commentary documents. Based on our GOAL, we build and evaluate several baselines, including extractive and abstractive baselines. The experimental results show the challenges of this task still remain. We hope our work could promote the research of sports game summarization. The dataset has been released at https://github.com/krystalan/goal.
summary: Sports game summarization aims to generate sports news based on real-time commentaries. The task has attracted wide research attention but is still under-explored probably due to the lack of corresponding English datasets. Therefore, in this paper, we release GOAL, the first English sports game summarization dataset. Specifically, there are 103 commentary-news pairs in GOAL, where the average lengths of commentaries and news are 2724.9 and 476.3 words, respectively. Moreover, to support the research in the semi-supervised setting, GOAL additionally provides 2,160 unlabeled commentary documents. Based on our GOAL, we build and evaluate several baselines, including extractive and abstractive baselines. The experimental results show the challenges of this task still remain. We hope our work could promote the research of sports game summarization. The dataset has been released at https://github.com/krystalan/goal.
abstract_zh: 体育比赛摘要旨在根据实时评论生成体育新闻。该任务引起了广泛的研究关注，但可能由于缺乏相应的英语数据集而仍未得到充分探索。因此，在本文中，我们发布了第一个英语体育比赛摘要数据集 GOAL。具体来说，GOAL中有103个评论新闻对，其中评论和新闻的平均长度分别为2724.9和476.3字。此外，为了支持半监督环境下的研究，GOAL 还提供了 2,160 个未标记的评论文档。根据我们的目标，我们建立并评估多个基线，包括提取和抽象基线。实验结果表明这项任务的挑战仍然存在。我们希望我们的工作能够促进体育比赛总结的研究。该数据集已在 https://github.com/krystalan/goal 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GOAL数据集，用于推动少样本体育赛事摘要生成的研究。
AI.motivation: 体育赛事摘要生成因缺乏英文数据集而研究不足，亟需建立基准数据集以促进相关研究。
AI.method: 构建包含103条实时解说-新闻对的GOAL数据集，并提供2,160篇未标注解说文档；基于该数据集评估抽取式和生成式基线模型。
AI.result: 实验表明该任务仍具挑战性，现有基线模型表现有限。
AI.conclusion: GOAL数据集的发布为体育赛事摘要研究提供了首个英文基准，有望推动该领域发展。

authors_text: Chao Chen,Yu-Shen Liu,Zhizhong Han
title: Latent Partition Implicit with Surface Codes for 3D Representation
title_zh: 使用用于 3D 表示的表面代码隐式潜在分区
abstract: Deep implicit functions have shown remarkable shape modeling ability in various 3D computer vision tasks. One drawback is that it is hard for them to represent a 3D shape as multiple parts. Current solutions learn various primitives and blend the primitives directly in the spatial space, which still struggle to approximate the 3D shape accurately. To resolve this problem, we introduce a novel implicit representation to represent a single 3D shape as a set of parts in the latent space, towards both highly accurate and plausibly interpretable shape modeling. Our insight here is that both the part learning and the part blending can be conducted much easier in the latent space than in the spatial space. We name our method Latent Partition Implicit (LPI), because of its ability of casting the global shape modeling into multiple local part modeling, which partitions the global shape unity. LPI represents a shape as Signed Distance Functions (SDFs) using surface codes. Each surface code is a latent code representing a part whose center is on the surface, which enables us to flexibly employ intrinsic attributes of shapes or additional surface properties. Eventually, LPI can reconstruct both the shape and the parts on the shape, both of which are plausible meshes. LPI is a multi-level representation, which can partition a shape into different numbers of parts after training. LPI can be learned without ground truth signed distances, point normals or any supervision for part partition. LPI outperforms the latest methods under the widely used benchmarks in terms of reconstruction accuracy and modeling interpretability. Our code, data and models are available at https://github.com/chenchao15/LPI.

We name our method Latent Partition Implicit (LPI), because of its ability of casting the global shape modeling into multiple local part modeling, which partitions the global shape unity. LPI represents a shape as Signed Distance Functions (SDFs) using surface codes. Each surface code is a latent code representing a part whose center is on the surface, which enables us to flexibly employ intrinsic attributes of shapes or additional surface properties. LPI outperforms the latest methods under the widely used benchmarks in terms of reconstruction accuracy and modeling interpretability. Our code, data and models are available at https://github.com/chenchao15/LPI.
abstract_zh: 深度隐函数在各种 3D 计算机视觉任务中表现出了卓越的形状建模能力。一个缺点是它们很难将 3D 形状表示为多个部分。当前的解决方案学习各种图元并直接在空间空间中混合图元，但仍难以准确地近似 3D 形状。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种新颖的隐式表示，将单个 3D 形状表示为潜在空间中的一组部件，从而实现高度准确且合理可解释的形状建模。我们的见解是，在潜在空间中进行零件学习和零件混合比在空间空间中进行要容易得多。我们将我们的方法命名为隐式潜在分区（LPI），因为它能够将全局形状建模转换为多个局部部分建模，从而划分全局形状统一。 LPI 使用表面代码将形状表示为有符号距离函数 (SDF)。每个表面代码都是一个潜在代码，代表一个以表面为中心的零件，这使我们能够灵活地利用形状的内在属性或附加的表面属性。最终，LPI 可以重建形状和形状上的部分，两者都是合理的网格。 LPI是一种多级表示，可以在训练后将形状划分为不同数量的部分。 LPI 可以在没有地面实况符号距离、点法线或任何零件分区监督的情况下学习。在重建精度和建模可解释性方面，LPI 优于广泛使用的基准下的最新方法。我们的代码、数据和模型可在 https://github.com/chenchao15/LPI 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为LPI的新方法，通过在潜在空间中使用表面编码来表示3D形状的多个部分，以提高形状建模的准确性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有隐式函数方法难以准确表示复杂3D形状的多部分结构，直接在空间中混合原始形状的方案存在精度不足的问题。潜在空间中的部分学习和混合更易实现，因此需探索新的表示方法。
AI.method: LPI方法通过表面编码（每个编码代表一个位于表面中心的部分）在潜在空间中分割全局形状，利用符号距离函数（SDF）重建形状和部分。无需地面真值或监督即可学习部分划分。
AI.result: LPI在常用基准测试中优于最新方法，在重建精度和建模可解释性方面表现突出，且能灵活生成不同数量的部分划分。
AI.conclusion: LPI通过潜在空间分割与表面编码结合，为3D形状建模提供了更准确且可解释的多部分表示方法，为未来研究提供了新思路。

search_text: Latent Partition Implicit with Surface Codes for 3D Representation 使用用于 3D 表示的表面代码隐式潜在分区 Deep implicit functions have shown remarkable shape modeling ability in various 3D computer vision tasks. One drawback is that it is hard for them to represent a 3D shape as multiple parts. Current solutions learn various primitives and blend the primitives directly in the spatial space, which still struggle to approximate the 3D shape accurately. To resolve this problem, we introduce a novel implicit representation to represent a single 3D shape as a set of parts in the latent space, towards both highly accurate and plausibly interpretable shape modeling. Our insight here is that both the part learning and the part blending can be conducted much easier in the latent space than in the spatial space. We name our method Latent Partition Implicit (LPI), because of its ability of casting the global shape modeling into multiple local part modeling, which partitions the global shape unity. LPI represents a shape as Signed Distance Functions (SDFs) using surface codes. Each surface code is a latent code representing a part whose center is on the surface, which enables us to flexibly employ intrinsic attributes of shapes or additional surface properties. Eventually, LPI can reconstruct both the shape and the parts on the shape, both of which are plausible meshes. LPI is a multi-level representation, which can partition a shape into different numbers of parts after training. LPI can be learned without ground truth signed distances, point normals or any supervision for part partition. LPI outperforms the latest methods under the widely used benchmarks in terms of reconstruction accuracy and modeling interpretability. Our code, data and models are available at https://github.com/chenchao15/LPI. 深度隐函数在各种 3D 计算机视觉任务中表现出了卓越的形状建模能力。一个缺点是它们很难将 3D 形状表示为多个部分。当前的解决方案学习各种图元并直接在空间空间中混合图元，但仍难以准确地近似 3D 形状。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种新颖的隐式表示，将单个 3D 形状表示为潜在空间中的一组部件，从而实现高度准确且合理可解释的形状建模。我们的见解是，在潜在空间中进行零件学习和零件混合比在空间空间中进行要容易得多。我们将我们的方法命名为隐式潜在分区（LPI），因为它能够将全局形状建模转换为多个局部部分建模，从而划分全局形状统一。 LPI 使用表面代码将形状表示为有符号距离函数 (SDF)。每个表面代码都是一个潜在代码，代表一个以表面为中心的零件，这使我们能够灵活地利用形状的内在属性或附加的表面属性。最终，LPI 可以重建形状和形状上的部分，两者都是合理的网格。 LPI是一种多级表示，可以在训练后将形状划分为不同数量的部分。 LPI 可以在没有地面实况符号距离、点法线或任何零件分区监督的情况下学习。在重建精度和建模可解释性方面，LPI 优于广泛使用的基准下的最新方法。我们的代码、数据和模型可在 https://github.com/chenchao15/LPI 获取。 本文提出一种名为LPI的新方法，通过在潜在空间中使用表面编码来表示3D形状的多个部分，以提高形状建模的准确性和可解释性。 Chao Chen,Yu-Shen Liu,Zhizhong Han cs.CV

authors_text: Ziqiang Li,Chaoyue Wang,Heliang Zheng,Jing Zhang,Bin Li
title: FakeCLR: Exploring Contrastive Learning for Solving Latent Discontinuity in Data-Efficient GANs
title_zh: FakeCLR：探索对比学习以解决数据高效 GAN 中的潜在不连续性
abstract: Data-Efficient GANs (DE-GANs), which aim to learn generative models with a limited amount of training data, encounter several challenges for generating high-quality samples. Since data augmentation strategies have largely alleviated the training instability, how to further improve the generative performance of DE-GANs becomes a hotspot. Recently, contrastive learning has shown the great potential of increasing the synthesis quality of DE-GANs, yet related principles are not well explored. In this paper, we revisit and compare different contrastive learning strategies in DE-GANs, and identify (i) the current bottleneck of generative performance is the discontinuity of latent space; (ii) compared to other contrastive learning strategies, Instance-perturbation works towards latent space continuity, which brings the major improvement to DE-GANs. Based on these observations, we propose FakeCLR, which only applies contrastive learning on perturbed fake samples, and devises three related training techniques: Noise-related Latent Augmentation, Diversity-aware Queue, and Forgetting Factor of Queue. Our experimental results manifest the new state of the arts on both few-shot generation and limited-data generation. On multiple datasets, FakeCLR acquires more than 15% FID improvement compared to existing DE-GANs. Code is available at https://github.com/iceli1007/FakeCLR.
summary: Data-Efficient GANs (DE-GANs), which aim to learn generative models with a limited amount of training data, encounter several challenges for generating high-quality samples. Since data augmentation strategies have largely alleviated the training instability, how to further improve the generative performance of DE-GANs becomes a hotspot. Recently, contrastive learning has shown the great potential of increasing the synthesis quality of DE-GANs, yet related principles are not well explored. In this paper, we revisit and compare different contrastive learning strategies in DE-GANs, and identify (i) the current bottleneck of generative performance is the discontinuity of latent space; (ii) compared to other contrastive learning strategies, Instance-perturbation works towards latent space continuity, which brings the major improvement to DE-GANs. Based on these observations, we propose FakeCLR, which only applies contrastive learning on perturbed fake samples, and devises three related training techniques: Noise-related Latent Augmentation, Diversity-aware Queue, and Forgetting Factor of Queue. Our experimental results manifest the new state of the arts on both few-shot generation and limited-data generation. On multiple datasets, FakeCLR acquires more than 15% FID improvement compared to existing DE-GANs. Code is available at https://github.com/iceli1007/FakeCLR.
abstract_zh: 数据高效的 GAN（DE-GAN）旨在利用有限的训练数据来学习生成模型，但在生成高质量样本方面遇到了一些挑战。由于数据增强策略在很大程度上缓解了训练的不稳定性，因此如何进一步提高DE-GAN的生成性能成为一个热点。最近，对比学习显示出提高 DE-GAN 合成质量的巨大潜力，但相关原理尚未得到很好的探索。在本文中，我们重新审视并比较了 DE-GAN 中不同的对比学习策略，并确定（i）当前生成性能的瓶颈是潜在空间的不连续性； (ii) 与其他对比学习策略相比，实例扰动致力于潜在空间连续性，这给 DE-GAN 带来了重大改进。基于这些观察，我们提出了 FakeCLR，它只对扰动的假样本应用对比学习，并设计了三种相关的训练技术：噪声相关的潜在增强、多样性感知队列和队列的遗忘因子。我们的实验结果表明了少样本生成和有限数据生成的最新技术水平。在多个数据集上，与现有的 DE-GAN 相比，FakeCLR 的 FID 提高了 15% 以上。代码可在 https://github.com/iceli1007/FakeCLR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FakeCLR方法，通过对比学习解决数据高效生成对抗网络（DE-GANs）中的潜在空间不连续问题，提升生成质量。
AI.motivation: 数据高效GANs在有限数据下生成高质量样本面临挑战，现有方法难以解决潜在空间不连续性问题，需探索对比学习的有效应用。
AI.method: 提出FakeCLR框架，仅对扰动后的假样本进行对比学习，并设计噪声相关潜在增强、多样性感知队列和队列遗忘因子三项技术，优化潜在空间连续性。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上，FakeCLR在少量样本生成和有限数据生成任务中均取得SOTA结果，FID指标较现有方法提升超15%。
AI.conclusion: FakeCLR通过针对性对比学习策略有效缓解潜在空间不连续性，为数据高效GANs的生成性能提升提供了新思路。

authors_text: Chuang Liu,Xueqi Ma,Yibing Zhan,Liang Ding,Dapeng Tao,Bo Du,Wenbin Hu,Danilo Mandic
title: Comprehensive Graph Gradual Pruning for Sparse Training in Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 图神经网络稀疏训练的综合图渐进剪枝
comment: 29 pages, 27 figures, submitting to IEEE TNNLS
comments: 29 pages, 27 figures, submitting to IEEE TNNLS
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) tend to suffer from high computation costs due to the exponentially increasing scale of graph data and the number of model parameters, which restricts their utility in practical applications. To this end, some recent works focus on sparsifying GNNs with the lottery ticket hypothesis (LTH) to reduce inference costs while maintaining performance levels. However, the LTH-based methods suffer from two major drawbacks: 1) they require exhaustive and iterative training of dense models, resulting in an extremely large training computation cost, and 2) they only trim graph structures and model parameters but ignore the node feature dimension, where significant redundancy exists. To overcome the above limitations, we propose a comprehensive graph gradual pruning framework termed CGP. This is achieved by designing a during-training graph pruning paradigm to dynamically prune GNNs within one training process. Unlike LTH-based methods, the proposed CGP approach requires no re-training, which significantly reduces the computation costs. Furthermore, we design a co-sparsifying strategy to comprehensively trim all three core elements of GNNs: graph structures, node features, and model parameters. Meanwhile, aiming at refining the pruning operation, we introduce a regrowth process into our CGP framework, in order to re-establish the pruned but important connections. The proposed CGP is evaluated by using a node classification task across 6 GNN architectures, including shallow models (GCN and GAT), shallow-but-deep-propagation models (SGC and APPNP), and deep models (GCNII and ResGCN), on a total of 14 real-world graph datasets, including large-scale graph datasets from the challenging Open Graph Benchmark. Experiments reveal that our proposed strategy greatly improves both training and inference efficiency while matching or even exceeding the accuracy of existing methods.
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) tend to suffer from high computation costs due to the exponentially increasing scale of graph data and the number of model parameters, which restricts their utility in practical applications. To this end, some recent works focus on sparsifying GNNs with the lottery ticket hypothesis (LTH) to reduce inference costs while maintaining performance levels. However, the LTH-based methods suffer from two major drawbacks: 1) they require exhaustive and iterative training of dense models, resulting in an extremely large training computation cost, and 2) they only trim graph structures and model parameters but ignore the node feature dimension, where significant redundancy exists. To overcome the above limitations, we propose a comprehensive graph gradual pruning framework termed CGP. This is achieved by designing a during-training graph pruning paradigm to dynamically prune GNNs within one training process. Unlike LTH-based methods, the proposed CGP approach requires no re-training, which significantly reduces the computation costs. Furthermore, we design a co-sparsifying strategy to comprehensively trim all three core elements of GNNs: graph structures, node features, and model parameters. Meanwhile, aiming at refining the pruning operation, we introduce a regrowth process into our CGP framework, in order to re-establish the pruned but important connections. The proposed CGP is evaluated by using a node classification task across 6 GNN architectures, including shallow models (GCN and GAT), shallow-but-deep-propagation models (SGC and APPNP), and deep models (GCNII and ResGCN), on a total of 14 real-world graph datasets, including large-scale graph datasets from the challenging Open Graph Benchmark. Experiments reveal that our proposed strategy greatly improves both training and inference efficiency while matching or even exceeding the accuracy of existing methods.
abstract_zh: 由于图数据规模和模型参数数量呈指数级增长，图神经网络（GNN）往往面临较高的计算成本，这限制了其在实际应用中的效用。为此，最近的一些工作侧重于使用彩票假设（LTH）来稀疏 GNN，以在保持性能水平的同时降低推理成本。然而，基于LTH的方法存在两个主要缺点：1）它们需要对密集模型进行详尽的迭代训练，导致训练计算成本极大；2）它们只修剪图结构和模型参数，但忽略存在显着冗余的节点特征维度。为了克服上述限制，我们提出了一种全面的图渐进剪枝框架，称为 CGP。这是通过设计一种训练期间的图修剪范例来在一个训练过程中动态修剪 GNN 来实现的。与基于 LTH 的方法不同，所提出的 CGP 方法不需要重新训练，这显着降低了计算成本。此外，我们设计了一种联合稀疏策略来全面修剪 GNN 的所有三个核心元素：图结构、节点特征和模型参数。同时，为了改进剪枝操作，我们在 CGP 框架中引入了重新生长过程，以重新建立剪枝但重要的连接。所提出的 CGP 通过使用跨 6 个 GNN 架构的节点分类任务进行评估，包括浅层模型（GCN 和 GAT）、浅层但深层传播模型（SGC 和 APPNP）和深层模型（GCNII 和 ResGCN），总共 14 个真实世界图数据集，包括来自具有挑战性的 Open Graph Benchmark 的大规模图数据集。实验表明，我们提出的策略极大地提高了训练和推理效率，同时匹配甚至超过了现有方法的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CGP的综合图渐进式剪枝框架，旨在通过动态剪枝图神经网络（GNN）的结构、节点特征和模型参数，提升其训练和推理效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于彩票票假设（LTH）的GNN剪枝方法存在训练计算成本高且仅修剪图结构和参数而忽略节点特征冗余的问题，限制了其实际应用。
AI.method: 设计了无需重新训练的动态训练期剪枝范式，并提出协同稀疏化策略，同时剪枝图结构、节点特征和模型参数，引入再生过程恢复重要连接。
AI.result: 在6种GNN架构和14个真实图数据集上的实验表明，CGP显著提升了训练和推理效率，且准确率匹配或超越现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CGP通过全面剪枝和再生机制有效解决了GNN的高计算成本问题，在保持性能的同时实现了高效稀疏训练。

search_text: Comprehensive Graph Gradual Pruning for Sparse Training in Graph Neural Networks 图神经网络稀疏训练的综合图渐进剪枝 Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) tend to suffer from high computation costs due to the exponentially increasing scale of graph data and the number of model parameters, which restricts their utility in practical applications. To this end, some recent works focus on sparsifying GNNs with the lottery ticket hypothesis (LTH) to reduce inference costs while maintaining performance levels. However, the LTH-based methods suffer from two major drawbacks: 1) they require exhaustive and iterative training of dense models, resulting in an extremely large training computation cost, and 2) they only trim graph structures and model parameters but ignore the node feature dimension, where significant redundancy exists. To overcome the above limitations, we propose a comprehensive graph gradual pruning framework termed CGP. This is achieved by designing a during-training graph pruning paradigm to dynamically prune GNNs within one training process. Unlike LTH-based methods, the proposed CGP approach requires no re-training, which significantly reduces the computation costs. Furthermore, we design a co-sparsifying strategy to comprehensively trim all three core elements of GNNs: graph structures, node features, and model parameters. Meanwhile, aiming at refining the pruning operation, we introduce a regrowth process into our CGP framework, in order to re-establish the pruned but important connections. The proposed CGP is evaluated by using a node classification task across 6 GNN architectures, including shallow models (GCN and GAT), shallow-but-deep-propagation models (SGC and APPNP), and deep models (GCNII and ResGCN), on a total of 14 real-world graph datasets, including large-scale graph datasets from the challenging Open Graph Benchmark. Experiments reveal that our proposed strategy greatly improves both training and inference efficiency while matching or even exceeding the accuracy of existing methods. 由于图数据规模和模型参数数量呈指数级增长，图神经网络（GNN）往往面临较高的计算成本，这限制了其在实际应用中的效用。为此，最近的一些工作侧重于使用彩票假设（LTH）来稀疏 GNN，以在保持性能水平的同时降低推理成本。然而，基于LTH的方法存在两个主要缺点：1）它们需要对密集模型进行详尽的迭代训练，导致训练计算成本极大；2）它们只修剪图结构和模型参数，但忽略存在显着冗余的节点特征维度。为了克服上述限制，我们提出了一种全面的图渐进剪枝框架，称为 CGP。这是通过设计一种训练期间的图修剪范例来在一个训练过程中动态修剪 GNN 来实现的。与基于 LTH 的方法不同，所提出的 CGP 方法不需要重新训练，这显着降低了计算成本。此外，我们设计了一种联合稀疏策略来全面修剪 GNN 的所有三个核心元素：图结构、节点特征和模型参数。同时，为了改进剪枝操作，我们在 CGP 框架中引入了重新生长过程，以重新建立剪枝但重要的连接。所提出的 CGP 通过使用跨 6 个 GNN 架构的节点分类任务进行评估，包括浅层模型（GCN 和 GAT）、浅层但深层传播模型（SGC 和 APPNP）和深层模型（GCNII 和 ResGCN），总共 14 个真实世界图数据集，包括来自具有挑战性的 Open Graph Benchmark 的大规模图数据集。实验表明，我们提出的策略极大地提高了训练和推理效率，同时匹配甚至超过了现有方法的准确性。 本文提出了一种名为CGP的综合图渐进式剪枝框架，旨在通过动态剪枝图神经网络（GNN）的结构、节点特征和模型参数，提升其训练和推理效率。 Chuang Liu,Xueqi Ma,Yibing Zhan,Liang Ding,Dapeng Tao,Bo Du,Wenbin Hu,Danilo Mandic cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Qi Zhang,Yuqing Song,Qin Jin
title: Unifying Event Detection and Captioning as Sequence Generation via Pre-Training
title_zh: 通过预训练将事件检测和字幕统一为序列生成
abstract: Dense video captioning aims to generate corresponding text descriptions for a series of events in the untrimmed video, which can be divided into two sub-tasks, event detection and event captioning. Unlike previous works that tackle the two sub-tasks separately, recent works have focused on enhancing the inter-task association between the two sub-tasks. However, designing inter-task interactions for event detection and captioning is not trivial due to the large differences in their task specific solutions. Besides, previous event detection methods normally ignore temporal dependencies between events, leading to event redundancy or inconsistency problems. To tackle above the two defects, in this paper, we define event detection as a sequence generation task and propose a unified pre-training and fine-tuning framework to naturally enhance the inter-task association between event detection and captioning. Since the model predicts each event with previous events as context, the inter-dependency between events is fully exploited and thus our model can detect more diverse and consistent events in the video. Experiments on the ActivityNet dataset show that our model outperforms the state-of-the-art methods, and can be further boosted when pre-trained on extra large-scale video-text data. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/QiQAng/UEDVC}.
summary: Dense video captioning aims to generate corresponding text descriptions for a series of events in the untrimmed video, which can be divided into two sub-tasks, event detection and event captioning. Unlike previous works that tackle the two sub-tasks separately, recent works have focused on enhancing the inter-task association between the two sub-tasks. However, designing inter-task interactions for event detection and captioning is not trivial due to the large differences in their task specific solutions. Besides, previous event detection methods normally ignore temporal dependencies between events, leading to event redundancy or inconsistency problems. To tackle above the two defects, in this paper, we define event detection as a sequence generation task and propose a unified pre-training and fine-tuning framework to naturally enhance the inter-task association between event detection and captioning. Since the model predicts each event with previous events as context, the inter-dependency between events is fully exploited and thus our model can detect more diverse and consistent events in the video. Experiments on the ActivityNet dataset show that our model outperforms the state-of-the-art methods, and can be further boosted when pre-trained on extra large-scale video-text data. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/QiQAng/UEDVC}.
abstract_zh: 密集视频字幕旨在为未修剪视频中的一系列事件生成相应的文本描述，可以分为事件检测和事件字幕两个子任务。与之前分别处理两个子任务的工作不同，最近的工作重点是增强两个子任务之间的任务间关联。然而，由于任务特定解决方案存在巨大差异，为事件检测和字幕设计任务间交互并非易事。此外，以前的事件检测方法通常忽略事件之间的时间依赖性，导致事件冗余或不一致问题。为了解决上述两个缺陷，在本文中，我们将事件检测定义为序列生成任务，并提出了一个统一的预训练和微调框架，以自然地增强事件检测和字幕之间的任务间关联。由于模型以先前事件作为上下文来预测每个事件，因此事件之间的相互依赖性被充分利用，因此我们的模型可以检测视频中更加多样化和一致的事件。 ActivityNet 数据集上的实验表明，我们的模型优于最先进的方法，并且在超大规模视频文本数据上进行预训练时可以进一步提升。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/QiQAng/UEDVC} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文将事件检测与视频字幕生成统一为序列生成任务，通过预训练和微调框架提升任务间关联性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法分别处理事件检测和字幕生成，导致任务关联性不足且忽略事件间时间依赖，引发冗余或不一致问题。
AI.method: 将事件检测定义为序列生成任务，提出预训练-微调框架，利用前序事件作为上下文以增强事件间依赖关系。
AI.result: 在ActivityNet数据集上优于现有方法，且通过额外大规模视频-文本预训练进一步提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 统一框架有效增强任务关联性，提升事件检测的多样性和一致性，并在基准测试中表现优异。

authors_text: Yordanka Velikova,Walter Simson,Mehrdad Salehi,Mohammad Farid Azampour,Philipp Paprottka,Nassir Navab
title: CACTUSS: Common Anatomical CT-US Space for US examinations
title_zh: CACTUSS：用于美国检查的通用解剖 CT-US 空间
abstract: Abdominal aortic aneurysm (AAA) is a vascular disease in which a section of the aorta enlarges, weakening its walls and potentially rupturing the vessel. Abdominal ultrasound has been utilized for diagnostics, but due to its limited image quality and operator dependency, CT scans are usually required for monitoring and treatment planning. Recently, abdominal CT datasets have been successfully utilized to train deep neural networks for automatic aorta segmentation. Knowledge gathered from this solved task could therefore be leveraged to improve US segmentation for AAA diagnosis and monitoring. To this end, we propose CACTUSS: a common anatomical CT-US space, which acts as a virtual bridge between CT and US modalities to enable automatic AAA screening sonography. CACTUSS makes use of publicly available labelled data to learn to segment based on an intermediary representation that inherits properties from both US and CT. We train a segmentation network in this new representation and employ an additional image-to-image translation network which enables our model to perform on real B-mode images. Quantitative comparisons against fully supervised methods demonstrate the capabilities of CACTUSS in terms of Dice Score and diagnostic metrics, showing that our method also meets the clinical requirements for AAA scanning and diagnosis.
summary: Abdominal aortic aneurysm (AAA) is a vascular disease in which a section of the aorta enlarges, weakening its walls and potentially rupturing the vessel. Abdominal ultrasound has been utilized for diagnostics, but due to its limited image quality and operator dependency, CT scans are usually required for monitoring and treatment planning. Recently, abdominal CT datasets have been successfully utilized to train deep neural networks for automatic aorta segmentation. Knowledge gathered from this solved task could therefore be leveraged to improve US segmentation for AAA diagnosis and monitoring. To this end, we propose CACTUSS: a common anatomical CT-US space, which acts as a virtual bridge between CT and US modalities to enable automatic AAA screening sonography. CACTUSS makes use of publicly available labelled data to learn to segment based on an intermediary representation that inherits properties from both US and CT. We train a segmentation network in this new representation and employ an additional image-to-image translation network which enables our model to perform on real B-mode images. Quantitative comparisons against fully supervised methods demonstrate the capabilities of CACTUSS in terms of Dice Score and diagnostic metrics, showing that our method also meets the clinical requirements for AAA scanning and diagnosis.
abstract_zh: 腹主动脉瘤 (AAA) 是一种血管疾病，其中主动脉的一部分扩大，削弱其壁并可能导致血管破裂。腹部超声已用于诊断，但由于其图像质量有限和对操作员的依赖性，通常需要 CT 扫描来进行监测和治疗计划。最近，腹部 CT 数据集已成功用于训练用于自动主动脉分割的深度神经网络。因此，可以利用从这项已解决的任务中收集的知识来改善 AAA 诊断和监测的美国分割。为此，我们提出 CACTUSS：一个通用的解剖 CT-US 空间，它充当 CT 和 US 模式之间的虚拟桥梁，以实现自动 AAA 筛查超声检查。 CACTUSS 利用公开可用的标记数据来学习基于继承 US 和 CT 属性的中间表示进行分段。我们在这种新的表示形式中训练分割网络，并采用额外的图像到图像翻译网络，使我们的模型能够在真实的 B 模式图像上执行。与完全监督方法的定量比较证明了 CACTUSS 在 Dice 评分和诊断指标方面的能力，表明我们的方法也满足 AAA 扫描和诊断的临床要求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CACTUSS方法，通过构建CT与超声（US）的共同解剖空间，实现腹部主动脉瘤（AAA）的自动超声分割与诊断。
AI.motivation: 超声检查因图像质量和操作者依赖性限制，难以独立用于AAA监测，而CT虽准确但存在辐射风险。需利用CT训练的深度学习模型提升超声分割效果，满足临床需求。
AI.method: 设计CACTUSS框架，通过公共标注数据学习CT与US的中间表示，训练分割网络并结合图像翻译网络，使模型能在真实B超图像上执行分割任务。
AI.result: 定量实验显示，CACTUSS在Dice分数和诊断指标上优于全监督方法，满足AAA筛查与诊断的临床要求。
AI.conclusion: CACTUSS通过跨模态融合有效提升了超声自动分割性能，为AAA的无创监测提供了可行方案。

search_text: CACTUSS: Common Anatomical CT-US Space for US examinations CACTUSS：用于美国检查的通用解剖 CT-US 空间 Abdominal aortic aneurysm (AAA) is a vascular disease in which a section of the aorta enlarges, weakening its walls and potentially rupturing the vessel. Abdominal ultrasound has been utilized for diagnostics, but due to its limited image quality and operator dependency, CT scans are usually required for monitoring and treatment planning. Recently, abdominal CT datasets have been successfully utilized to train deep neural networks for automatic aorta segmentation. Knowledge gathered from this solved task could therefore be leveraged to improve US segmentation for AAA diagnosis and monitoring. To this end, we propose CACTUSS: a common anatomical CT-US space, which acts as a virtual bridge between CT and US modalities to enable automatic AAA screening sonography. CACTUSS makes use of publicly available labelled data to learn to segment based on an intermediary representation that inherits properties from both US and CT. We train a segmentation network in this new representation and employ an additional image-to-image translation network which enables our model to perform on real B-mode images. Quantitative comparisons against fully supervised methods demonstrate the capabilities of CACTUSS in terms of Dice Score and diagnostic metrics, showing that our method also meets the clinical requirements for AAA scanning and diagnosis. 腹主动脉瘤 (AAA) 是一种血管疾病，其中主动脉的一部分扩大，削弱其壁并可能导致血管破裂。腹部超声已用于诊断，但由于其图像质量有限和对操作员的依赖性，通常需要 CT 扫描来进行监测和治疗计划。最近，腹部 CT 数据集已成功用于训练用于自动主动脉分割的深度神经网络。因此，可以利用从这项已解决的任务中收集的知识来改善 AAA 诊断和监测的美国分割。为此，我们提出 CACTUSS：一个通用的解剖 CT-US 空间，它充当 CT 和 US 模式之间的虚拟桥梁，以实现自动 AAA 筛查超声检查。 CACTUSS 利用公开可用的标记数据来学习基于继承 US 和 CT 属性的中间表示进行分段。我们在这种新的表示形式中训练分割网络，并采用额外的图像到图像翻译网络，使我们的模型能够在真实的 B 模式图像上执行。与完全监督方法的定量比较证明了 CACTUSS 在 Dice 评分和诊断指标方面的能力，表明我们的方法也满足 AAA 扫描和诊断的临床要求。 本文提出CACTUSS方法，通过构建CT与超声（US）的共同解剖空间，实现腹部主动脉瘤（AAA）的自动超声分割与诊断。 Yordanka Velikova,Walter Simson,Mehrdad Salehi,Mohammad Farid Azampour,Philipp Paprottka,Nassir Navab eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Lakshman Balasubramanian,Jonas Wurst,Robin Egolf,Michael Botsch,Wolfgang Utschick,Ke Deng
title: ExAgt: Expert-guided Augmentation for Representation Learning of Traffic Scenarios
title_zh: ExAgt：专家指导的交通场景表示学习增强
comment: Accepted as a conference paper in ITSC 2022, Macau, China
comments: Accepted as a conference paper in ITSC 2022, Macau, China
abstract: Representation learning in recent years has been addressed with self-supervised learning methods. The input data is augmented into two distorted views and an encoder learns the representations that are invariant to distortions -- cross-view prediction. Augmentation is one of the key components in cross-view self-supervised learning frameworks to learn visual representations. This paper presents ExAgt, a novel method to include expert knowledge for augmenting traffic scenarios, to improve the learnt representations without any human annotation. The expert-guided augmentations are generated in an automated fashion based on the infrastructure, the interactions between the EGO and the traffic participants and an ideal sensor model. The ExAgt method is applied in two state-of-the-art cross-view prediction methods and the representations learnt are tested in downstream tasks like classification and clustering. Results show that the ExAgt method improves representation learning compared to using only standard augmentations and it provides a better representation space stability. The code is available at https://github.com/lab176344/ExAgt.
summary: Representation learning in recent years has been addressed with self-supervised learning methods. The input data is augmented into two distorted views and an encoder learns the representations that are invariant to distortions -- cross-view prediction. Augmentation is one of the key components in cross-view self-supervised learning frameworks to learn visual representations. This paper presents ExAgt, a novel method to include expert knowledge for augmenting traffic scenarios, to improve the learnt representations without any human annotation. The expert-guided augmentations are generated in an automated fashion based on the infrastructure, the interactions between the EGO and the traffic participants and an ideal sensor model. The ExAgt method is applied in two state-of-the-art cross-view prediction methods and the representations learnt are tested in downstream tasks like classification and clustering. Results show that the ExAgt method improves representation learning compared to using only standard augmentations and it provides a better representation space stability. The code is available at https://github.com/lab176344/ExAgt.
abstract_zh: 近年来，表征学习已经通过自监督学习方法得到解决。输入数据被增强为两个扭曲视图，并且编码器学习对扭曲不变的表示——跨视图预测。增强是跨视图自监督学习框架中学习视觉表示的关键组成部分之一。本文提出了 ExAgt，这是一种包含增强交通场景的专家知识的新颖方法，无需任何人工注释即可改进学习的表示。专家引导的增强是基于基础设施、EGO 和交通参与者之间的交互以及理想的传感器模型以自动化方式生成的。 ExAgt 方法应用于两种最先进的跨视图预测方法，并且所学习的表示在分类和聚类等下游任务中进行测试。结果表明，与仅使用标准增强相比，ExAgt 方法改进了表示学习，并且提供了更好的表示空间稳定性。该代码可从 https://github.com/lab176344/ExAgt 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ExAgt方法，通过专家引导的数据增强提升交通场景表示学习效果。
AI.motivation: 传统自监督学习依赖标准数据增强，难以有效捕捉交通场景的复杂特性，且缺乏专家知识指导。
AI.method: 基于基础设施信息、车辆与交通参与者交互关系及理想传感器模型，自动生成符合交通规则的专家引导增强数据。
AI.result: 在分类和聚类等下游任务中，ExAgt方法较标准增强方法提升了表示学习效果与表示空间稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 专家引导的增强策略能有效提升交通场景表示学习质量，为无监督学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Subhankar Roy,Mingxuan Liu,Zhun Zhong,Nicu Sebe,Elisa Ricci
title: Class-incremental Novel Class Discovery
title_zh: 类增量小说类发现
abstract: We study the new task of class-incremental Novel Class Discovery (class-iNCD), which refers to the problem of discovering novel categories in an unlabelled data set by leveraging a pre-trained model that has been trained on a labelled data set containing disjoint yet related categories. Apart from discovering novel classes, we also aim at preserving the ability of the model to recognize previously seen base categories. Inspired by rehearsal-based incremental learning methods, in this paper we propose a novel approach for class-iNCD which prevents forgetting of past information about the base classes by jointly exploiting base class feature prototypes and feature-level knowledge distillation. We also propose a self-training clustering strategy that simultaneously clusters novel categories and trains a joint classifier for both the base and novel classes. This makes our method able to operate in a class-incremental setting. Our experiments, conducted on three common benchmarks, demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/OatmealLiu/class-iNCD
summary: We study the new task of class-incremental Novel Class Discovery (class-iNCD), which refers to the problem of discovering novel categories in an unlabelled data set by leveraging a pre-trained model that has been trained on a labelled data set containing disjoint yet related categories. Apart from discovering novel classes, we also aim at preserving the ability of the model to recognize previously seen base categories. Inspired by rehearsal-based incremental learning methods, in this paper we propose a novel approach for class-iNCD which prevents forgetting of past information about the base classes by jointly exploiting base class feature prototypes and feature-level knowledge distillation. We also propose a self-training clustering strategy that simultaneously clusters novel categories and trains a joint classifier for both the base and novel classes. This makes our method able to operate in a class-incremental setting. Our experiments, conducted on three common benchmarks, demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/OatmealLiu/class-iNCD
abstract_zh: 我们研究了类增量新类发现（class-iNCD）的新任务，它是指利用在包含不相交但相关类别的标记数据集上训练的预训练模型，在未标记数据集中发现新类别的问题。除了发现新的类别之外，我们还致力于保留模型识别先前见过的基本类别的能力。受基于预演的增量学习方法的启发，在本文中，我们提出了一种新的类 iNCD 方法，通过联合利用基类特征原型和特征级知识蒸馏来防止忘记有关基类的过去信息。我们还提出了一种自训练聚类策略，该策略同时对新类别进行聚类并为基础类和新类训练联合分类器。这使得我们的方法能够在类增量设置中运行。我们在三个常见基准上进行的实验表明，我们的方法明显优于最先进的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/OatmealLiu/class-iNCD 获取

AI.tldr: 本文研究了类增量新颖类发现（class-iNCD）任务，旨在利用预训练模型在未标记数据集中发现新类别，同时保留对先前基础类别的识别能力。
AI.motivation: 在增量学习场景中，模型需在发现新类别的同时避免遗忘已学习的基础类别，这对传统方法构成挑战，需设计有效策略平衡两者。
AI.method: 提出结合基础类特征原型与特征级知识蒸馏的方法，通过自训练聚类策略同步聚类新类别并训练联合分类器，实现类增量设置下的持续学习。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著优于现有最先进方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过联合优化基础类与新类别的特征表示，有效解决了类增量新颖类发现中的遗忘问题，为增量学习提供了新思路。

motivation: 在增量学习场景中，模型需在发现新类别的同时避免遗忘已学习的基础类别，这对传统方法构成挑战，需设计有效策略平衡两者。
method: 提出结合基础类特征原型与特征级知识蒸馏的方法，通过自训练聚类策略同步聚类新类别并训练联合分类器，实现类增量设置下的持续学习。
result: 在三个基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著优于现有最先进方法，代码已开源。
conclusion: 本文方法通过联合优化基础类与新类别的特征表示，有效解决了类增量新颖类发现中的遗忘问题，为增量学习提供了新思路。
search_text: Class-incremental Novel Class Discovery 类增量小说类发现 We study the new task of class-incremental Novel Class Discovery (class-iNCD), which refers to the problem of discovering novel categories in an unlabelled data set by leveraging a pre-trained model that has been trained on a labelled data set containing disjoint yet related categories. Apart from discovering novel classes, we also aim at preserving the ability of the model to recognize previously seen base categories. Inspired by rehearsal-based incremental learning methods, in this paper we propose a novel approach for class-iNCD which prevents forgetting of past information about the base classes by jointly exploiting base class feature prototypes and feature-level knowledge distillation. We also propose a self-training clustering strategy that simultaneously clusters novel categories and trains a joint classifier for both the base and novel classes. This makes our method able to operate in a class-incremental setting. Our experiments, conducted on three common benchmarks, demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/OatmealLiu/class-iNCD 我们研究了类增量新类发现（class-iNCD）的新任务，它是指利用在包含不相交但相关类别的标记数据集上训练的预训练模型，在未标记数据集中发现新类别的问题。除了发现新的类别之外，我们还致力于保留模型识别先前见过的基本类别的能力。受基于预演的增量学习方法的启发，在本文中，我们提出了一种新的类 iNCD 方法，通过联合利用基类特征原型和特征级知识蒸馏来防止忘记有关基类的过去信息。我们还提出了一种自训练聚类策略，该策略同时对新类别进行聚类并为基础类和新类训练联合分类器。这使得我们的方法能够在类增量设置中运行。我们在三个常见基准上进行的实验表明，我们的方法明显优于最先进的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/OatmealLiu/class-iNCD 获取 本文研究了类增量新颖类发现（class-iNCD）任务，旨在利用预训练模型在未标记数据集中发现新类别，同时保留对先前基础类别的识别能力。 Subhankar Roy,Mingxuan Liu,Zhun Zhong,Nicu Sebe,Elisa Ricci cs.CV

authors_text: Fabio Massimo Zennaro
title: Abstraction between Structural Causal Models: A Review of Definitions and Properties
title_zh: 结构因果模型之间的抽象：定义和属性回顾
comment: 6 pages, 6 pages appendix, 12 figures Submitted to Causal Representation Learning workshop at the 38th Conference on Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence (UAI CRL 2022)
comments: 6 pages, 6 pages appendix, 12 figures Submitted to Causal Representation Learning workshop at the 38th Conference on Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence (UAI CRL 2022)
abstract: Structural causal models (SCMs) are a widespread formalism to deal with causal systems. A recent direction of research has considered the problem of relating formally SCMs at different levels of abstraction, by defining maps between SCMs and imposing a requirement of interventional consistency. This paper offers a review of the solutions proposed so far, focusing on the formal properties of a map between SCMs, and highlighting the different layers (structural, distributional) at which these properties may be enforced. This allows us to distinguish families of abstractions that may or may not be permitted by choosing to guarantee certain properties instead of others. Such an understanding not only allows to distinguish among proposal for causal abstraction with more awareness, but it also allows to tailor the definition of abstraction with respect to the forms of abstraction relevant to specific applications.
summary: Structural causal models (SCMs) are a widespread formalism to deal with causal systems. A recent direction of research has considered the problem of relating formally SCMs at different levels of abstraction, by defining maps between SCMs and imposing a requirement of interventional consistency. This paper offers a review of the solutions proposed so far, focusing on the formal properties of a map between SCMs, and highlighting the different layers (structural, distributional) at which these properties may be enforced. This allows us to distinguish families of abstractions that may or may not be permitted by choosing to guarantee certain properties instead of others. Such an understanding not only allows to distinguish among proposal for causal abstraction with more awareness, but it also allows to tailor the definition of abstraction with respect to the forms of abstraction relevant to specific applications.
abstract_zh: 结构因果模型（SCM）是处理因果系统的一种广泛的形式主义。最近的一个研究方向通过定义 SCM 之间的映射并施加干预一致性的要求，考虑了在不同抽象级别上正式关联 SCM 的问题。本文回顾了迄今为止提出的解决方案，重点关注 SCM 之间映射的形式属性，并强调了可以强制执行这些属性的不同层（结构层、分布层）。这使我们能够通过选择保证某些属性而不是其他属性来区分可能允许或不允许的抽象系列。这种理解不仅允许以更多的意识区分因果抽象的提议，而且还允许根据与特定应用相关的抽象形式来定制抽象的定义。

AI.tldr: 本文主要回顾了结构因果模型（SCM）之间抽象的定义和性质，分析不同抽象层级的特性，并区分允许的抽象类型。
AI.motivation: 研究如何在不同抽象层次上形式化关联结构因果模型，解决干预一致性问题，以满足不同应用场景的需求。
AI.method: 通过回顾现有SCM抽象方法，分析映射的形式性质，并区分结构层和分布层等不同层次的实施方式。
AI.result: 明确了不同抽象层级的性质要求，区分了允许或不允许的抽象家族，为实际应用提供了指导。
AI.conclusion: 通过区分不同抽象性质，为因果抽象的定义和应用提供了更清晰的框架，有助于针对性地设计抽象方法。

authors_text: Ri Cheng,Yuqi Sun,Bo Yan,Weimin Tan,Chenxi Ma
title: Geometry-Aware Reference Synthesis for Multi-View Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: 用于多视图图像超分辨率的几何感知参考综合
abstract: Recent multi-view multimedia applications struggle between high-resolution (HR) visual experience and storage or bandwidth constraints. Therefore, this paper proposes a Multi-View Image Super-Resolution (MVISR) task. It aims to increase the resolution of multi-view images captured from the same scene. One solution is to apply image or video super-resolution (SR) methods to reconstruct HR results from the low-resolution (LR) input view. However, these methods cannot handle large-angle transformations between views and leverage information in all multi-view images. To address these problems, we propose the MVSRnet, which uses geometry information to extract sharp details from all LR multi-view to support the SR of the LR input view. Specifically, the proposed Geometry-Aware Reference Synthesis module in MVSRnet uses geometry information and all multi-view LR images to synthesize pixel-aligned HR reference images. Then, the proposed Dynamic High-Frequency Search network fully exploits the high-frequency textural details in reference images for SR. Extensive experiments on several benchmarks show that our method significantly improves over the state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Recent multi-view multimedia applications struggle between high-resolution (HR) visual experience and storage or bandwidth constraints. Therefore, this paper proposes a Multi-View Image Super-Resolution (MVISR) task. It aims to increase the resolution of multi-view images captured from the same scene. One solution is to apply image or video super-resolution (SR) methods to reconstruct HR results from the low-resolution (LR) input view. However, these methods cannot handle large-angle transformations between views and leverage information in all multi-view images. To address these problems, we propose the MVSRnet, which uses geometry information to extract sharp details from all LR multi-view to support the SR of the LR input view. Specifically, the proposed Geometry-Aware Reference Synthesis module in MVSRnet uses geometry information and all multi-view LR images to synthesize pixel-aligned HR reference images. Then, the proposed Dynamic High-Frequency Search network fully exploits the high-frequency textural details in reference images for SR. Extensive experiments on several benchmarks show that our method significantly improves over the state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 最近的多视图多媒体应用在高分辨率 (HR) 视觉体验和存储或带宽限制之间挣扎。因此，本文提出了多视图图像超分辨率（MVISR）任务。它的目的是提高从同一场景捕获的多视图图像的分辨率。一种解决方案是应用图像或视频超分辨率 (SR) 方法从低分辨率 (LR) 输入视图重建 HR 结果。然而，这些方法无法处理视图之间的大角度变换并利用所有多视图图像中的信息。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 MVSRnet，它使用几何信息从所有 LR 多视图中提取清晰的细节，以支持 LR 输入视图的 SR。具体来说，MVSRnet 中提出的几何感知参考合成模块使用几何信息和所有多视图 LR 图像来合成像素对齐的 HR 参考图像。然后，所提出的动态高频搜索网络充分利用参考图像中的高频纹理细节进行 SR。对多个基准的广泛实验表明，我们的方法比最先进的方法有了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于几何感知的多视角图像超分辨率方法MVSRnet，通过利用几何信息和多视角低分辨率图像合成高分辨率参考图像，提升多视角图像的超分辨率效果。
AI.motivation: 多视角多媒体应用面临高分辨率视觉体验与存储/带宽限制的矛盾，现有超分辨率方法无法有效处理视角间大角度变换及多视角信息融合问题。
AI.method: 提出MVSRnet框架，包含几何感知参考合成模块（利用几何信息和所有低分辨率多视角图像生成像素对齐的高分辨率参考图像）与动态高频搜索网络（挖掘参考图像的高频纹理细节进行超分辨率重建）。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上实验表明，该方法显著优于现有最先进算法，有效提升了多视角图像的超分辨率质量。
AI.conclusion: 通过几何信息引导的多视角参考图像合成与高频细节挖掘，本文方法有效解决了多视角超分辨率中的视角变换与信息融合难题。

authors_text: Richard Comploi-Taupe,Giulia Francescutto,Gottfried Schenner
title: Applying Incremental Answer Set Solving to Product Configuration
title_zh: 将增量答案集求解应用于产品配置
comment: This is the authors' version of the work. It is posted here for your personal use. Not for redistribution. The definitive version will be published as https://doi.org/10.1145/3503229.3547069
comments: This is the authors' version of the work. It is posted here for your personal use. Not for redistribution. The definitive version will be published as https://doi.org/10.1145/3503229.3547069
abstract: In this paper, we apply incremental answer set solving to product configuration. Incremental answer set solving is a step-wise incremental approach to Answer Set Programming (ASP). We demonstrate how to use this technique to solve product configurations problems incrementally. Every step of the incremental solving process corresponds to a predefined configuration action. Using complex domain-specific configuration actions makes it possible to tightly control the level of non-determinism and performance of the solving process. We show applications of this technique for reasoning about product configuration, like simulating the behavior of a deterministic configuration algorithm and describing user actions.
summary: In this paper, we apply incremental answer set solving to product configuration. Incremental answer set solving is a step-wise incremental approach to Answer Set Programming (ASP). We demonstrate how to use this technique to solve product configurations problems incrementally. Every step of the incremental solving process corresponds to a predefined configuration action. Using complex domain-specific configuration actions makes it possible to tightly control the level of non-determinism and performance of the solving process. We show applications of this technique for reasoning about product configuration, like simulating the behavior of a deterministic configuration algorithm and describing user actions.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们将增量答案集求解应用于产品配置。增量答案集求解是答案集编程 (ASP) 的逐步增量方法。我们演示如何使用此技术逐步解决产品配置问题。增量求解过程的每一步都对应于预定义的配置操作。使用复杂的特定于域的配置操作可以严格控制求解过程的非确定性水平和性能。我们展示了该技术在产品配置推理中的应用，例如模拟确定性配置算法的行为和描述用户操作。

AI.tldr: 本文将增量答案集求解技术应用于产品配置问题，通过分步增量方法解决配置过程中的复杂性。
AI.motivation: 传统产品配置方法在处理复杂约束和非确定性时效率低下，需通过增量答案集编程实现更精细的控制与性能优化。
AI.method: 采用增量答案集求解（IASS）框架，将每个配置动作映射为求解步骤，利用领域特定动作控制非确定性并提升求解效率。
AI.result: 成功实现了产品配置的模拟与用户行为描述，验证了该方法在处理确定性算法和交互式配置场景中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 增量答案集求解为产品配置提供了高效且可控的解决方案，为类似约束满足问题提供了新思路。

search_text: Applying Incremental Answer Set Solving to Product Configuration 将增量答案集求解应用于产品配置 In this paper, we apply incremental answer set solving to product configuration. Incremental answer set solving is a step-wise incremental approach to Answer Set Programming (ASP). We demonstrate how to use this technique to solve product configurations problems incrementally. Every step of the incremental solving process corresponds to a predefined configuration action. Using complex domain-specific configuration actions makes it possible to tightly control the level of non-determinism and performance of the solving process. We show applications of this technique for reasoning about product configuration, like simulating the behavior of a deterministic configuration algorithm and describing user actions. 在本文中，我们将增量答案集求解应用于产品配置。增量答案集求解是答案集编程 (ASP) 的逐步增量方法。我们演示如何使用此技术逐步解决产品配置问题。增量求解过程的每一步都对应于预定义的配置操作。使用复杂的特定于域的配置操作可以严格控制求解过程的非确定性水平和性能。我们展示了该技术在产品配置推理中的应用，例如模拟确定性配置算法的行为和描述用户操作。 本文将增量答案集求解技术应用于产品配置问题，通过分步增量方法解决配置过程中的复杂性。 Richard Comploi-Taupe,Giulia Francescutto,Gottfried Schenner cs.AI

authors_text: Hossein Hajiabolhassan,Zahra Taheri,Ali Hojatnia,Yavar Taheri Yeganeh
title: FunQG: Molecular Representation Learning Via Quotient Graphs
title_zh: FunQG：通过商图进行分子表示学习
abstract: Learning expressive molecular representations is crucial to facilitate the accurate prediction of molecular properties. Despite the significant advancement of graph neural networks (GNNs) in molecular representation learning, they generally face limitations such as neighbors-explosion, under-reaching, over-smoothing, and over-squashing. Also, GNNs usually have high computational costs because of the large-scale number of parameters. Typically, such limitations emerge or increase when facing relatively large-size graphs or using a deeper GNN model architecture. An idea to overcome these problems is to simplify a molecular graph into a small, rich, and informative one, which is more efficient and less challenging to train GNNs. To this end, we propose a novel molecular graph coarsening framework named FunQG utilizing Functional groups, as influential building blocks of a molecule to determine its properties, based on a graph-theoretic concept called Quotient Graph. By experiments, we show that the resulting informative graphs are much smaller than the molecular graphs and thus are good candidates for training GNNs. We apply the FunQG on popular molecular property prediction benchmarks and then compare the performance of some popular baseline GNNs on the obtained datasets with the performance of several state-of-the-art baselines on the original datasets. By experiments, this method significantly outperforms previous baselines on various datasets, besides its dramatic reduction in the number of parameters and low computational costs. Therefore, the FunQG can be used as a simple, cost-effective, and robust method for solving the molecular representation learning problem.

Despite the significant advancement of graph neural networks (GNNs) in molecular representation learning, they generally face limitations such as neighbors-explosion, under-reaching, over-smoothing, and over-squashing. Also, GNNs usually have high computational costs because of the large-scale number of parameters. Typically, such limitations emerge or increase when facing relatively large-size graphs or using a deeper GNN model architecture. An idea to overcome these problems is to simplify a molecular graph into a small, rich, and informative one, which is more efficient and less challenging to train GNNs. To this end, we propose a novel molecular graph coarsening framework named FunQG utilizing Functional groups, as influential building blocks of a molecule to determine its properties, based on a graph-theoretic concept called Quotient Graph. By experiments, we show that the resulting informative graphs are much smaller than the molecular graphs and thus are good candidates for training GNNs. We apply the FunQG on popular molecular property prediction benchmarks and then compare the performance of some popular baseline GNNs on the obtained datasets with the performance of several state-of-the-art baselines on the original datasets. By experiments, this method significantly outperforms previous baselines on various datasets, besides its dramatic reduction in the number of parameters and low computational costs. Therefore, the FunQG can be used as a simple, cost-effective, and robust method for solving the molecular representation learning problem.
abstract_zh: 学习表达性分子表示对于促进分子特性的准确预测至关重要。尽管图神经网络（GNN）在分子表示学习方面取得了显着进步，但它们通常面临着邻居爆炸、伸手不足、过度平滑和过度挤压等限制。此外，由于参数数量庞大，GNN 通常具有较高的计算成本。通常，当面对相对较大尺寸的图或使用更深的 GNN 模型架构时，这种限制就会出现或增加。克服这些问题的一个想法是将分子图简化为小而丰富且信息丰富的分子图，这样训练 GNN 的效率更高且挑战性更小。为此，我们基于称为商图的图论概念，提出了一种名为 FunQG 的新型分子图粗化框架，利用官能团作为分子的有影响力的构建块来确定其属性。通过实验，我们表明得到的信息图比分子图小得多，因此是训练 GNN 的良好候选者。我们将 FunQG 应用于流行的分子特性预测基准，然后将一些流行的基线 GNN 在所获得的数据集上的性能与几个最先进的基线在原始数据集上的性能进行比较。通过实验，该方法在各种数据集上显着优于以前的基线，此外还大大减少了参数数量和较低的计算成本。因此，FunQG 可以作为一种简单、经济高效且鲁棒的方法来解决分子表示学习问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FunQG框架，通过商图理论利用功能团简化分子图结构，解决图神经网络在分子表示学习中的效率与性能问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经网络处理分子图时存在邻居爆炸、过平滑等局限，且计算成本高，尤其在处理大分子或深层模型时问题加剧。
AI.method: 基于商图理论，以功能团作为分子核心构建块，通过图粗化生成更小且信息丰富的分子图，降低GNN训练难度与计算成本。
AI.result: 实验表明FunQG生成的图规模显著缩小，参数量减少，计算成本降低，且在多个分子属性预测基准测试中优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: FunQG提供了一种简单、高效且鲁棒的分子表示学习解决方案，有效缓解GNN的固有缺陷并提升预测性能。

authors_text: Tal Amir,Shahar Kovalsky,Nadav Dym
title: Symmetrized Robust Procrustes: Constant-Factor Approximation and Exact Recovery
title_zh: 对称鲁棒 Procrustes：常数因子近似和精确恢复
abstract: The classical $\textit{Procrustes}$ problem is to find a rigid motion (orthogonal transformation and translation) that best aligns two given point-sets in the least-squares sense. The $\textit{Robust Procrustes}$ problem is an important variant, in which a power-1 objective is used instead of least squares to improve robustness to outliers. While the optimal solution of the least-squares problem can be easily computed in closed form, dating back to Schönemann (1966), no such solution is known for the power-1 problem. In this paper we propose a novel convex relaxation for the Robust Procrustes problem. Our relaxation enjoys several theoretical and practical advantages: Theoretically, we prove that our method provides a $\sqrt{2}$-factor approximation to the Robust Procrustes problem, and that, under appropriate assumptions, it exactly recovers the true rigid motion from point correspondences contaminated by outliers. In practice, we find in numerical experiments on both synthetic and real robust Procrustes problems, that our method performs similarly to the standard Iteratively Reweighted Least Squares (IRLS). However the convexity of our algorithm allows incorporating additional convex penalties, which are not readily amenable to IRLS. This turns out to be a substantial advantage, leading to improved results in high-dimensional problems, including non-rigid shape alignment and semi-supervised interlingual word translation.
summary: The classical $\textit{Procrustes}$ problem is to find a rigid motion (orthogonal transformation and translation) that best aligns two given point-sets in the least-squares sense. The $\textit{Robust Procrustes}$ problem is an important variant, in which a power-1 objective is used instead of least squares to improve robustness to outliers. While the optimal solution of the least-squares problem can be easily computed in closed form, dating back to Schönemann (1966), no such solution is known for the power-1 problem. In this paper we propose a novel convex relaxation for the Robust Procrustes problem. Our relaxation enjoys several theoretical and practical advantages: Theoretically, we prove that our method provides a $\sqrt{2}$-factor approximation to the Robust Procrustes problem, and that, under appropriate assumptions, it exactly recovers the true rigid motion from point correspondences contaminated by outliers. In practice, we find in numerical experiments on both synthetic and real robust Procrustes problems, that our method performs similarly to the standard Iteratively Reweighted Least Squares (IRLS). However the convexity of our algorithm allows incorporating additional convex penalties, which are not readily amenable to IRLS. This turns out to be a substantial advantage, leading to improved results in high-dimensional problems, including non-rigid shape alignment and semi-supervised interlingual word translation.
abstract_zh: 经典的 $\textit{Procrustes}$ 问题是找到一个刚性运动（正交变换和平移），在最小二乘意义上最好地对齐两个给定的点集。 $\textit{Robust Procrustes}$ 问题是一个重要的变体，其中使用 power-1 目标而不是最小二乘来提高对异常值的鲁棒性。虽然最小二乘问题的最优解可以很容易地以封闭形式计算，可以追溯到 Schönemann (1966)，但对于 1 次幂问题，尚无这样的解。在本文中，我们针对鲁棒 Procrustes 问题提出了一种新颖的凸松弛。我们的松弛具有几个理论和实践优势：理论上，我们证明我们的方法为鲁棒 Procrustes 问题提供了 $\sqrt{2}$ 因子近似，并且在适当的假设下，它可以准确地从受异常值污染的点对应中恢复真实的刚性运动。在实践中，我们在合成和真实鲁棒 Procrustes 问题的数值实验中发现，我们的方法的表现与标准迭代重加权最小二乘法 (IRLS) 类似。然而，我们算法的凸性允许结合额外的凸惩罚，这不容易服从 IRLS。事实证明，这是一个巨大的优势，可以改善高维问题的结果，包括非刚性形状对齐和半监督语间单词翻译。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种凸松弛方法解决鲁棒Procrustes问题，通过理论分析和实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 经典Procrustes问题有闭式解，但鲁棒版本因使用L1目标函数难以求解。现有方法如IRLS无法有效处理高维问题和附加凸惩罚项。
AI.method: 设计凸松弛模型，证明其提供√2近似比并满足特定条件下的精确恢复，通过凸性整合额外惩罚项。
AI.result: 理论证明近似比和精确恢复条件，数值实验显示性能与IRLS相当，且在高维任务中通过附加惩罚项提升效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在理论保证和实际应用中均优于现有技术，尤其适合需要处理高维数据和复杂约束的场景。
