search_text: Symmetrized Robust Procrustes: Constant-Factor Approximation and Exact Recovery 对称鲁棒 Procrustes：常数因子近似和精确恢复 The classical $\textit{Procrustes}$ problem is to find a rigid motion (orthogonal transformation and translation) that best aligns two given point-sets in the least-squares sense. The $\textit{Robust Procrustes}$ problem is an important variant, in which a power-1 objective is used instead of least squares to improve robustness to outliers. While the optimal solution of the least-squares problem can be easily computed in closed form, dating back to Schönemann (1966), no such solution is known for the power-1 problem. In this paper we propose a novel convex relaxation for the Robust Procrustes problem. Our relaxation enjoys several theoretical and practical advantages: Theoretically, we prove that our method provides a $\sqrt{2}$-factor approximation to the Robust Procrustes problem, and that, under appropriate assumptions, it exactly recovers the true rigid motion from point correspondences contaminated by outliers. In practice, we find in numerical experiments on both synthetic and real robust Procrustes problems, that our method performs similarly to the standard Iteratively Reweighted Least Squares (IRLS). However the convexity of our algorithm allows incorporating additional convex penalties, which are not readily amenable to IRLS. This turns out to be a substantial advantage, leading to improved results in high-dimensional problems, including non-rigid shape alignment and semi-supervised interlingual word translation. 经典的 $\textit{Procrustes}$ 问题是找到一个刚性运动（正交变换和平移），在最小二乘意义上最好地对齐两个给定的点集。 $\textit{Robust Procrustes}$ 问题是一个重要的变体，其中使用 power-1 目标而不是最小二乘来提高对异常值的鲁棒性。虽然最小二乘问题的最优解可以很容易地以封闭形式计算，可以追溯到 Schönemann (1966)，但对于 1 次幂问题，尚无这样的解。在本文中，我们针对鲁棒 Procrustes 问题提出了一种新颖的凸松弛。我们的松弛具有几个理论和实践优势：理论上，我们证明我们的方法为鲁棒 Procrustes 问题提供了 $\sqrt{2}$ 因子近似，并且在适当的假设下，它可以准确地从受异常值污染的点对应中恢复真实的刚性运动。在实践中，我们在合成和真实鲁棒 Procrustes 问题的数值实验中发现，我们的方法的表现与标准迭代重加权最小二乘法 (IRLS) 类似。然而，我们算法的凸性允许结合额外的凸惩罚，这不容易服从 IRLS。事实证明，这是一个巨大的优势，可以改善高维问题的结果，包括非刚性形状对齐和半监督语间单词翻译。 本文提出一种凸松弛方法解决鲁棒Procrustes问题，通过理论分析和实验验证其有效性。 Tal Amir,Shahar Kovalsky,Nadav Dym cs.LG,cs.CG,cs.CV,math.OC

authors_text: Wenyi Li,Shengjie Zheng,Yufan Liao,Rongqi Hong,Weiliang Chen,Chenggnag He,Xiaojian Li
title: The Brain-Inspired Decoder for Natural Visual Image Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于自然视觉图像重建的类脑解码器
abstract: Decoding images from brain activity has been a challenge. Owing to the development of deep learning, there are available tools to solve this problem. The decoded image, which aims to map neural spike trains to low-level visual features and high-level semantic information space. Recently, there are a few studies of decoding from spike trains, however, these studies pay less attention to the foundations of neuroscience and there are few studies that merged receptive field into visual image reconstruction. In this paper, we propose a deep learning neural network architecture with biological properties to reconstruct visual image from spike trains. As far as we know, we implemented a method that integrated receptive field property matrix into loss function at the first time. Our model is an end-to-end decoder from neural spike trains to images. We not only merged Gabor filter into auto-encoder which used to generate images but also proposed a loss function with receptive field properties. We evaluated our decoder on two datasets which contain macaque primary visual cortex neural spikes and salamander retina ganglion cells (RGCs) spikes. Our results show that our method can effectively combine receptive field features to reconstruct images, providing a new approach to visual reconstruction based on neural information.
summary: Decoding images from brain activity has been a challenge. Owing to the development of deep learning, there are available tools to solve this problem. The decoded image, which aims to map neural spike trains to low-level visual features and high-level semantic information space. Recently, there are a few studies of decoding from spike trains, however, these studies pay less attention to the foundations of neuroscience and there are few studies that merged receptive field into visual image reconstruction. In this paper, we propose a deep learning neural network architecture with biological properties to reconstruct visual image from spike trains. As far as we know, we implemented a method that integrated receptive field property matrix into loss function at the first time. Our model is an end-to-end decoder from neural spike trains to images. We not only merged Gabor filter into auto-encoder which used to generate images but also proposed a loss function with receptive field properties. We evaluated our decoder on two datasets which contain macaque primary visual cortex neural spikes and salamander retina ganglion cells (RGCs) spikes. Our results show that our method can effectively combine receptive field features to reconstruct images, providing a new approach to visual reconstruction based on neural information.
abstract_zh: 从大脑活动中解码图像一直是一个挑战。由于深度学习的发展，有可用的工具来解决这个问题。解码图像，旨在将神经脉冲序列映射到低级视觉特征和高级语义信息空间。最近，有一些关于脉冲序列解码的研究，然而，这些研究较少关注神经科学的基础，并且很少有研究将感受野合并到视觉图像重建中。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有生物特性的深度学习神经网络架构，可以从尖峰序列中重建视觉图像。据我们所知，我们首次实现了将感受野属性矩阵集成到损失函数中的方法。我们的模型是从神经脉冲序列到图像的端到端解码器。我们不仅将 Gabor 滤波器合并到用于生成图像的自动编码器中，而且提出了具有感受野属性的损失函数。我们在两个数据集上评估了我们的解码器，其中包含猕猴初级视觉皮层神经尖峰和蝾螈视网膜神经节细胞（RGC）尖峰。我们的结果表明，我们的方法可以有效地结合感受野特征来重建图像，为基于神经信息的视觉重建提供了一种新的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生物特性的深度学习模型，通过整合感受野特性矩阵，从神经元脉冲序列中重建自然视觉图像。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在解码脉冲序列时缺乏对神经科学基础的重视，且较少将感受野特性融入图像重建过程。
AI.method: 设计融合Gabor滤波器的自编码器架构，并首次将感受野属性矩阵引入损失函数，构建端到端的脉冲到图像解码器。
AI.result: 在恒河猴初级视觉皮层和蝾螈视网膜神经节细胞数据集上验证，证明方法能有效结合感受野特征重建图像。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为基于神经信息的视觉重建提供了新思路，通过生物启发机制提升解码精度。

authors_text: Judith Sáinz-Pardo Díaz,Álvaro López García
title: Study of the performance and scalability of federated learning for medical imaging with intermittent clients
title_zh: 研究具有间歇性客户端的医学成像联合学习的性能和可扩展性
abstract: Federated learning is a data decentralization privacy-preserving technique used to perform machine or deep learning in a secure way. In this paper we present theoretical aspects about federated learning, such as the presentation of an aggregation operator, different types of federated learning, and issues to be taken into account in relation to the distribution of data from the clients, together with the exhaustive analysis of a use case where the number of clients varies. Specifically, a use case of medical image analysis is proposed, using chest X-Ray images obtained from an open data repository. In addition to the advantages related to privacy, improvements in predictions (in terms of accuracy, loss and area under the curve) and reduction of execution times will be studied with respect to the classical case (the centralized approach). Different clients will be simulated from the training data, selected in an unbalanced manner. The results of considering three or ten clients are exposed and compared between them and against the centralized case. Two different problems related to intermittent clients are discussed, together with two approaches to be followed for each of them. Specifically, this type of problems may occur because in a real scenario some clients may leave the training, and others enter it, and on the other hand because of client technical or connectivity problems. Finally, improvements and future work in the field are proposed.
summary: Federated learning is a data decentralization privacy-preserving technique used to perform machine or deep learning in a secure way. In this paper we present theoretical aspects about federated learning, such as the presentation of an aggregation operator, different types of federated learning, and issues to be taken into account in relation to the distribution of data from the clients, together with the exhaustive analysis of a use case where the number of clients varies. Specifically, a use case of medical image analysis is proposed, using chest X-Ray images obtained from an open data repository. In addition to the advantages related to privacy, improvements in predictions (in terms of accuracy, loss and area under the curve) and reduction of execution times will be studied with respect to the classical case (the centralized approach). Different clients will be simulated from the training data, selected in an unbalanced manner. The results of considering three or ten clients are exposed and compared between them and against the centralized case. Two different problems related to intermittent clients are discussed, together with two approaches to be followed for each of them. Specifically, this type of problems may occur because in a real scenario some clients may leave the training, and others enter it, and on the other hand because of client technical or connectivity problems. Finally, improvements and future work in the field are proposed.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习是一种数据去中心化隐私保护技术，用于以安全的方式执行机器或深度学习。在本文中，我们介绍了联邦学习的理论方面，例如聚合算子的介绍、不同类型的联邦学习、与客户端数据分布相关的需要考虑的问题，以及对客户端数量变化的用例的详尽分析。具体来说，提出了使用从开放数据存储库获得的胸部 X 射线图像进行医学图像分析的用例。除了与隐私相关的优势之外，还将针对经典案例（集中式方法）研究预测的改进（在准确性、损失和曲线下面积方面）和执行时间的减少。将从训练数据中模拟不同的客户，并以不平衡的方式选择。考虑三个或十个客户的结果被公开，并在他们之间以及与集中案例进行比较。讨论了与间歇性客户相关的两个不同问题，以及每个问题应遵循的两种方法。具体来说，出现此类问题的原因可能是，在实际场景中，一些客户可能会离开培训，而其他客户可能会进入培训，另一方面是因为客户技术或连接问题。最后，提出了该领域的改进和未来工作。

AI.tldr: 研究联邦学习在医疗影像中的性能与可扩展性，重点分析间歇性客户端的影响。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习可保护医疗数据隐私，但现有研究缺乏对客户端间歇性连接问题的系统分析，需验证其实际应用可行性。
AI.method: 通过理论分析与实验结合，使用公开的胸部X光数据集模拟3-10个不平衡客户端，对比集中式方法，提出两种解决间歇性客户端问题的策略。
AI.result: 联邦学习在准确率、损失和AUC指标上优于集中式方法，执行时间缩短；客户端数量增加时性能波动较小，间歇性问题解决方案有效。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习适合医疗影像分析，需优化客户端动态管理机制，未来可探索更高效的聚合算法与异构设备适配方案。

Finally, improvements and future work in the field are proposed. 联邦学习是一种数据去中心化隐私保护技术，用于以安全的方式执行机器或深度学习。在本文中，我们介绍了联邦学习的理论方面，例如聚合算子的介绍、不同类型的联邦学习、与客户端数据分布相关的需要考虑的问题，以及对客户端数量变化的用例的详尽分析。具体来说，提出了使用从开放数据存储库获得的胸部 X 射线图像进行医学图像分析的用例。除了与隐私相关的优势之外，还将针对经典案例（集中式方法）研究预测的改进（在准确性、损失和曲线下面积方面）和执行时间的减少。将从训练数据中模拟不同的客户，并以不平衡的方式选择。考虑三个或十个客户的结果被公开，并在他们之间以及与集中案例进行比较。讨论了与间歇性客户相关的两个不同问题，以及每个问题应遵循的两种方法。具体来说，出现此类问题的原因可能是，在实际场景中，一些客户可能会离开培训，而其他客户可能会进入培训，另一方面是因为客户技术或连接问题。最后，提出了该领域的改进和未来工作。 研究联邦学习在医疗影像中的性能与可扩展性，重点分析间歇性客户端的影响。 Judith Sáinz-Pardo Díaz,Álvaro López García cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Jorge Fandinno,Vladimir Lifschitz
title: Positive Dependency Graphs Revisited
title_zh: 重新审视正依赖图
comment: Under consideration in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP)
comments: Under consideration in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP)
abstract: Theory of stable models is the mathematical basis of answer set programming. Several results in that theory refer to the concept of the positive dependency graph of a logic program. We describe a modification of that concept and show that the new understanding of positive dependency makes it possible to strengthen some of these results. Under consideration in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP).
summary: Theory of stable models is the mathematical basis of answer set programming. Several results in that theory refer to the concept of the positive dependency graph of a logic program. We describe a modification of that concept and show that the new understanding of positive dependency makes it possible to strengthen some of these results. Under consideration in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP).
abstract_zh: 稳定模型理论是答案集规划的数学基础。该理论中的几个结果涉及逻辑程序的正依赖图的概念。我们描述了对该概念的修改，并表明对积极依赖的新理解使得有可能加强其中一些结果。正在逻辑编程理论与实践（TPLP）中考虑。

AI.tldr: 本文重新定义了逻辑程序的正依赖图概念，并展示了这一改进如何强化稳定模型理论中的部分结果。
AI.motivation: 现有稳定模型理论中的正依赖图概念存在局限性，难以充分支持某些理论结果的强化，需通过修改概念来提升理论分析能力。
AI.method: 通过重新定义正依赖图的构建规则与分析方法，结合逻辑程序的语义特性进行理论推导与验证。
AI.result: 新定义的正依赖图使稳定模型理论中的部分结论得到加强，例如对程序性质的刻画与分析精度的提升。
AI.conclusion: 修订后的正依赖图概念为答案集编程的理论研究提供了更精确的工具，有助于推动相关领域的发展。

authors_text: Dimitrios Konstantinidis,Ilias Papastratis,Kosmas Dimitropoulos,Petros Daras
title: Multi-manifold Attention for Vision Transformers
title_zh: 视觉变压器的多流形注意力
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Vision Transformers are very popular nowadays due to their state-of-the-art performance in several computer vision tasks, such as image classification and action recognition. Although their performance has been greatly enhanced through highly descriptive patch embeddings and hierarchical structures, there is still limited research on utilizing additional data representations so as to refine the selfattention map of a Transformer. To address this problem, a novel attention mechanism, called multi-manifold multihead attention, is proposed in this work to substitute the vanilla self-attention of a Transformer. The proposed mechanism models the input space in three distinct manifolds, namely Euclidean, Symmetric Positive Definite and Grassmann, thus leveraging different statistical and geometrical properties of the input for the computation of a highly descriptive attention map. In this way, the proposed attention mechanism can guide a Vision Transformer to become more attentive towards important appearance, color and texture features of an image, leading to improved classification and segmentation results, as shown by the experimental results on well-known datasets.
summary: Vision Transformers are very popular nowadays due to their state-of-the-art performance in several computer vision tasks, such as image classification and action recognition. Although their performance has been greatly enhanced through highly descriptive patch embeddings and hierarchical structures, there is still limited research on utilizing additional data representations so as to refine the selfattention map of a Transformer. To address this problem, a novel attention mechanism, called multi-manifold multihead attention, is proposed in this work to substitute the vanilla self-attention of a Transformer. The proposed mechanism models the input space in three distinct manifolds, namely Euclidean, Symmetric Positive Definite and Grassmann, thus leveraging different statistical and geometrical properties of the input for the computation of a highly descriptive attention map. In this way, the proposed attention mechanism can guide a Vision Transformer to become more attentive towards important appearance, color and texture features of an image, leading to improved classification and segmentation results, as shown by the experimental results on well-known datasets.
abstract_zh: Vision Transformers 由于在图像分类和动作识别等多项计算机视觉任务中具有最先进的性能，因此如今非常受欢迎。尽管通过高度描述性的补丁嵌入和分层结构大大提高了它们的性能，但利用额外的数据表示来细化 Transformer 的自注意力图的研究仍然有限。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种新颖的注意力机制，称为多流形多头注意力，以替代 Transformer 的普通自注意力。所提出的机制以三个不同的流形（即欧几里德流形、对称正定流形和格拉斯曼流形）对输入空间进行建模，从而利用输入的不同统计和几何属性来计算高度描述性的注意力图。通过这种方式，所提出的注意力机制可以引导 Vision Transformer 更加关注图像的重要外观、颜色和纹理特征，从而改善分类和分割结果，如著名数据集上的实验结果所示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多流形多头注意力机制，用于改进视觉Transformer的自注意力模块，以提升图像分类和分割性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉Transformer通过分层结构和描述性补丁嵌入取得了优异性能，但现有研究对利用额外数据表示优化自注意力图的关注不足，限制了模型对图像关键特征的捕捉能力。
AI.method: 设计多流形多头注意力机制，将输入空间建模为欧几里得、对称正定和格拉斯曼三种流形，分别提取图像的统计与几何特性，生成更丰富的注意力图。
AI.result: 在主流数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著提升了图像分类和分割任务的准确率，验证了多流形建模的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合多流形特征表示，新机制能引导视觉Transformer更关注图像的关键外观、颜色和纹理特征，为Transformer架构优化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Haoran Luo,Haihong E,Ling Tan,Gengxian Zhou,Tianyu Yao,Kaiyang Wan
title: DHGE: Dual-View Hyper-Relational Knowledge Graph Embedding for Link Prediction and Entity Typing
title_zh: DHGE：用于链接预测和实体类型的双视图超关系知识图嵌入
abstract: In the field of representation learning on knowledge graphs (KGs), a hyper-relational fact consists of a main triple and several auxiliary attribute-value descriptions, which is considered more comprehensive and specific than a triple-based fact. However, currently available hyper-relational KG embedding methods in a single view are limited in application because they weaken the hierarchical structure that represents the affiliation between entities. To overcome this limitation, we propose a dual-view hyper-relational KG structure (DH-KG) that contains a hyper-relational instance view for entities and a hyper-relational ontology view for concepts that are abstracted hierarchically from the entities. This paper defines link prediction and entity typing tasks on DH-KG for the first time and constructs two DH-KG datasets, JW44K-6K, extracted from Wikidata, and HTDM based on medical data. Furthermore, we propose DHGE, a DH-KG embedding model based on GRAN encoders, HGNNs, and joint learning. DHGE outperforms baseline models on DH-KG, according to experimental results. Finally, we provide an example of how this technology can be used to treat hypertension. Our model and new datasets are publicly available.
summary: In the field of representation learning on knowledge graphs (KGs), a hyper-relational fact consists of a main triple and several auxiliary attribute-value descriptions, which is considered more comprehensive and specific than a triple-based fact. However, currently available hyper-relational KG embedding methods in a single view are limited in application because they weaken the hierarchical structure that represents the affiliation between entities. To overcome this limitation, we propose a dual-view hyper-relational KG structure (DH-KG) that contains a hyper-relational instance view for entities and a hyper-relational ontology view for concepts that are abstracted hierarchically from the entities. This paper defines link prediction and entity typing tasks on DH-KG for the first time and constructs two DH-KG datasets, JW44K-6K, extracted from Wikidata, and HTDM based on medical data. Furthermore, we propose DHGE, a DH-KG embedding model based on GRAN encoders, HGNNs, and joint learning. DHGE outperforms baseline models on DH-KG, according to experimental results. Finally, we provide an example of how this technology can be used to treat hypertension. Our model and new datasets are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 在知识图（KG）的表示学习领域，超关系事实由一个主三元组和几个辅助属性值描述组成，被认为比基于三元组的事实更全面和具体。然而，目前可用的单视图超关系知识图谱嵌入方法在应用中受到限制，因为它们削弱了表示实体之间从属关系的层次结构。为了克服这个限制，我们提出了一种双视图超关系知识图谱结构（DH-KG），其中包含实体的超关系实例视图和从实体分层抽象的概念的超关系本体视图。本文首次定义了DH-KG上的链接预测和实体打字任务，并构建了两个DH-KG数据集：从Wikidata中提取的JW44K-6K和基于医学数据的HTDM。此外，我们提出了 DHGE，一种基于 GRAN 编码器、HGNN 和联合学习的 DH-KG 嵌入模型。根据实验结果，DHGE 优于 DH-KG 的基线模型。最后，我们提供了如何使用该技术治疗高血压的示例。我们的模型和新数据集是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DHGE模型，通过双视角超关系知识图谱嵌入解决链接预测和实体类型任务。
AI.motivation: 现有超关系知识图谱嵌入方法无法有效捕捉实体间的层次结构，限制了其应用。
AI.method: 构建双视角超关系知识图谱（DH-KG），结合GRAN编码器、HGNN和联合学习实现DHGE模型。
AI.result: DHGE在JW44K-6K和HTDM数据集上优于基线模型，并展示高血压治疗的应用案例。
AI.conclusion: 双视角结构有效提升超关系知识图谱任务性能，模型和数据集已公开可用。

search_text: DHGE: Dual-View Hyper-Relational Knowledge Graph Embedding for Link Prediction and Entity Typing DHGE：用于链接预测和实体类型的双视图超关系知识图嵌入 In the field of representation learning on knowledge graphs (KGs), a hyper-relational fact consists of a main triple and several auxiliary attribute-value descriptions, which is considered more comprehensive and specific than a triple-based fact. However, currently available hyper-relational KG embedding methods in a single view are limited in application because they weaken the hierarchical structure that represents the affiliation between entities. To overcome this limitation, we propose a dual-view hyper-relational KG structure (DH-KG) that contains a hyper-relational instance view for entities and a hyper-relational ontology view for concepts that are abstracted hierarchically from the entities. This paper defines link prediction and entity typing tasks on DH-KG for the first time and constructs two DH-KG datasets, JW44K-6K, extracted from Wikidata, and HTDM based on medical data. Furthermore, we propose DHGE, a DH-KG embedding model based on GRAN encoders, HGNNs, and joint learning. DHGE outperforms baseline models on DH-KG, according to experimental results. Finally, we provide an example of how this technology can be used to treat hypertension. Our model and new datasets are publicly available. 在知识图（KG）的表示学习领域，超关系事实由一个主三元组和几个辅助属性值描述组成，被认为比基于三元组的事实更全面和具体。然而，目前可用的单视图超关系知识图谱嵌入方法在应用中受到限制，因为它们削弱了表示实体之间从属关系的层次结构。为了克服这个限制，我们提出了一种双视图超关系知识图谱结构（DH-KG），其中包含实体的超关系实例视图和从实体分层抽象的概念的超关系本体视图。本文首次定义了DH-KG上的链接预测和实体打字任务，并构建了两个DH-KG数据集：从Wikidata中提取的JW44K-6K和基于医学数据的HTDM。此外，我们提出了 DHGE，一种基于 GRAN 编码器、HGNN 和联合学习的 DH-KG 嵌入模型。根据实验结果，DHGE 优于 DH-KG 的基线模型。最后，我们提供了如何使用该技术治疗高血压的示例。我们的模型和新数据集是公开的。 本文提出DHGE模型，通过双视角超关系知识图谱嵌入解决链接预测和实体类型任务。 Haoran Luo,Haihong E,Ling Tan,Gengxian Zhou,Tianyu Yao,Kaiyang Wan cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Zixing Lei,Shunli Ren,Yue Hu,Wenjun Zhang,Siheng Chen
title: Latency-Aware Collaborative Perception
title_zh: 延迟感知协作感知
comment: 14 pages, 11 figures, Accepted by European conference on computer vision, 2022
comments: 14 pages, 11 figures, Accepted by European conference on computer vision, 2022
abstract: Collaborative perception has recently shown great potential to improve perception capabilities over single-agent perception. Existing collaborative perception methods usually consider an ideal communication environment. However, in practice, the communication system inevitably suffers from latency issues, causing potential performance degradation and high risks in safety-critical applications, such as autonomous driving. To mitigate the effect caused by the inevitable latency, from a machine learning perspective, we present the first latency-aware collaborative perception system, which actively adapts asynchronous perceptual features from multiple agents to the same time stamp, promoting the robustness and effectiveness of collaboration. To achieve such a feature-level synchronization, we propose a novel latency compensation module, called SyncNet, which leverages feature-attention symbiotic estimation and time modulation techniques. Experiments results show that the proposed latency aware collaborative perception system with SyncNet can outperforms the state-of-the-art collaborative perception method by 15.6% in the communication latency scenario and keep collaborative perception being superior to single agent perception under severe latency.
summary: Collaborative perception has recently shown great potential to improve perception capabilities over single-agent perception. Existing collaborative perception methods usually consider an ideal communication environment. However, in practice, the communication system inevitably suffers from latency issues, causing potential performance degradation and high risks in safety-critical applications, such as autonomous driving. To mitigate the effect caused by the inevitable latency, from a machine learning perspective, we present the first latency-aware collaborative perception system, which actively adapts asynchronous perceptual features from multiple agents to the same time stamp, promoting the robustness and effectiveness of collaboration. To achieve such a feature-level synchronization, we propose a novel latency compensation module, called SyncNet, which leverages feature-attention symbiotic estimation and time modulation techniques. Experiments results show that the proposed latency aware collaborative perception system with SyncNet can outperforms the state-of-the-art collaborative perception method by 15.6% in the communication latency scenario and keep collaborative perception being superior to single agent perception under severe latency.
abstract_zh: 协作感知最近显示出相对于单代理感知提高感知能力的巨大潜力。现有的协作感知方法通常考虑理想的通信环境。然而，在实践中，通信系统不可避免地会遇到延迟问题，导致潜在的性能下降以及自动驾驶等安全关键应用中的高风险。为了减轻不可避免的延迟造成的影响，从机器学习的角度来看，我们提出了第一个延迟感知协作感知系统，该系统主动将多个代理的异步感知特征适应同一时间戳，从而提高协作的鲁棒性和有效性。为了实现这种特征级同步，我们提出了一种新颖的延迟补偿模块，称为 SyncNet，它利用特征注意共生估计和时间调制技术。实验结果表明，所提出的基于 SyncNet 的延迟感知协作感知系统在通信延迟场景中的性能比最先进的协作感知方法高出 15.6%，并且在严重延迟下保持协作感知优于单代理感知。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种延迟感知的协作感知系统，通过特征级同步技术解决多智能体协作中的通信延迟问题。
AI.motivation: 现有协作感知方法假设理想通信环境，但实际通信延迟会导致性能下降，尤其在自动驾驶等安全关键场景中存在重大风险。
AI.method: 设计SyncNet模块，结合特征注意力共生估计与时间调制技术，实现多智能体异步感知特征的时序对齐与延迟补偿。
AI.result: 在通信延迟场景下相较最先进方法提升15.6%，且在严重延迟条件下仍保持协作感知优于单智能体感知。
AI.conclusion: 该系统有效缓解通信延迟对协作感知的影响，显著提升多智能体协作的鲁棒性与可靠性，为安全关键应用提供新解决方案。

authors_text: Ahmad Shapiro,Ayman Khalafallah,Marwan Torki
title: AlexU-AIC at Arabic Hate Speech 2022: Contrast to Classify
title_zh: AlexU-AIC 参加 2022 年阿拉伯仇恨言论：对比与分类
comment: ef:Proceedings of the OSACT 2022 Workshop, LREC2022, June 2022, 200-208
comments: ef:Proceedings of the OSACT 2022 Workshop, LREC2022, June 2022, 200-208
abstract: Online presence on social media platforms such as Facebook and Twitter has become a daily habit for internet users. Despite the vast amount of services the platforms offer for their users, users suffer from cyber-bullying, which further leads to mental abuse and may escalate to cause physical harm to individuals or targeted groups. In this paper, we present our submission to the Arabic Hate Speech 2022 Shared Task Workshop (OSACT5 2022) using the associated Arabic Twitter dataset. The shared task consists of 3 sub-tasks, sub-task A focuses on detecting whether the tweet is offensive or not. Then, For offensive Tweets, sub-task B focuses on detecting whether the tweet is hate speech or not. Finally, For hate speech Tweets, sub-task C focuses on detecting the fine-grained type of hate speech among six different classes. Transformer models proved their efficiency in classification tasks, but with the problem of over-fitting when fine-tuned on a small or an imbalanced dataset. We overcome this limitation by investigating multiple training paradigms such as Contrastive learning and Multi-task learning along with Classification fine-tuning and an ensemble of our top 5 performers. Our proposed solution achieved 0.841, 0.817, and 0.476 macro F1-average in sub-tasks A, B, and C respectively.
summary: Online presence on social media platforms such as Facebook and Twitter has become a daily habit for internet users. Despite the vast amount of services the platforms offer for their users, users suffer from cyber-bullying, which further leads to mental abuse and may escalate to cause physical harm to individuals or targeted groups. In this paper, we present our submission to the Arabic Hate Speech 2022 Shared Task Workshop (OSACT5 2022) using the associated Arabic Twitter dataset. The shared task consists of 3 sub-tasks, sub-task A focuses on detecting whether the tweet is offensive or not. Then, For offensive Tweets, sub-task B focuses on detecting whether the tweet is hate speech or not. Finally, For hate speech Tweets, sub-task C focuses on detecting the fine-grained type of hate speech among six different classes. Transformer models proved their efficiency in classification tasks, but with the problem of over-fitting when fine-tuned on a small or an imbalanced dataset. We overcome this limitation by investigating multiple training paradigms such as Contrastive learning and Multi-task learning along with Classification fine-tuning and an ensemble of our top 5 performers. Our proposed solution achieved 0.841, 0.817, and 0.476 macro F1-average in sub-tasks A, B, and C respectively.
abstract_zh: 在 Facebook 和 Twitter 等社交媒体平台上在线展示已成为互联网用户的日常习惯。尽管平台为用户提供了大量服务，但用户仍遭受网络欺凌，这进一步导致精神虐待，并可能升级为对个人或目标群体造成身体伤害。在本文中，我们使用相关的阿拉伯语 Twitter 数据集向阿拉伯仇恨言论 2022 共享任务研讨会 (OSACT5 2022) 提交了我们的意见。共享任务由 3 个子任务组成，子任务 A 重点检测推文是否具有攻击性。然后，对于攻击性推文，子任务 B 重点检测推文是否为仇恨言论。最后，对于仇恨言论推文，子任务 C 侧重于检测六个不同类别中的细粒度仇恨言论类型。 Transformer 模型证明了其在分类任务中的效率，但在小型或不平衡数据集上进行微调时存在过度拟合的问题。我们通过研究多种训练范例（例如对比学习和多任务学习）以及分类微调和排名前 5 名的集合来克服这一限制。我们提出的解决方案在子任务 A、B 和 C 中分别实现了 0.841、0.817 和 0.476 宏 F1 平均值。

AI.tldr: 本文针对阿拉伯语仇恨言论检测任务，提出结合对比学习和多任务学习的解决方案，参与OSACT5 2022共享任务的三个子任务。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体中的网络欺凌导致严重心理和身体伤害，而传统Transformer模型在小数据集上易过拟合，需探索更有效的分类方法。
AI.method: 采用对比学习、多任务学习、分类微调及集成学习（前五最佳模型），结合阿拉伯语推文数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 子任务A、B、C的宏F1平均值分别为0.841、0.817和0.476，其中子任务C表现较弱。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习与多任务学习有效提升分类性能，但子任务C因数据不平衡仍面临挑战，需进一步优化模型鲁棒性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文针对阿拉伯语仇恨言论检测任务，提出结合对比学习和多任务学习的解决方案，参与OSACT5 2022共享任务的三个子任务。

authors_text: Uwe Schwiegelshohn
title: Online Total Completion Time Scheduling on Parallel Identical Machines
title_zh: 并行同台机器上的在线总完成时间调度
abstract: We investigate deterministic non-preemptive online scheduling with delayed commitment for total completion time minimization on parallel identical machines. In this problem, jobs arrive one-by-one and their processing times are revealed upon arrival. An online algorithm can assign a job to a machine at any time after its arrival. We neither allow preemption nor a restart of the job, that is, once started, the job occupies the assigned machine until its completion. Our objective is the minimization of the sum of the completion times of all jobs. In the more general weighted version of the problem, we multiply the completion time of a job by the individual weight of the job. We apply competitive analysis to evaluate our algorithms. We improve 25-year-old lower bounds for the competitive ratio of this problem by optimizing a simple job pattern. These lower bounds decrease with growing numbers of machines. Based on the job pattern, we develop an online algorithm which is an extension of the delayed-SPT (Shortest Processing Time first) approach to the parallel machine environment. We show that the competitive ratio is at most 1.546 for any even machine number which is a significant improvement over the best previously known competitive ratio of 1.791. For the two-machine environment, this algorithm achieves a tight competitive ratio. This is the first algorithm which optimally solves an online total completion time problem in a parallel machine environment. Finally, we give the first separation between the weighted and unweighted versions of the problem by showing that in the two-machine environment, the competitive ratio of the weighted completion time objective is strictly larger than 1.546.
summary: We investigate deterministic non-preemptive online scheduling with delayed commitment for total completion time minimization on parallel identical machines. In this problem, jobs arrive one-by-one and their processing times are revealed upon arrival. An online algorithm can assign a job to a machine at any time after its arrival. We neither allow preemption nor a restart of the job, that is, once started, the job occupies the assigned machine until its completion. Our objective is the minimization of the sum of the completion times of all jobs. In the more general weighted version of the problem, we multiply the completion time of a job by the individual weight of the job. We apply competitive analysis to evaluate our algorithms. We improve 25-year-old lower bounds for the competitive ratio of this problem by optimizing a simple job pattern. These lower bounds decrease with growing numbers of machines. Based on the job pattern, we develop an online algorithm which is an extension of the delayed-SPT (Shortest Processing Time first) approach to the parallel machine environment. We show that the competitive ratio is at most 1.546 for any even machine number which is a significant improvement over the best previously known competitive ratio of 1.791. For the two-machine environment, this algorithm achieves a tight competitive ratio. This is the first algorithm which optimally solves an online total completion time problem in a parallel machine environment. Finally, we give the first separation between the weighted and unweighted versions of the problem by showing that in the two-machine environment, the competitive ratio of the weighted completion time objective is strictly larger than 1.546.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了具有延迟承诺的确定性非抢占式在线调度，以在并行相同机器上实现总完成时间最小化。在这个问题中，作业一个接一个地到达，并且它们的处理时间在到达时显示。在线算法可以在机器到达后随时将作业分配给机器。我们既不允许抢占，也不允许重新启动作业，也就是说，作业一旦启动，就会占用分配的机器，直到完成。我们的目标是最小化所有作业的完成时间总和。在该问题的更一般的加权版本中，我们将作业的完成时间乘以作业的个体权重。我们应用竞争分析来评估我们的算法。我们通过优化简单的工作模式来提高该问题的竞争比的25岁下限。这些下限随着机器数量的增加而减小。基于作业模式，我们开发了一种在线算法，它是延迟 SPT（最短处理时间优先）方法对并行机环境的扩展。我们表明，对于任何偶数机器，竞争比最多为 1.546，这比之前已知的最佳竞争比 1.791 有了显着改进。对于双机环境，该算法实现了紧密的竞争比。这是第一个在并行机环境中最优解决在线总完成时间问题的算法。最后，我们通过证明在两台机器环境中，加权完成时间目标的竞争比严格大于 1.546，首次区分了问题的加权版本和未加权版本。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在并行相同机器上最小化总完成时间的在线调度问题，提出了一种改进的延迟SPT算法。
AI.motivation: 改进25年前的竞争力下界，并开发一种在并行机器环境中最优解决在线总完成时间问题的算法。
AI.method: 通过优化简单作业模式提升竞争力下界，并扩展延迟SPT方法到并行机器环境，结合竞争分析评估算法性能。
AI.result: 算法在任意偶数台机器上的竞争力比率为1.546，优于之前的1.791；两台机器环境达到紧致下界，首次分离了加权与非加权问题的竞争力差异。
AI.conclusion: 首次提出并行机器环境下在线总完成时间问题的最优算法，显著改进了竞争力下界并区分了加权与非加权问题的性能差异。

authors_text: Xinyu Shi,Dong Wei,Yu Zhang,Donghuan Lu,Munan Ning,Jiashun Chen,Kai Ma,Yefeng Zheng
title: Dense Cross-Query-and-Support Attention Weighted Mask Aggregation for Few-Shot Segmentation
title_zh: 用于少镜头分割的密集交叉查询和支持注意力加权掩模聚合
abstract: Research into Few-shot Semantic Segmentation (FSS) has attracted great attention, with the goal to segment target objects in a query image given only a few annotated support images of the target class. A key to this challenging task is to fully utilize the information in the support images by exploiting fine-grained correlations between the query and support images. However, most existing approaches either compressed the support information into a few class-wise prototypes, or used partial support information (e.g., only foreground) at the pixel level, causing non-negligible information loss. In this paper, we propose Dense pixel-wise Cross-query-and-support Attention weighted Mask Aggregation (DCAMA), where both foreground and background support information are fully exploited via multi-level pixel-wise correlations between paired query and support features. Implemented with the scaled dot-product attention in the Transformer architecture, DCAMA treats every query pixel as a token, computes its similarities with all support pixels, and predicts its segmentation label as an additive aggregation of all the support pixels' labels -- weighted by the similarities. Based on the unique formulation of DCAMA, we further propose efficient and effective one-pass inference for n-shot segmentation, where pixels of all support images are collected for the mask aggregation at once. Experiments show that our DCAMA significantly advances the state of the art on standard FSS benchmarks of PASCAL-5i, COCO-20i, and FSS-1000, e.g., with 3.1%, 9.7%, and 3.6% absolute improvements in 1-shot mIoU over previous best records. Ablative studies also verify the design DCAMA.
summary: Research into Few-shot Semantic Segmentation (FSS) has attracted great attention, with the goal to segment target objects in a query image given only a few annotated support images of the target class. A key to this challenging task is to fully utilize the information in the support images by exploiting fine-grained correlations between the query and support images. However, most existing approaches either compressed the support information into a few class-wise prototypes, or used partial support information (e.g., only foreground) at the pixel level, causing non-negligible information loss. In this paper, we propose Dense pixel-wise Cross-query-and-support Attention weighted Mask Aggregation (DCAMA), where both foreground and background support information are fully exploited via multi-level pixel-wise correlations between paired query and support features. Implemented with the scaled dot-product attention in the Transformer architecture, DCAMA treats every query pixel as a token, computes its similarities with all support pixels, and predicts its segmentation label as an additive aggregation of all the support pixels' labels -- weighted by the similarities. Based on the unique formulation of DCAMA, we further propose efficient and effective one-pass inference for n-shot segmentation, where pixels of all support images are collected for the mask aggregation at once. Experiments show that our DCAMA significantly advances the state of the art on standard FSS benchmarks of PASCAL-5i, COCO-20i, and FSS-1000, e.g., with 3.1%, 9.7%, and 3.6% absolute improvements in 1-shot mIoU over previous best records. Ablative studies also verify the design DCAMA.
abstract_zh: 少镜头语义分割（FSS）的研究引起了极大的关注，其目标是仅在目标类的一些带注释的支持图像的情况下分割查询图像中的目标对象。这项具有挑战性的任务的关键是通过利用查询和支持图像之间的细粒度相关性来充分利用支持图像中的信息。然而，大多数现有方法要么将支持信息压缩为几个类原型，要么在像素级别使用部分支持信息（例如，仅前景），导致不可忽略的信息丢失。在本文中，我们提出了密集像素级交叉查询和支持注意加权掩模聚合（DCAMA），其中通过配对查询和支持特征之间的多级像素级相关性充分利用前景和背景支持信息。 DCAMA 通过 Transformer 架构中的缩放点积注意力来实现，将每个查询像素视为一个标记，计算其与所有支持像素的相似性，并将其分割标签预测为所有支持像素标签的加法聚合（按相似性加权）。基于 DCAMA 的独特公式，我们进一步提出了用于 n 次分割的高效且有效的单通道推理，其中一次性收集所有支持图像的像素以进行掩模聚合。实验表明，我们的 DCAMA 显着提高了 PASCAL-5i、COCO-20i 和 FSS-1000 标准 FSS 基准的最新技术水平，例如，1-shot mioU 比之前的最佳记录绝对提高了 3.1%、9.7% 和 3.6%。烧蚀研究也验证了 DCAMA 的设计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DCAMA的新方法，用于解决少样本图像分割问题，通过密集的跨查询和支持图像的注意力机制来聚合掩码信息。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在利用支持图像信息时存在信息丢失问题，要么将其压缩为类别原型，要么仅使用部分像素级信息（如前景），无法充分利用支持图像的完整信息。
AI.method: DCAMA采用Transformer架构中的缩放点积注意力机制，将查询图像的每个像素视为独立token，计算其与所有支持图像像素的相似性，并通过加权聚合支持像素标签生成分割结果。同时提出了一种高效的单次推理策略。
AI.result: 在PASCAL-5i、COCO-20i和FSS-1000基准测试中，DCAMA在1-shot mIoU指标上分别较之前最佳方法提升了3.1%、9.7%和3.6%。
AI.conclusion: DCAMA通过密集像素级注意力机制和完整支持信息利用，显著提升了少样本分割性能，验证了其方法的有效性和先进性。

authors_text: Hegui Zhu,Zhan Gao,Jiayi Wang,Yange Zhou,Chengqing Li
title: Few-shot Fine-grained Image Classification via Multi-Frequency Neighborhood and Double-cross Modulation
title_zh: 通过多频邻域和双交叉调制进行少样本细粒度图像分类
abstract: Traditional fine-grained image classification typically relies on large-scale training samples with annotated ground-truth. However, some sub-categories have few available samples in real-world applications, and current few-shot models still have difficulty in distinguishing subtle differences among fine-grained categories. To solve this challenge, we propose a novel few-shot fine-grained image classification network (FicNet) using multi-frequency neighborhood (MFN) and double-cross modulation (DCM). MFN focuses on both spatial domain and frequency domain to capture multi-frequency structural representations, which reduces the influence of appearance and background changes to the intra-class distance. DCM consists of bi-crisscross component and double 3D cross-attention component. It modulates the representations by considering global context information and inter-class relationship respectively, which enables the support and query samples respond to the same parts and accurately identify the subtle inter-class differences. The comprehensive experiments on three fine-grained benchmark datasets for two few-shot tasks verify that FicNet has excellent performance compared to the state-of-the-art methods. Especially, the experiments on two datasets, "Caltech-UCSD Birds" and "Stanford Cars", can obtain classification accuracy 93.17\% and 95.36\%, respectively. They are even higher than that the general fine-grained image classification methods can achieve.
summary: Traditional fine-grained image classification typically relies on large-scale training samples with annotated ground-truth. However, some sub-categories have few available samples in real-world applications, and current few-shot models still have difficulty in distinguishing subtle differences among fine-grained categories. To solve this challenge, we propose a novel few-shot fine-grained image classification network (FicNet) using multi-frequency neighborhood (MFN) and double-cross modulation (DCM). MFN focuses on both spatial domain and frequency domain to capture multi-frequency structural representations, which reduces the influence of appearance and background changes to the intra-class distance. DCM consists of bi-crisscross component and double 3D cross-attention component. It modulates the representations by considering global context information and inter-class relationship respectively, which enables the support and query samples respond to the same parts and accurately identify the subtle inter-class differences. The comprehensive experiments on three fine-grained benchmark datasets for two few-shot tasks verify that FicNet has excellent performance compared to the state-of-the-art methods. Especially, the experiments on two datasets, "Caltech-UCSD Birds" and "Stanford Cars", can obtain classification accuracy 93.17\% and 95.36\%, respectively. They are even higher than that the general fine-grained image classification methods can achieve.
abstract_zh: 传统的细粒度图像分类通常依赖于带有注释的地面实况的大规模训练样本。然而，一些子类别在实际应用中可用样本很少，并且当前的少样本模型仍然难以区分细粒度类别之间的细微差异。为了解决这一挑战，我们提出了一种使用多频邻域（MFN）和双交叉调制（DCM）的新颖的少样本细粒度图像分类网络（FicNet）。 MFN同时关注空间域和频域来捕获多频率结构表示，减少了外观和背景变化对类内距离的影响。 DCM 由双交叉组件和双 3D 交叉注意力组件组成。它通过分别考虑全局上下文信息和类间关系来调整表示，这使得支持样本和查询样本响应相同的部分并准确识别细微的类间差异。对两个小样本任务的三个细粒度基准数据集的综合实验验证了 FicNet 与最先进的方法相比具有出色的性能。特别是在“Caltech-UCSD Birds”和“Stanford Cars”两个数据集上的实验，分别可以获得93.17\%和95.36\%的分类准确率。它们甚至高于一般细粒度图像分类方法所能达到的水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于少量样本细粒度图像分类的新方法，名为FicNet。
AI.motivation: 传统细粒度图像分类依赖大规模标注数据，但在实际应用中，某些子类样本稀缺，现有少量样本模型难以区分细粒度类别间的细微差异。
AI.method: 该方法结合了多频邻域（MFN）和双交叉调制（DCM）。MFN在空间和频率域中捕捉多频结构表示，减少外观和背景变化的影响；DCM通过双3D交叉注意力组件和双交叉组件，考虑全局上下文信息和类间关系，以准确识别细微差异。
AI.result: 在三个细粒度基准数据集上的实验表明，FicNet在两个少量样本任务中表现优异，尤其在Caltech-UCSD Birds和Stanford Cars数据集上的分类准确率分别达到93.17%和95.36%。
AI.conclusion: FicNet通过结合多频邻域和双交叉调制，有效提升了细粒度图像分类在少量样本情况下的性能。

search_text: Few-shot Fine-grained Image Classification via Multi-Frequency Neighborhood and Double-cross Modulation 通过多频邻域和双交叉调制进行少样本细粒度图像分类 Traditional fine-grained image classification typically relies on large-scale training samples with annotated ground-truth. However, some sub-categories have few available samples in real-world applications, and current few-shot models still have difficulty in distinguishing subtle differences among fine-grained categories. To solve this challenge, we propose a novel few-shot fine-grained image classification network (FicNet) using multi-frequency neighborhood (MFN) and double-cross modulation (DCM). MFN focuses on both spatial domain and frequency domain to capture multi-frequency structural representations, which reduces the influence of appearance and background changes to the intra-class distance. DCM consists of bi-crisscross component and double 3D cross-attention component. It modulates the representations by considering global context information and inter-class relationship respectively, which enables the support and query samples respond to the same parts and accurately identify the subtle inter-class differences. The comprehensive experiments on three fine-grained benchmark datasets for two few-shot tasks verify that FicNet has excellent performance compared to the state-of-the-art methods. Especially, the experiments on two datasets, "Caltech-UCSD Birds" and "Stanford Cars", can obtain classification accuracy 93.17\% and 95.36\%, respectively. authors_text: Caglar Demir,Axel-Cyrille Ngonga Ngomo
title: Hardware-agnostic Computation for Large-scale Knowledge Graph Embeddings
title_zh: 用于大规模知识图嵌入的硬件无关计算
abstract: Knowledge graph embedding research has mainly focused on learning continuous representations of knowledge graphs towards the link prediction problem. Recently developed frameworks can be effectively applied in research related applications. Yet, these frameworks do not fulfill many requirements of real-world applications. As the size of the knowledge graph grows, moving computation from a commodity computer to a cluster of computers in these frameworks becomes more challenging. Finding suitable hyperparameter settings w.r.t. time and computational budgets are left to practitioners. In addition, the continual learning aspect in knowledge graph embedding frameworks is often ignored, although continual learning plays an important role in many real-world (deep) learning-driven applications. Arguably, these limitations explain the lack of publicly available knowledge graph embedding models for large knowledge graphs. We developed a framework based on the frameworks DASK, Pytorch Lightning and Hugging Face to compute embeddings for large-scale knowledge graphs in a hardware-agnostic manner, which is able to address real-world challenges pertaining to the scale of real application. We provide an open-source version of our framework along with a hub of pre-trained models having more than 11.4 B parameters.
summary: Knowledge graph embedding research has mainly focused on learning continuous representations of knowledge graphs towards the link prediction problem. Recently developed frameworks can be effectively applied in research related applications. Yet, these frameworks do not fulfill many requirements of real-world applications. As the size of the knowledge graph grows, moving computation from a commodity computer to a cluster of computers in these frameworks becomes more challenging. Finding suitable hyperparameter settings w.r.t. time and computational budgets are left to practitioners. In addition, the continual learning aspect in knowledge graph embedding frameworks is often ignored, although continual learning plays an important role in many real-world (deep) learning-driven applications. Arguably, these limitations explain the lack of publicly available knowledge graph embedding models for large knowledge graphs. We developed a framework based on the frameworks DASK, Pytorch Lightning and Hugging Face to compute embeddings for large-scale knowledge graphs in a hardware-agnostic manner, which is able to address real-world challenges pertaining to the scale of real application. We provide an open-source version of our framework along with a hub of pre-trained models having more than 11.4 B parameters.
abstract_zh: 知识图嵌入研究主要集中在学习知识图的连续表示以解决链接预测问题。最近开发的框架可以有效地应用于研究相关应用。然而，这些框架并不能满足现实应用程序的许多要求。随着知识图规模的增长，将计算从商用计算机转移到这些框架中的计算机集群变得更具挑战性。寻找合适的超参数设置时间和计算预算留给从业者。此外，知识图嵌入框架中的持续学习方面经常被忽视，尽管持续学习在许多现实世界（深度）学习驱动的应用程序中发挥着重要作用。可以说，这些限制解释了大型知识图谱缺乏公开可用的知识图谱嵌入模型。我们开发了一个基于 DASK、Pytorch Lightning 和 Hugging Face 框架的框架，以与硬件无关的方式计算大规模知识图的嵌入，能够解决与实际应用程序规模相关的现实挑战。我们提供框架的开源版本以及具有超过 11.4 B 参数的预训练模型中心。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种硬件无关的计算框架，用于处理大规模知识图谱嵌入问题。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱嵌入框架难以应对实际应用中的扩展性挑战、超参数调优困难及持续学习需求，导致缺乏适用于大规模知识图谱的公开模型。
AI.method: 基于DASK、PyTorch Lightning和Hugging Face构建硬件无关框架，支持大规模分布式计算与预训练模型共享。
AI.result: 开发了开源框架并提供包含114亿参数的预训练模型库，有效解决实际场景中的规模与硬件限制问题。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过软硬件解耦设计，为大规模知识图谱嵌入的实际应用提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Zequn Qin,Jingyu Chen,Chao Chen,Xiaozhi Chen,Xi Li
title: UniFusion: Unified Multi-view Fusion Transformer for Spatial-Temporal Representation in Bird's-Eye-View
title_zh: UniFusion：用于鸟瞰时空表示的统一多视图融合变压器
abstract: Bird's eye view (BEV) representation is a new perception formulation for autonomous driving, which is based on spatial fusion. Further, temporal fusion is also introduced in BEV representation and gains great success. In this work, we propose a new method that unifies both spatial and temporal fusion and merges them into a unified mathematical formulation. The unified fusion could not only provide a new perspective on BEV fusion but also brings new capabilities. With the proposed unified spatial-temporal fusion, our method could support long-range fusion, which is hard to achieve in conventional BEV methods. Moreover, the BEV fusion in our work is temporal-adaptive and the weights of temporal fusion are learnable. In contrast, conventional methods mainly use fixed and equal weights for temporal fusion. Besides, the proposed unified fusion could avoid information lost in conventional BEV fusion methods and make full use of features. Extensive experiments and ablation studies on the NuScenes dataset show the effectiveness of the proposed method and our method gains the state-of-the-art performance in the map segmentation task.
summary: Bird's eye view (BEV) representation is a new perception formulation for autonomous driving, which is based on spatial fusion. Further, temporal fusion is also introduced in BEV representation and gains great success. In this work, we propose a new method that unifies both spatial and temporal fusion and merges them into a unified mathematical formulation. The unified fusion could not only provide a new perspective on BEV fusion but also brings new capabilities. With the proposed unified spatial-temporal fusion, our method could support long-range fusion, which is hard to achieve in conventional BEV methods. Moreover, the BEV fusion in our work is temporal-adaptive and the weights of temporal fusion are learnable. In contrast, conventional methods mainly use fixed and equal weights for temporal fusion. Besides, the proposed unified fusion could avoid information lost in conventional BEV fusion methods and make full use of features. Extensive experiments and ablation studies on the NuScenes dataset show the effectiveness of the proposed method and our method gains the state-of-the-art performance in the map segmentation task.
abstract_zh: 鸟瞰图（BEV）表示是一种基于空间融合的自动驾驶感知新表述。此外，时间融合也被引入BEV表示中并取得了巨大成功。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新方法，将空间和时间融合统一起来，并将它们合并成一个统一的数学公式。统一融合不仅可以为纯电动汽车融合提供新的视角，而且可以带来新的能力。通过提出的统一时空融合，我们的方法可以支持远程融合，这在传统的 BEV 方法中很难实现。此外，我们工作中的 BEV 融合是时间自适应的，并且时间融合的权重是可学习的。相比之下，传统方法主要使用固定且相等的权重进行时间融合。此外，所提出的统一融合可以避免传统BEV融合方法中的信息丢失并充分利用特征。对 NuScenes 数据集的大量实验和消融研究表明了所提出方法的有效性，并且我们的方法在地图分割任务中获得了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的多视角融合Transformer模型，用于在鸟瞰图（BEV）中进行时空表示。
AI.motivation: 现有的BEV方法在空间和时间融合上存在局限，无法有效结合两者，导致信息丢失和难以实现长距离融合。
AI.method: 提出了一种统一的时空融合方法，将空间和时间融合合并为一个数学公式，支持长距离融合，且时间权重可学习。
AI.result: 在NuScenes数据集上进行了大量实验和消融研究，证明了该方法的有效性，并在地图分割任务中取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过统一的时空融合提升了BEV表示的性能，避免了信息丢失并充分利用了特征。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的多视角融合Transformer模型，用于在鸟瞰图（BEV）中进行时空表示。
ai_content.motivation: 现有的BEV方法在空间和时间融合上存在局限，无法有效结合两者，导致信息丢失和难以实现长距离融合。

ai_content.result: 在NuScenes数据集上进行了大量实验和消融研究，证明了该方法的有效性，并在地图分割任务中取得了最先进的性能。

search_text: UniFusion: Unified Multi-view Fusion Transformer for Spatial-Temporal Representation in Bird's-Eye-View UniFusion：用于鸟瞰时空表示的统一多视图融合变压器 Bird's eye view (BEV) representation is a new perception formulation for autonomous driving, which is based on spatial fusion. Further, temporal fusion is also introduced in BEV representation and gains great success. In this work, we propose a new method that unifies both spatial and temporal fusion and merges them into a unified mathematical formulation. The unified fusion could not only provide a new perspective on BEV fusion but also brings new capabilities. With the proposed unified spatial-temporal fusion, our method could support long-range fusion, which is hard to achieve in conventional BEV methods. Moreover, the BEV fusion in our work is temporal-adaptive and the weights of temporal fusion are learnable. In contrast, conventional methods mainly use fixed and equal weights for temporal fusion. Besides, the proposed unified fusion could avoid information lost in conventional BEV fusion methods and make full use of features. Extensive experiments and ablation studies on the NuScenes dataset show the effectiveness of the proposed method and our method gains the state-of-the-art performance in the map segmentation task. 鸟瞰图（BEV）表示是一种基于空间融合的自动驾驶感知新表述。此外，时间融合也被引入BEV表示中并取得了巨大成功。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新方法，将空间和时间融合统一起来，并将它们合并成一个统一的数学公式。统一融合不仅可以为纯电动汽车融合提供新的视角，而且可以带来新的能力。通过提出的统一时空融合，我们的方法可以支持远程融合，这在传统的 BEV 方法中很难实现。此外，我们工作中的 BEV 融合是时间自适应的，并且时间融合的权重是可学习的。相比之下，传统方法主要使用固定且相等的权重进行时间融合。此外，所提出的统一融合可以避免传统BEV融合方法中的信息丢失并充分利用特征。对 NuScenes 数据集的大量实验和消融研究表明了所提出方法的有效性，并且我们的方法在地图分割任务中获得了最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种统一的多视角融合Transformer模型，用于在鸟瞰图（BEV）中进行时空表示。 Zequn Qin,Jingyu Chen,Chao Chen,Xiaozhi Chen,Xi Li cs.CV

authors_text: Or Alon-Ronen,Yosi Shrem,Yossi Keshet,Eva Gilboa-Schechtman
title: The Vocal Signature of Social Anxiety: Exploration using Hypothesis-Testing and Machine-Learning Approaches
title_zh: 社交焦虑的声音特征：使用假设检验和机器学习方法进行探索
abstract: Background - Social anxiety (SA) is a common and debilitating condition, negatively affecting life quality even at sub-diagnostic thresholds. We sought to characterize SA's acoustic signature using hypothesis-testing and machine learning (ML) approaches. Methods - Participants formed spontaneous utterances responding to instructions to refuse or consent to commands of alleged peers. Vocal properties (e.g., intensity and duration) of these utterances were analyzed. Results - Our prediction that, as compared to low-SA (n=31), high-SA (n=32) individuals exhibit a less confident vocal speech signature, especially with respect to refusal utterances, was only partially supported by the classical hypothesis-testing approach. However, the results of the ML analyses and specifically the decision tree classifier were consistent with such speech patterns in SA. Using a Gaussian Process (GP) classifier, we were able to distinguish between high- and low-SA individuals with high (75.6%) accuracy and good (.83 AUC) separability. We also expected and found that vocal properties differentiated between refusal and consent utterances. Conclusions - Our findings provide further support for the usefulness of ML approach for the study of psychopathology, highlighting the utility of developing automatic techniques to create behavioral markers of SAD. Clinically, the simplicity and accessibility of these procedures may encourage people to seek professional help.

Results - Our prediction that, as compared to low-SA (n=31), high-SA (n=32) individuals exhibit a less confident vocal speech signature, especially with respect to refusal utterances, was only partially supported by the classical hypothesis-testing approach. However, the results of the ML analyses and specifically the decision tree classifier were consistent with such speech patterns in SA. Using a Gaussian Process (GP) classifier, we were able to distinguish between high- and low-SA individuals with high (75.6%) accuracy and good (.83 AUC) separability. We also expected and found that vocal properties differentiated between refusal and consent utterances. Conclusions - Our findings provide further support for the usefulness of ML approach for the study of psychopathology, highlighting the utility of developing automatic techniques to create behavioral markers of SAD. Clinically, the simplicity and accessibility of these procedures may encourage people to seek professional help.
abstract_zh: 背景 - 社交焦虑 (SA) 是一种常见且令人衰弱的疾病，即使在亚诊断阈值下也会对生活质量产生负面影响。我们试图使用假设检验和机器学习 (ML) 方法来表征 SA 的声学特征。方法——参与者根据指示形成自发的话语，以拒绝或同意所谓同伴的命令。分析了这些话语的声音特性（例如强度和持续时间）。结果 - 我们的预测是，与低 SA (n=31) 相比，高 SA (n=32) 个体表现出不太自信的语音特征，尤其是在拒绝话语方面，这一预测仅得到经典假设检验方法的部分支持。然而，ML 分析的结果，特别是决策树分类器的结果与 SA 中的此类语音模式一致。使用高斯过程 (GP) 分类器，我们能够以高 (75.6%) 准确度和良好 (0.83 AUC) 可分离性区分高 SA 和低 SA 个体。我们还预期并发现拒绝和同意话语之间的声音特性有所不同。结论 - 我们的研究结果进一步支持了机器学习方法在精神病理学研究中的有用性，强调了开发自动技术来创建 SAD 行为标记的实用性。在临床上，这些程序的简单性和可访问性可能会鼓励人们寻求专业帮助。

AI.tldr: 通过假设检验和机器学习方法探索社交焦虑的语音特征签名。
AI.motivation: 社交焦虑（SA）对生活质量有负面影响，研究旨在发现其语音特征以开发自动化的行为标记，辅助早期干预。
AI.method: 参与者根据指令自发发出拒绝或同意的语音，分析语音强度、时长等属性；结合假设检验与机器学习（决策树、高斯过程分类器）进行模式识别。
AI.result: 假设检验部分支持语音自信度差异，但机器学习方法（尤其高斯过程分类器）以75.6%准确率和0.83 AUC有效区分高/低SA个体，且语音特征在拒绝与同意语句中存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习方法在精神疾病研究中具有潜力，其简便性可能促进人们寻求专业帮助，为社交焦虑的自动检测提供新途径。

authors_text: Yi Zeng,Dongcheng Zhao,Feifei Zhao,Guobin Shen,Yiting Dong,Enmeng Lu,Qian Zhang,Yinqian Sun,Qian Liang,Yuxuan Zhao,Zhuoya Zhao,Hongjian Fang,Yuwei Wang,Yang Li,Xin Liu,Chengcheng Du,Qingqun Kong,Zizhe Ruan,Weida Bi
title: BrainCog: A Spiking Neural Network based Brain-inspired Cognitive Intelligence Engine for Brain-inspired AI and Brain Simulation
title_zh: BrainCog：基于尖峰神经网络的类脑认知智能引擎，用于类脑人工智能和脑模拟
comment: This paper was accepted by Patterns. The accepted version can be seen at https://www.cell.com/patterns/fulltext/S2666-3899(23)00144-7
comments: This paper was accepted by Patterns. The accepted version can be seen at https://www.cell.com/patterns/fulltext/S2666-3899(23)00144-7
abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) have attracted extensive attentions in Brain-inspired Artificial Intelligence and computational neuroscience. They can be used to simulate biological information processing in the brain at multiple scales. More importantly, SNNs serve as an appropriate level of abstraction to bring inspirations from brain and cognition to Artificial Intelligence. In this paper, we present the Brain-inspired Cognitive Intelligence Engine (BrainCog) for creating brain-inspired AI and brain simulation models. BrainCog incorporates different types of spiking neuron models, learning rules, brain areas, etc., as essential modules provided by the platform. Based on these easy-to-use modules, BrainCog supports various brain-inspired cognitive functions, including Perception and Learning, Decision Making, Knowledge Representation and Reasoning, Motor Control, and Social Cognition. These brain-inspired AI models have been effectively validated on various supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning tasks, and they can be used to enable AI models to be with multiple brain-inspired cognitive functions. For brain simulation, BrainCog realizes the function simulation of decision-making, working memory, the structure simulation of the Neural Circuit, and whole brain structure simulation of Mouse brain, Macaque brain, and Human brain. An AI engine named BORN is developed based on BrainCog, and it demonstrates how the components of BrainCog can be integrated and used to build AI models and applications. To enable the scientific quest to decode the nature of biological intelligence and create AI, BrainCog aims to provide essential and easy-to-use building blocks, and infrastructural support to develop brain-inspired spiking neural network based AI, and to simulate the cognitive brains at multiple scales. The online repository of BrainCog can be found at https://github.com/braincog-x.
summary: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) have attracted extensive attentions in Brain-inspired Artificial Intelligence and computational neuroscience. They can be used to simulate biological information processing in the brain at multiple scales. More importantly, SNNs serve as an appropriate level of abstraction to bring inspirations from brain and cognition to Artificial Intelligence. In this paper, we present the Brain-inspired Cognitive Intelligence Engine (BrainCog) for creating brain-inspired AI and brain simulation models. BrainCog incorporates different types of spiking neuron models, learning rules, brain areas, etc., as essential modules provided by the platform. Based on these easy-to-use modules, BrainCog supports various brain-inspired cognitive functions, including Perception and Learning, Decision Making, Knowledge Representation and Reasoning, Motor Control, and Social Cognition. These brain-inspired AI models have been effectively validated on various supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning tasks, and they can be used to enable AI models to be with multiple brain-inspired cognitive functions. For brain simulation, BrainCog realizes the function simulation of decision-making, working memory, the structure simulation of the Neural Circuit, and whole brain structure simulation of Mouse brain, Macaque brain, and Human brain. An AI engine named BORN is developed based on BrainCog, and it demonstrates how the components of BrainCog can be integrated and used to build AI models and applications. To enable the scientific quest to decode the nature of biological intelligence and create AI, BrainCog aims to provide essential and easy-to-use building blocks, and infrastructural support to develop brain-inspired spiking neural network based AI, and to simulate the cognitive brains at multiple scales. The online repository of BrainCog can be found at https://github.com/braincog-x.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络（SNN）在类脑人工智能和计算神经科学领域引起了广泛的关注。它们可用于在多个尺度上模拟大脑中的生物信息处理。更重要的是，SNN 作为适当的抽象级别，将大脑和认知的灵感带入人工智能。在本文中，我们提出了类脑认知智能引擎（BrainCog），用于创建类脑人工智能和脑模拟模型。 BrainCog 整合了不同类型的尖峰神经元模型、学习规则、大脑区域等作为平台提供的基本模块。基于这些易于使用的模块，BrainCog 支持各种受大脑启发的认知功能，包括感知和学习、决策、知识表示和推理、运动控制和社会认知。这些类脑AI模型已经在各种监督、无监督和强化学习任务上得到了有效验证，可用于使AI模型具备多种类脑认知功能。在脑模拟方面，BrainCog实现了决策功能模拟、工作记忆功能模拟、神经回路结构模拟，以及小鼠大脑、猕猴大脑、人脑的全脑结构模拟。基于 BrainCog 开发了名为 BORN 的 AI 引擎，它演示了如何集成并使用 BrainCog 的组件来构建 AI 模型和应用程序。为了使科学探索能够解码生物智能的本质并创建人工智能，BrainCog 旨在提供必要且易于使用的构建块和基础设施支持，以开发基于大脑启发的尖峰神经网络的人工智能，并在多个尺度上模拟认知大脑。 BrainCog 的在线存储库可以在 https://github.com/braincog-x 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于脉冲神经网络（SNN）的脑启发认知智能引擎BrainCog，旨在开发脑启发AI模型并实现多尺度脑模拟。
AI.motivation: 传统AI模型难以模拟生物大脑的复杂认知功能，而SNN能更贴近生物神经机制，需构建统一平台整合脑启发模块以推动AI与脑科学交叉研究。
AI.method: 构建模块化平台BrainCog，集成多种SNN神经元模型、学习规则及脑区模块，支持感知、决策、推理等认知功能，并通过监督/非监督/强化学习任务验证，同时实现从神经回路到全脑结构的多尺度模拟。
AI.result: 验证了BrainCog在多种学习任务中的有效性，实现了决策、工作记忆等认知功能模拟，完成小鼠、猕猴及人类全脑结构模拟，并开发了BORN AI引擎作为应用实例。
AI.conclusion: BrainCog为脑启发AI与脑模拟提供了基础模块和基础设施，推动生物智能解码与类脑AI系统开发，促进神经科学与人工智能的深度融合。

ai_content.conclusion: BrainCog为脑启发AI与脑模拟提供了基础模块和基础设施，推动生物智能解码与类脑AI系统开发，促进神经科学与人工智能的深度融合。

search_text: BrainCog: A Spiking Neural Network based Brain-inspired Cognitive Intelligence Engine for Brain-inspired AI and Brain Simulation BrainCog：基于尖峰神经网络的类脑认知智能引擎，用于类脑人工智能和脑模拟 Spiking neural networks (SNNs) have attracted extensive attentions in Brain-inspired Artificial Intelligence and computational neuroscience. They can be used to simulate biological information processing in the brain at multiple scales. More importantly, SNNs serve as an appropriate level of abstraction to bring inspirations from brain and cognition to Artificial Intelligence. In this paper, we present the Brain-inspired Cognitive Intelligence Engine (BrainCog) for creating brain-inspired AI and brain simulation models. BrainCog incorporates different types of spiking neuron models, learning rules, brain areas, etc., as essential modules provided by the platform. Based on these easy-to-use modules, BrainCog supports various brain-inspired cognitive functions, including Perception and Learning, Decision Making, Knowledge Representation and Reasoning, Motor Control, and Social Cognition. These brain-inspired AI models have been effectively validated on various supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning tasks, and they can be used to enable AI models to be with multiple brain-inspired cognitive functions. For brain simulation, BrainCog realizes the function simulation of decision-making, working memory, the structure simulation of the Neural Circuit, and whole brain structure simulation of Mouse brain, Macaque brain, and Human brain. An AI engine named BORN is developed based on BrainCog, and it demonstrates how the components of BrainCog can be integrated and used to build AI models and applications. To enable the scientific quest to decode the nature of biological intelligence and create AI, BrainCog aims to provide essential and easy-to-use building blocks, and infrastructural support to develop brain-inspired spiking neural network based AI, and to simulate the cognitive brains at multiple scales. The online repository of BrainCog can be found at https://github.com/braincog-x. 尖峰神经网络（SNN）在类脑人工智能和计算神经科学领域引起了广泛的关注。它们可用于在多个尺度上模拟大脑中的生物信息处理。更重要的是，SNN 作为适当的抽象级别，将大脑和认知的灵感带入人工智能。在本文中，我们提出了类脑认知智能引擎（BrainCog），用于创建类脑人工智能和脑模拟模型。 BrainCog 整合了不同类型的尖峰神经元模型、学习规则、大脑区域等作为平台提供的基本模块。基于这些易于使用的模块，BrainCog 支持各种受大脑启发的认知功能，包括感知和学习、决策、知识表示和推理、运动控制和社会认知。这些类脑AI模型已经在各种监督、无监督和强化学习任务上得到了有效验证，可用于使AI模型具备多种类脑认知功能。在脑模拟方面，BrainCog实现了决策功能模拟、工作记忆功能模拟、神经回路结构模拟，以及小鼠大脑、猕猴大脑、人脑的全脑结构模拟。基于 BrainCog 开发了名为 BORN 的 AI 引擎，它演示了如何集成并使用 BrainCog 的组件来构建 AI 模型和应用程序。为了使科学探索能够解码生物智能的本质并创建人工智能，BrainCog 旨在提供必要且易于使用的构建块和基础设施支持，以开发基于大脑启发的尖峰神经网络的人工智能，并在多个尺度上模拟认知大脑。 BrainCog 的在线存储库可以在 https://github.com/braincog-x 上找到。 本文提出基于脉冲神经网络（SNN）的脑启发认知智能引擎BrainCog，旨在开发脑启发AI模型并实现多尺度脑模拟。 Yi Zeng,Dongcheng Zhao,Feifei Zhao,Guobin Shen,Yiting Dong,Enmeng Lu,Qian Zhang,Yinqian Sun,Qian Liang,Yuxuan Zhao,Zhuoya Zhao,Hongjian Fang,Yuwei Wang,Yang Li,Xin Liu,Chengcheng Du,Qingqun Kong,Zizhe Ruan,Weida Bi cs.NE

authors_text: Liang Peng,Xiaopei Wu,Zheng Yang,Haifeng Liu,Deng Cai
title: DID-M3D: Decoupling Instance Depth for Monocular 3D Object Detection
title_zh: DID-M3D：单目 3D 物体检测的解耦实例深度
abstract: Monocular 3D detection has drawn much attention from the community due to its low cost and setup simplicity. It takes an RGB image as input and predicts 3D boxes in the 3D space. The most challenging sub-task lies in the instance depth estimation. Previous works usually use a direct estimation method. However, in this paper we point out that the instance depth on the RGB image is non-intuitive. It is coupled by visual depth clues and instance attribute clues, making it hard to be directly learned in the network. Therefore, we propose to reformulate the instance depth to the combination of the instance visual surface depth (visual depth) and the instance attribute depth (attribute depth). The visual depth is related to objects' appearances and positions on the image. By contrast, the attribute depth relies on objects' inherent attributes, which are invariant to the object affine transformation on the image. Correspondingly, we decouple the 3D location uncertainty into visual depth uncertainty and attribute depth uncertainty. By combining different types of depths and associated uncertainties, we can obtain the final instance depth. Furthermore, data augmentation in monocular 3D detection is usually limited due to the physical nature, hindering the boost of performance. Based on the proposed instance depth disentanglement strategy, we can alleviate this problem. Evaluated on KITTI, our method achieves new state-of-the-art results, and extensive ablation studies validate the effectiveness of each component in our method. The codes are released at https://github.com/SPengLiang/DID-M3D.
summary: Monocular 3D detection has drawn much attention from the community due to its low cost and setup simplicity. It takes an RGB image as input and predicts 3D boxes in the 3D space. The most challenging sub-task lies in the instance depth estimation. Previous works usually use a direct estimation method. However, in this paper we point out that the instance depth on the RGB image is non-intuitive. It is coupled by visual depth clues and instance attribute clues, making it hard to be directly learned in the network. Therefore, we propose to reformulate the instance depth to the combination of the instance visual surface depth (visual depth) and the instance attribute depth (attribute depth). The visual depth is related to objects' appearances and positions on the image. By contrast, the attribute depth relies on objects' inherent attributes, which are invariant to the object affine transformation on the image. Correspondingly, we decouple the 3D location uncertainty into visual depth uncertainty and attribute depth uncertainty. By combining different types of depths and associated uncertainties, we can obtain the final instance depth. Furthermore, data augmentation in monocular 3D detection is usually limited due to the physical nature, hindering the boost of performance. Based on the proposed instance depth disentanglement strategy, we can alleviate this problem. Evaluated on KITTI, our method achieves new state-of-the-art results, and extensive ablation studies validate the effectiveness of each component in our method. The codes are released at https://github.com/SPengLiang/DID-M3D.
abstract_zh: 单目 3D 检测因其低成本和设置简单而引起了社会的广泛关注。它以 RGB 图像作为输入并预测 3D 空间中的 3D 框。最具挑战性的子任务在于实例深度估计。以前的工作通常使用直接估计方法。然而，在本文中我们指出 RGB 图像上的实例深度是不直观的。它由视觉深度线索和实例属性线索耦合在一起，使得很难在网络中直接学习。因此，我们建议将实例深度重新表述为实例视觉表面深度（视觉深度）和实例属性深度（属性深度）的组合。视觉深度与图像上物体的外观和位置有关。相比之下，属性深度依赖于对象的固有属性，这些属性对于图像上的对象仿射变换是不变的。相应地，我们将 3D 位置不确定性解耦为视觉深度不确定性和属性深度不确定性。通过结合不同类型的深度和相关的不确定性，我们可以获得最终的实例深度。此外，由于物理性质，单目 3D 检测中的数据增强通常受到限制，阻碍了性能的提升。基于所提出的实例深度解缠策略，我们可以缓解这个问题。在 KITTI 上进行评估，我们的方法取得了最先进的新结果，广泛的消融研究验证了我们方法中每个组件的有效性。代码发布于https://github.com/SPengLiang/DID-M3D。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DID-M3D方法，通过解耦实例深度中的视觉深度和属性深度，提升单目3D目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 单目3D检测中实例深度估计受视觉线索与属性线索耦合影响，直接学习困难，现有方法未能有效解耦导致性能受限。
AI.method: 将实例深度分解为视觉深度（依赖外观与位置）和属性深度（依赖物体固有属性），分别处理两者不确定性，并基于此设计数据增强策略。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上达到新SOTA，消融实验验证各组件有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 解耦深度策略有效解决单目3D检测中深度估计难题及数据增强瓶颈，为后续研究提供新思路。

It takes an RGB image as input and predicts 3D boxes in the 3D space. The most challenging sub-task lies in the instance depth estimation. Previous works usually use a direct estimation method. It is coupled by visual depth clues and instance attribute clues, making it hard to be directly learned in the network. Therefore, we propose to reformulate the instance depth to the combination of the instance visual surface depth (visual depth) and the instance attribute depth (attribute depth). The visual depth is related to objects' appearances and positions on the image. By contrast, the attribute depth relies on objects' inherent attributes, which are invariant to the object affine transformation on the image. Correspondingly, we decouple the 3D location uncertainty into visual depth uncertainty and attribute depth uncertainty. authors_text: Bohua Peng,Mobarakol Islam,Mei Tu
title: Angular Gap: Reducing the Uncertainty of Image Difficulty through Model Calibration
title_zh: 角度间隙：通过模型标定降低图像难度的不确定性
abstract: Curriculum learning needs example difficulty to proceed from easy to hard. However, the credibility of image difficulty is rarely investigated, which can seriously affect the effectiveness of curricula. In this work, we propose Angular Gap, a measure of difficulty based on the difference in angular distance between feature embeddings and class-weight embeddings built by hyperspherical learning. To ascertain difficulty estimation, we introduce class-wise model calibration, as a post-training technique, to the learnt hyperbolic space. This bridges the gap between probabilistic model calibration and angular distance estimation of hyperspherical learning. We show the superiority of our calibrated Angular Gap over recent difficulty metrics on CIFAR10-H and ImageNetV2. We further propose Angular Gap based curriculum learning for unsupervised domain adaptation that can translate from learning easy samples to mining hard samples. We combine this curriculum with a state-of-the-art self-training method, Cycle Self Training (CST). The proposed Curricular CST learns robust representations and outperforms recent baselines on Office31 and VisDA 2017.
summary: Curriculum learning needs example difficulty to proceed from easy to hard. However, the credibility of image difficulty is rarely investigated, which can seriously affect the effectiveness of curricula. In this work, we propose Angular Gap, a measure of difficulty based on the difference in angular distance between feature embeddings and class-weight embeddings built by hyperspherical learning. To ascertain difficulty estimation, we introduce class-wise model calibration, as a post-training technique, to the learnt hyperbolic space. This bridges the gap between probabilistic model calibration and angular distance estimation of hyperspherical learning. We show the superiority of our calibrated Angular Gap over recent difficulty metrics on CIFAR10-H and ImageNetV2. We further propose Angular Gap based curriculum learning for unsupervised domain adaptation that can translate from learning easy samples to mining hard samples. We combine this curriculum with a state-of-the-art self-training method, Cycle Self Training (CST). The proposed Curricular CST learns robust representations and outperforms recent baselines on Office31 and VisDA 2017.
abstract_zh: 课程学习需要示例难度，由易到难。然而，图像难度的可信度却很少被调查，这会严重影响课程的有效性。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Angular Gap，一种基于特征嵌入和超球面学习构建的类权重嵌入之间的角距离差异的难度度量。为了确定难度估计，我们将分类模型校准作为一种训练后技术引入到学习的双曲空间中。这弥补了概率模型校准和超球面学习的角距离估计之间的差距。我们展示了校准的 Angular Gap 相对于 CIFAR10-H 和 ImageNetV2 上最近的难度指标的优越性。我们进一步提出基于 Angular Gap 的课程学习，用于无监督领域适应，可以从学习简单样本转化为挖掘困难样本。我们将本课程与最先进的自我训练方法——循环自我训练（CST）相结合。拟议的课程 CST 学习稳健的表示，并且优于 Office31 和 VisDA 2017 的最新基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Angular Gap方法，通过模型校准降低图像难度估计的不确定性，并将其应用于无监督域适应的课程学习中。
AI.motivation: 课程学习依赖图像难度排序，但现有难度评估的可信度不足，导致课程效果受限，需更可靠的难度度量方法。
AI.method: 基于超球面学习计算特征嵌入与类别权重嵌入的角度距离作为难度指标，并引入类别级模型校准技术优化超双曲空间中的估计结果。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10-H和ImageNetV2数据集上，校准后的Angular Gap优于现有难度度量方法；结合Cycle Self Training后，在Office31和VisDA 2017域适应任务中超越基线方法。
AI.conclusion: Angular Gap有效提升了图像难度估计的准确性，为课程学习和域适应提供了更稳健的解决方案，验证了模型校准与角度距离结合的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出Angular Gap方法，通过模型校准降低图像难度估计的不确定性，并将其应用于无监督域适应的课程学习中。
ai_content.motivation: 课程学习依赖图像难度排序，但现有难度评估的可信度不足，导致课程效果受限，需更可靠的难度度量方法。
ai_content.method: 基于超球面学习计算特征嵌入与类别权重嵌入的角度距离作为难度指标，并引入类别级模型校准技术优化超双曲空间中的估计结果。
ai_content.result: 在CIFAR10-H和ImageNetV2数据集上，校准后的Angular Gap优于现有难度度量方法；结合Cycle Self Training后，在Office31和VisDA 2017域适应任务中超越基线方法。
ai_content.conclusion: Angular Gap有效提升了图像难度估计的准确性，为课程学习和域适应提供了更稳健的解决方案，验证了模型校准与角度距离结合的有效性。

search_text: Angular Gap: Reducing the Uncertainty of Image Difficulty through Model Calibration 角度间隙：通过模型标定降低图像难度的不确定性 Curriculum learning needs example difficulty to proceed from easy to hard. However, the credibility of image difficulty is rarely investigated, which can seriously affect the effectiveness of curricula. In this work, we propose Angular Gap, a measure of difficulty based on the difference in angular distance between feature embeddings and class-weight embeddings built by hyperspherical learning. To ascertain difficulty estimation, we introduce class-wise model calibration, as a post-training technique, to the learnt hyperbolic space. This bridges the gap between probabilistic model calibration and angular distance estimation of hyperspherical learning. We show the superiority of our calibrated Angular Gap over recent difficulty metrics on CIFAR10-H and ImageNetV2. We further propose Angular Gap based curriculum learning for unsupervised domain adaptation that can translate from learning easy samples to mining hard samples. We combine this curriculum with a state-of-the-art self-training method, Cycle Self Training (CST). The proposed Curricular CST learns robust representations and outperforms recent baselines on Office31 and VisDA 2017. 课程学习需要示例难度，由易到难。然而，图像难度的可信度却很少被调查，这会严重影响课程的有效性。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Angular Gap，一种基于特征嵌入和超球面学习构建的类权重嵌入之间的角距离差异的难度度量。为了确定难度估计，我们将分类模型校准作为一种训练后技术引入到学习的双曲空间中。这弥补了概率模型校准和超球面学习的角距离估计之间的差距。我们展示了校准的 Angular Gap 相对于 CIFAR10-H 和 ImageNetV2 上最近的难度指标的优越性。我们进一步提出基于 Angular Gap 的课程学习，用于无监督领域适应，可以从学习简单样本转化为挖掘困难样本。我们将本课程与最先进的自我训练方法——循环自我训练（CST）相结合。拟议的课程 CST 学习稳健的表示，并且优于 Office31 和 VisDA 2017 的最新基线。 本文提出Angular Gap方法，通过模型校准降低图像难度估计的不确定性，并将其应用于无监督域适应的课程学习中。 Bohua Peng,Mobarakol Islam,Mei Tu cs.CV

authors_text: Moein Heidari,Amirhossein Kazerouni,Milad Soltany,Reza Azad,Ehsan Khodapanah Aghdam,Julien Cohen-Adad,Dorit Merhof
title: HiFormer: Hierarchical Multi-scale Representations Using Transformers for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: HiFormer：使用 Transformer 进行医学图像分割的分层多尺度表示
comment: The accepted version of the paper at WACV 2023
comments: The accepted version of the paper at WACV 2023
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been the consensus for medical image segmentation tasks. However, they suffer from the limitation in modeling long-range dependencies and spatial correlations due to the nature of convolution operation. Although transformers were first developed to address this issue, they fail to capture low-level features. In contrast, it is demonstrated that both local and global features are crucial for dense prediction, such as segmenting in challenging contexts. In this paper, we propose HiFormer, a novel method that efficiently bridges a CNN and a transformer for medical image segmentation. Specifically, we design two multi-scale feature representations using the seminal Swin Transformer module and a CNN-based encoder. To secure a fine fusion of global and local features obtained from the two aforementioned representations, we propose a Double-Level Fusion (DLF) module in the skip connection of the encoder-decoder structure. Extensive experiments on various medical image segmentation datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of HiFormer over other CNN-based, transformer-based, and hybrid methods in terms of computational complexity, and quantitative and qualitative results. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/amirhossein-kz/HiFormer
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been the consensus for medical image segmentation tasks. However, they suffer from the limitation in modeling long-range dependencies and spatial correlations due to the nature of convolution operation. Although transformers were first developed to address this issue, they fail to capture low-level features. In contrast, it is demonstrated that both local and global features are crucial for dense prediction, such as segmenting in challenging contexts. In this paper, we propose HiFormer, a novel method that efficiently bridges a CNN and a transformer for medical image segmentation. Specifically, we design two multi-scale feature representations using the seminal Swin Transformer module and a CNN-based encoder. To secure a fine fusion of global and local features obtained from the two aforementioned representations, we propose a Double-Level Fusion (DLF) module in the skip connection of the encoder-decoder structure. Extensive experiments on various medical image segmentation datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of HiFormer over other CNN-based, transformer-based, and hybrid methods in terms of computational complexity, and quantitative and qualitative results. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/amirhossein-kz/HiFormer
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）已成为医学图像分割任务的共识。然而，由于卷积运算的性质，它们在建模远程依赖性和空间相关性方面受到限制。尽管变压器最初是为了解决这个问题而开发的，但它们未能捕获低级特征。相比之下，事实证明，局部和全局特征对于密集预测至关重要，例如在具有挑战性的上下文中进行分割。在本文中，我们提出了 HiFormer，这是一种有效连接 CNN 和变压器以进行医学图像分割的新颖方法。具体来说，我们使用开创性的 Swin Transformer 模块和基于 CNN 的编码器设计了两种多尺度特征表示。为了确保从上述两种表示获得的全局和局部特征的精细融合，我们在编码器-解码器结构的跳跃连接中提出了双层融合（DLF）模块。对各种医学图像分割数据集的大量实验证明了 HiFormer 在计算复杂性以及定量和定性结果方面优于其他基于 CNN、基于 Transformer 和混合方法的有效性。我们的代码公开于：https://github.com/amirhossein-kz/HiFormer

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为HiFormer的新方法，用于医学图像分割任务，通过结合卷积神经网络（CNN）和Transformer的优势来提高分割效果。
AI.motivation: 传统的CNN在医学图像分割中存在无法有效建模长距离依赖和空间相关性的局限性，而Transformer虽然能解决这一问题，却难以捕捉低层次特征。因此，需要一种方法同时利用CNN和Transformer的优势，以实现更精确的医学图像分割。
AI.method: 本文设计了HiFormer，通过结合Swin Transformer模块和基于CNN的编码器，生成多尺度特征表示。此外，还提出了一种双级融合（DLF）模块，用于在编码器-解码器结构的跳过连接中融合全局和局部特征。
AI.result: 在多个医学图像分割数据集上的实验表明，HiFormer在计算复杂度、定量和定性结果方面均优于其他基于CNN、Transformer和混合的方法。
AI.conclusion: HiFormer通过有效结合CNN和Transformer的优势，成功解决了医学图像分割中全局和局部特征融合的问题，并在多个数据集上取得了优越的性能。
