authors_text: Satyam Kumar,Vadlamani Ravi
title: Explainable Deep Belief Network based Auto encoder using novel Extended Garson Algorithm
title_zh: 使用新颖的扩展 Garson 算法的基于可解释深度置信网络的自动编码器
abstract: The most difficult task in machine learning is to interpret trained shallow neural networks. Deep neural networks (DNNs) provide impressive results on a larger number of tasks, but it is generally still unclear how decisions are made by such a trained deep neural network. Providing feature importance is the most important and popular interpretation technique used in shallow and deep neural networks. In this paper, we develop an algorithm extending the idea of Garson Algorithm to explain Deep Belief Network based Auto-encoder (DBNA). It is used to determine the contribution of each input feature in the DBN. It can be used for any kind of neural network with many hidden layers. The effectiveness of this method is tested on both classification and regression datasets taken from literature. Important features identified by this method are compared against those obtained by Wald chi square (\c{hi}2). For 2 out of 4 classification datasets and 2 out of 5 regression datasets, our proposed methodology resulted in the identification of better-quality features leading to statistically more significant results vis-à-vis Wald \c{hi}2.
summary: The most difficult task in machine learning is to interpret trained shallow neural networks. Deep neural networks (DNNs) provide impressive results on a larger number of tasks, but it is generally still unclear how decisions are made by such a trained deep neural network. Providing feature importance is the most important and popular interpretation technique used in shallow and deep neural networks. In this paper, we develop an algorithm extending the idea of Garson Algorithm to explain Deep Belief Network based Auto-encoder (DBNA). It is used to determine the contribution of each input feature in the DBN. It can be used for any kind of neural network with many hidden layers. The effectiveness of this method is tested on both classification and regression datasets taken from literature. Important features identified by this method are compared against those obtained by Wald chi square (\c{hi}2). For 2 out of 4 classification datasets and 2 out of 5 regression datasets, our proposed methodology resulted in the identification of better-quality features leading to statistically more significant results vis-à-vis Wald \c{hi}2.
abstract_zh: 机器学习中最困难的任务是解释经过训练的浅层神经网络。深度神经网络 (DNN) 在大量任务上提供了令人印象深刻的结果，但通常仍不清楚这种经过训练的深度神经网络是如何做出决策的。提供特征重要性是浅层和深层神经网络中使用的最重要和最流行的解释技术。在本文中，我们开发了一种扩展 Garson 算法思想的算法来解释基于深度置信网络的自动编码器（DBNA）。它用于确定每个输入特征在 DBN 中的贡献。它可用于任何类型的具有许多隐藏层的神经网络。该方法的有效性在文献中的分类和回归数据集上进行了测试。通过此方法识别的重要特征与 Wald 卡方 (\c{hi}2) 获得的特征进行比较。对于 4 个分类数据集中的 2 个和 5 个回归数据集中的 2 个，我们提出的方法可以识别出质量更好的特征，从而获得与 Wald \c{hi}2 相比在统计上更显着的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于改进Garson算法的可解释深度信念网络自编码器，用于确定输入特征对模型的贡献度。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络虽性能优异但缺乏可解释性，现有特征重要性分析方法难以有效解释多层网络结构。
AI.method: 扩展经典Garson算法，通过计算特征与隐藏层权重的乘积绝对值之和，量化输入特征在深度信念网络自编码器中的贡献度。
AI.result: 在4个分类和5个回归数据集测试中，该方法在2个分类和2个回归任务上显著优于Wald卡方检验的特征选择效果。
AI.conclusion: 改进的Garson算法能有效识别深度网络的关键特征，为模型解释性研究提供新方法，适用于多层神经网络的特征重要性分析。

search_text: Explainable Deep Belief Network based Auto encoder using novel Extended Garson Algorithm 使用新颖的扩展 Garson 算法的基于可解释深度置信网络的自动编码器 The most difficult task in machine learning is to interpret trained shallow neural networks. Deep neural networks (DNNs) provide impressive results on a larger number of tasks, but it is generally still unclear how decisions are made by such a trained deep neural network. Providing feature importance is the most important and popular interpretation technique used in shallow and deep neural networks. In this paper, we develop an algorithm extending the idea of Garson Algorithm to explain Deep Belief Network based Auto-encoder (DBNA). It is used to determine the contribution of each input feature in the DBN. It can be used for any kind of neural network with many hidden layers. The effectiveness of this method is tested on both classification and regression datasets taken from literature. Important features identified by this method are compared against those obtained by Wald chi square (\c{hi}2). For 2 out of 4 classification datasets and 2 out of 5 regression datasets, our proposed methodology resulted in the identification of better-quality features leading to statistically more significant results vis-à-vis Wald \c{hi}2. 机器学习中最困难的任务是解释经过训练的浅层神经网络。深度神经网络 (DNN) 在大量任务上提供了令人印象深刻的结果，但通常仍不清楚这种经过训练的深度神经网络是如何做出决策的。提供特征重要性是浅层和深层神经网络中使用的最重要和最流行的解释技术。在本文中，我们开发了一种扩展 Garson 算法思想的算法来解释基于深度置信网络的自动编码器（DBNA）。它用于确定每个输入特征在 DBN 中的贡献。它可用于任何类型的具有许多隐藏层的神经网络。该方法的有效性在文献中的分类和回归数据集上进行了测试。通过此方法识别的重要特征与 Wald 卡方 (\c{hi}2) 获得的特征进行比较。对于 4 个分类数据集中的 2 个和 5 个回归数据集中的 2 个，我们提出的方法可以识别出质量更好的特征，从而获得与 Wald \c{hi}2 相比在统计上更显着的结果。 本文提出一种基于改进Garson算法的可解释深度信念网络自编码器，用于确定输入特征对模型的贡献度。 Satyam Kumar,Vadlamani Ravi cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Shuwei Shi,Jinjin Gu,Liangbin Xie,Xintao Wang,Yujiu Yang,Chao Dong
title: Rethinking Alignment in Video Super-Resolution Transformers
title_zh: 重新思考视频超分辨率变压器中的对齐
comment: This paper has been accepted for NeurIPS 2022
comments: This paper has been accepted for NeurIPS 2022
abstract: The alignment of adjacent frames is considered an essential operation in video super-resolution (VSR). Advanced VSR models, including the latest VSR Transformers, are generally equipped with well-designed alignment modules. However, the progress of the self-attention mechanism may violate this common sense. In this paper, we rethink the role of alignment in VSR Transformers and make several counter-intuitive observations. Our experiments show that: (i) VSR Transformers can directly utilize multi-frame information from unaligned videos, and (ii) existing alignment methods are sometimes harmful to VSR Transformers. These observations indicate that we can further improve the performance of VSR Transformers simply by removing the alignment module and adopting a larger attention window. Nevertheless, such designs will dramatically increase the computational burden, and cannot deal with large motions. Therefore, we propose a new and efficient alignment method called patch alignment, which aligns image patches instead of pixels. VSR Transformers equipped with patch alignment could demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmarks. Our work provides valuable insights on how multi-frame information is used in VSR and how to select alignment methods for different networks/datasets. Codes and models will be released at https://github.com/XPixelGroup/RethinkVSRAlignment.

Advanced VSR models, including the latest VSR Transformers, are generally equipped with well-designed alignment modules. However, the progress of the self-attention mechanism may violate this common sense. Our experiments show that: (i) VSR Transformers can directly utilize multi-frame information from unaligned videos, and (ii) existing alignment methods are sometimes harmful to VSR Transformers. These observations indicate that we can further improve the performance of VSR Transformers simply by removing the alignment module and adopting a larger attention window. Nevertheless, such designs will dramatically increase the computational burden, and cannot deal with large motions. Therefore, we propose a new and efficient alignment method called patch alignment, which aligns image patches instead of pixels. VSR Transformers equipped with patch alignment could demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmarks. Our work provides valuable insights on how multi-frame information is used in VSR and how to select alignment methods for different networks/datasets. Codes and models will be released at https://github.com/XPixelGroup/RethinkVSRAlignment.
abstract_zh: 相邻帧的对齐被认为是视频超分辨率（VSR）中的基本操作。先进的 VSR 型号，包括最新的 VSR Transformer，通常都配备了精心设计的对准模块。然而，self-attention机制的进展可能会违反这个常识。在本文中，我们重新思考了 VSR Transformers 中对齐的作用，并做出了一些反直觉的观察。我们的实验表明：(i) VSR Transformers 可以直接利用未对齐视频中的多帧信息，(ii) 现有的对齐方法有时对 VSR Transformers 有害。这些观察结果表明，我们只需删除对齐模块并采用更大的注意力窗口，就可以进一步提高 VSR Transformer 的性能。然而，这样的设计将极大地增加计算负担，并且无法处理大运动。因此，我们提出了一种新的高效对齐方法，称为补丁对齐，它对齐图像补丁而不是像素。配备补丁对齐的 VSR Transformer 可以在多个基准测试中展示最先进的性能。我们的工作为如何在 VSR 中使用多帧信息以及如何为不同网络/数据集选择对齐方法提供了宝贵的见解。代码和模型将在 https://github.com/XPixelGroup/RethinkVSRAligment 发布。

AI.tldr: 重新思考视频超分辨率Transformer中的对齐问题，并提出块对齐方法以提升性能
AI.motivation: 现有对齐方法可能限制VSR Transformer性能，需探索更高效对齐策略
AI.method: 提出块对齐方法，对图像块而非像素进行对齐，结合大注意力窗口提升多帧信息利用效率
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中达到最先进性能，验证方法有效性
AI.conclusion: 揭示VSR中多帧信息利用机制，提供对齐方法选择指导，推动高效VSR模型发展

authors_text: Bibin Wilson,Anand Singh,Amit Sethi
title: Shallow Water Bathymetry Survey using an Autonomous Surface Vehicle
title_zh: 使用自主水面车辆进行浅水水深测量
abstract: Accurate and cost effective mapping of water bodies has an enormous significance for environmental understanding and navigation. However, the quantity and quality of information we acquire from such environmental features is limited by various factors, including cost, time, security, and the capabilities of existing data collection techniques. Measurement of water depth is an important part of such mapping, particularly in shallow locations that could provide navigational risk or have important ecological functions. Erosion and deposition at these locations, for example, due to storms and erosion, can cause rapid changes that require repeated measurements. In this paper, we describe a low-cost, resilient, unmanned autonomous surface vehicle for bathymetry data collection using side-scan sonar. We discuss the adaptation of equipment and sensors for the collection of navigation, control, and bathymetry data and also give an overview of the vehicle setup. This autonomous surface vehicle has been used to collect bathymetry from the Powai Lake in Mumbai, India.
summary: Accurate and cost effective mapping of water bodies has an enormous significance for environmental understanding and navigation. However, the quantity and quality of information we acquire from such environmental features is limited by various factors, including cost, time, security, and the capabilities of existing data collection techniques. Measurement of water depth is an important part of such mapping, particularly in shallow locations that could provide navigational risk or have important ecological functions. Erosion and deposition at these locations, for example, due to storms and erosion, can cause rapid changes that require repeated measurements. In this paper, we describe a low-cost, resilient, unmanned autonomous surface vehicle for bathymetry data collection using side-scan sonar. We discuss the adaptation of equipment and sensors for the collection of navigation, control, and bathymetry data and also give an overview of the vehicle setup. This autonomous surface vehicle has been used to collect bathymetry from the Powai Lake in Mumbai, India.
abstract_zh: 准确且具有成本效益的水体测绘对于环境理解和导航具有巨大意义。然而，我们从这些环境特征中获取的信息的数量和质量受到多种因素的限制，包括成本、时间、安全性和现有数据收集技术的能力。水深测量是此类测绘的重要组成部分，特别是在可能提供航行风险或具有重要生态功能的浅水位置。例如，由于风暴和侵蚀，这些位置的侵蚀和沉积可能会导致快速变化，需要重复测量。在本文中，我们描述了一种低成本、有弹性的无人自主地面车辆，用于使用侧扫描声纳收集测深数据。我们讨论了用于收集导航、控制和测深数据的设备和传感器的适应性，并概述了车辆设置。这种自动水面车辆已用于从印度孟买的 Powai 湖收集水深数据。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍一种低成本自主水面车辆用于浅水区域测深调查的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统水体测绘受成本、时间及技术限制，而浅水区域因侵蚀沉积变化频繁需高效测量手段。
AI.method: 采用自主水面车辆搭载侧扫声纳与导航传感器，适应复杂环境进行数据采集。
AI.result: 在印度孟买Powai湖成功获取测深数据，验证了系统的可行性与数据可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为浅水测绘提供了经济高效的解决方案，适用于生态监测与导航风险评估。

authors_text: Nitish Mital,Ezgi Ozyilkan,Ali Garjani,Deniz Gunduz
title: Neural Distributed Image Compression with Cross-Attention Feature Alignment
title_zh: 具有交叉注意特征对齐的神经分布式图像压缩
abstract: We consider the problem of compressing an information source when a correlated one is available as side information only at the decoder side, which is a special case of the distributed source coding problem in information theory. In particular, we consider a pair of stereo images, which have overlapping fields of view, and are captured by a synchronized and calibrated pair of cameras as correlated image sources. In previously proposed methods, the encoder transforms the input image to a latent representation using a deep neural network, and compresses the quantized latent representation losslessly using entropy coding. The decoder decodes the entropy-coded quantized latent representation, and reconstructs the input image using this representation and the available side information. In the proposed method, the decoder employs a cross-attention module to align the feature maps obtained from the received latent representation of the input image and a latent representation of the side information. We argue that aligning the correlated patches in the feature maps allows better utilization of the side information. We empirically demonstrate the competitiveness of the proposed algorithm on KITTI and Cityscape datasets of stereo image pairs. Our experimental results show that the proposed architecture is able to exploit the decoder-only side information in a more efficient manner compared to previous works.
summary: We consider the problem of compressing an information source when a correlated one is available as side information only at the decoder side, which is a special case of the distributed source coding problem in information theory. In particular, we consider a pair of stereo images, which have overlapping fields of view, and are captured by a synchronized and calibrated pair of cameras as correlated image sources. In previously proposed methods, the encoder transforms the input image to a latent representation using a deep neural network, and compresses the quantized latent representation losslessly using entropy coding. The decoder decodes the entropy-coded quantized latent representation, and reconstructs the input image using this representation and the available side information. In the proposed method, the decoder employs a cross-attention module to align the feature maps obtained from the received latent representation of the input image and a latent representation of the side information. We argue that aligning the correlated patches in the feature maps allows better utilization of the side information. We empirically demonstrate the competitiveness of the proposed algorithm on KITTI and Cityscape datasets of stereo image pairs. Our experimental results show that the proposed architecture is able to exploit the decoder-only side information in a more efficient manner compared to previous works.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑当相关信息源仅在解码器侧可用作辅助信息时压缩信息源的问题，这是信息论中分布式源编码问题的一种特殊情况。特别是，我们考虑一对立体图像，它们具有重叠的视场，并由一对同步且校准的相机捕获作为相关图像源。在先前提出的方法中，编码器使用深度神经网络将输入图像转换为潜在表示，并使用熵编码无损地压缩量化的潜在表示。解码器对熵编码的量化潜在表示进行解码，并使用该表示和可用的辅助信息重建输入图像。在所提出的方法中，解码器采用交叉注意模块来对齐从接收到的输入图像的潜在表示和辅助信息的潜在表示获得的特征图。我们认为，对齐特征图中的相关补丁可以更好地利用辅助信息。我们凭经验证明了所提出的算法在立体图像对的 KITTI 和 Cityscape 数据集上的竞争力。我们的实验结果表明，与以前的工作相比，所提出的架构能够以更有效的方式利用仅解码器的辅助信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用交叉注意力机制对齐特征图的神经分布式图像压缩方法，以更高效地利用解码器端的侧信息。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在利用解码器端的侧信息时效率不足，而对齐相关特征图可提升侧信息的利用效果。
AI.method: 在解码器中引入交叉注意力模块，对输入图像的潜在表示与侧信息的潜在表示进行特征对齐。
AI.result: 在KITTI和Cityscape数据集上实验表明，该方法比现有方法更高效地利用了侧信息。
AI.conclusion: 交叉注意力特征对齐机制有效提升了分布式图像压缩中侧信息的利用效率。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用交叉注意力机制对齐特征图的神经分布式图像压缩方法，以更高效地利用解码器端的侧信息。

ai_content.result: 在KITTI和Cityscape数据集上实验表明，该方法比现有方法更高效地利用了侧信息。
ai_content.conclusion: 交叉注意力特征对齐机制有效提升了分布式图像压缩中侧信息的利用效率。

search_text: Neural Distributed Image Compression with Cross-Attention Feature Alignment 具有交叉注意特征对齐的神经分布式图像压缩 We consider the problem of compressing an information source when a correlated one is available as side information only at the decoder side, which is a special case of the distributed source coding problem in information theory. In particular, we consider a pair of stereo images, which have overlapping fields of view, and are captured by a synchronized and calibrated pair of cameras as correlated image sources. In previously proposed methods, the encoder transforms the input image to a latent representation using a deep neural network, and compresses the quantized latent representation losslessly using entropy coding. The decoder decodes the entropy-coded quantized latent representation, and reconstructs the input image using this representation and the available side information. In the proposed method, the decoder employs a cross-attention module to align the feature maps obtained from the received latent representation of the input image and a latent representation of the side information. We argue that aligning the correlated patches in the feature maps allows better utilization of the side information. We empirically demonstrate the competitiveness of the proposed algorithm on KITTI and Cityscape datasets of stereo image pairs. Our experimental results show that the proposed architecture is able to exploit the decoder-only side information in a more efficient manner compared to previous works. 我们考虑当相关信息源仅在解码器侧可用作辅助信息时压缩信息源的问题，这是信息论中分布式源编码问题的一种特殊情况。特别是，我们考虑一对立体图像，它们具有重叠的视场，并由一对同步且校准的相机捕获作为相关图像源。在先前提出的方法中，编码器使用深度神经网络将输入图像转换为潜在表示，并使用熵编码无损地压缩量化的潜在表示。解码器对熵编码的量化潜在表示进行解码，并使用该表示和可用的辅助信息重建输入图像。在所提出的方法中，解码器采用交叉注意模块来对齐从接收到的输入图像的潜在表示和辅助信息的潜在表示获得的特征图。我们认为，对齐特征图中的相关补丁可以更好地利用辅助信息。我们凭经验证明了所提出的算法在立体图像对的 KITTI 和 Cityscape 数据集上的竞争力。我们的实验结果表明，与以前的工作相比，所提出的架构能够以更有效的方式利用仅解码器的辅助信息。 本文提出了一种利用交叉注意力机制对齐特征图的神经分布式图像压缩方法，以更高效地利用解码器端的侧信息。 Nitish Mital,Ezgi Ozyilkan,Ali Garjani,Deniz Gunduz eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Gensheng Pei,Fumin Shen,Yazhou Yao,Guo-Sen Xie,Zhenmin Tang,Jinhui Tang
title: Hierarchical Feature Alignment Network for Unsupervised Video Object Segmentation
title_zh: 用于无监督视频对象分割的分层特征对齐网络
abstract: Optical flow is an easily conceived and precious cue for advancing unsupervised video object segmentation (UVOS). Most of the previous methods directly extract and fuse the motion and appearance features for segmenting target objects in the UVOS setting. However, optical flow is intrinsically an instantaneous velocity of all pixels among consecutive frames, thus making the motion features not aligned well with the primary objects among the corresponding frames. To solve the above challenge, we propose a concise, practical, and efficient architecture for appearance and motion feature alignment, dubbed hierarchical feature alignment network (HFAN). Specifically, the key merits in HFAN are the sequential Feature AlignMent (FAM) module and the Feature AdaptaTion (FAT) module, which are leveraged for processing the appearance and motion features hierarchically. FAM is capable of aligning both appearance and motion features with the primary object semantic representations, respectively. Further, FAT is explicitly designed for the adaptive fusion of appearance and motion features to achieve a desirable trade-off between cross-modal features. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed HFAN, which reaches a new state-of-the-art performance on DAVIS-16, achieving 88.7 $\mathcal{J}\&\mathcal{F}$ Mean, i.e., a relative improvement of 3.5% over the best published result.
summary: Optical flow is an easily conceived and precious cue for advancing unsupervised video object segmentation (UVOS). Most of the previous methods directly extract and fuse the motion and appearance features for segmenting target objects in the UVOS setting. However, optical flow is intrinsically an instantaneous velocity of all pixels among consecutive frames, thus making the motion features not aligned well with the primary objects among the corresponding frames. To solve the above challenge, we propose a concise, practical, and efficient architecture for appearance and motion feature alignment, dubbed hierarchical feature alignment network (HFAN). Specifically, the key merits in HFAN are the sequential Feature AlignMent (FAM) module and the Feature AdaptaTion (FAT) module, which are leveraged for processing the appearance and motion features hierarchically. FAM is capable of aligning both appearance and motion features with the primary object semantic representations, respectively. Further, FAT is explicitly designed for the adaptive fusion of appearance and motion features to achieve a desirable trade-off between cross-modal features. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed HFAN, which reaches a new state-of-the-art performance on DAVIS-16, achieving 88.7 $\mathcal{J}\&\mathcal{F}$ Mean, i.e., a relative improvement of 3.5% over the best published result.
abstract_zh: 光流是推进无监督视频对象分割（UVOS）的一个容易想到且宝贵的线索。之前的方法大多直接提取并融合运动和外观特征，以在 UVOS 设置中分割目标对象。然而，光流本质上是连续帧中所有像素的瞬时速度，因此使得运动特征与相应帧中的主要对象不能很好地对齐。为了解决上述挑战，我们提出了一种简洁、实用、高效的外观和运动特征对齐架构，称为分层特征对齐网络（HFAN）。具体来说，HFAN 的关键优点是顺序特征对齐（FAM）模块和特征适应（FAT）模块，它们用于分层处理外观和运动特征。 FAM 能够分别将外观和运动特征与主要对象语义表示对齐。此外，FAT 被明确设计用于外观和运动特征的自适应融合，以实现跨模态特征之间的理想权衡。大量实验证明了所提出的 HFAN 的有效性，它在 DAVIS-16 上达到了新的最先进性能，达到 88.7 $\mathcal{J}\&\mathcal{F}$ Mean，即比最佳已发表结果相对提高了 3.5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种层次化特征对齐网络（HFAN），用于解决无监督视频对象分割中运动与外观特征不对齐的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法直接融合光流运动特征与外观特征，但光流作为帧间瞬时速度，导致运动特征与目标对象语义表示不匹配，影响分割效果。
AI.method: 设计包含顺序特征对齐模块（FAM）和特征自适应模块（FAT）的HFAN网络，分别实现外观/运动特征的语义对齐与跨模态自适应融合。
AI.result: 在DAVIS-16数据集上达到88.7 J&F均值，相较最佳结果提升3.5%，刷新无监督视频分割SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过层次化特征对齐与自适应融合机制，有效解决了运动特征与目标语义的匹配问题，验证了方法在无监督分割任务中的优越性。

authors_text: Martin Soria Røvang,Per Selnes,Bradley John MacIntosh,Inge Rasmus Groote,Lene Paalhaugen,Sudre Carole,Tormod Fladby,Atle Bjørnerud
title: Segmenting white matter hyperintensities on isotropic three-dimensional Fluid Attenuated Inversion Recovery magnetic resonance images: Assessing deep learning tools on norwegian imaging database
title_zh: 各向同性三维流体衰减反转恢复磁共振图像上的白质高信号分割：评估挪威成像数据库上的深度学习工具
abstract: Automated segmentation of white matter hyperintensities (WMHs) is an essential step in neuroimaging analysis of Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI). Fluid Attenuated Inversion Recovery (FLAIR-weighted) is an MRI contrast that is particularly useful to visualize and quantify WMHs, a hallmark of cerebral small vessel disease and Alzheimer's disease (AD). Clinical MRI protocols migrate to a three-dimensional (3D) FLAIR-weighted acquisition to enable high spatial resolution in all three voxel dimensions. The current study details the deployment of deep learning tools to enable automated WMH segmentation and characterization from 3D FLAIR-weighted images acquired as part of a national AD imaging initiative. Among 441 participants (194 male, mean age: (64.91 +/- 9.32) years) from the DDI study, two in-house networks were trained and validated across five national collection sites. Three models were tested on a held-out subset of the internal data from the 441 participants and an external dataset with 29 cases from an international collaborator. These test sets were evaluated independently. Five established WMH performance metrics were used for comparison against ground truth human-in-the-loop segmentation. Results of the three networks tested, the 3D nnU-Net had the best performance with an average dice similarity coefficient score of 0.76 +/- 0.16, performing better than both the in-house developed 2.5D model and the SOTA Deep Bayesian network. With the increasing use of 3D FLAIR-weighted images in MRI protocols, our results suggest that WMH segmentation models can be trained on 3D data and yield WMH segmentation performance that is comparable to or better than state-of-the-art without the need for including T1-weighted image series.
summary: Automated segmentation of white matter hyperintensities (WMHs) is an essential step in neuroimaging analysis of Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI). Fluid Attenuated Inversion Recovery (FLAIR-weighted) is an MRI contrast that is particularly useful to visualize and quantify WMHs, a hallmark of cerebral small vessel disease and Alzheimer's disease (AD). Clinical MRI protocols migrate to a three-dimensional (3D) FLAIR-weighted acquisition to enable high spatial resolution in all three voxel dimensions. The current study details the deployment of deep learning tools to enable automated WMH segmentation and characterization from 3D FLAIR-weighted images acquired as part of a national AD imaging initiative. Among 441 participants (194 male, mean age: (64.91 +/- 9.32) years) from the DDI study, two in-house networks were trained and validated across five national collection sites. Three models were tested on a held-out subset of the internal data from the 441 participants and an external dataset with 29 cases from an international collaborator. These test sets were evaluated independently. Five established WMH performance metrics were used for comparison against ground truth human-in-the-loop segmentation. Results of the three networks tested, the 3D nnU-Net had the best performance with an average dice similarity coefficient score of 0.76 +/- 0.16, performing better than both the in-house developed 2.5D model and the SOTA Deep Bayesian network. With the increasing use of 3D FLAIR-weighted images in MRI protocols, our results suggest that WMH segmentation models can be trained on 3D data and yield WMH segmentation performance that is comparable to or better than state-of-the-art without the need for including T1-weighted image series.
abstract_zh: 白质高信号 (WMH) 的自动分割是磁共振成像 (MRI) 神经影像分析的重要步骤。流体衰减反转恢复（FLAIR 加权）是一种 MRI 造影剂，对于可视化和量化 WMH 特别有用，WMH 是脑小血管疾病和阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 的标志。临床 MRI 协议迁移到三维 (3D) FLAIR 加权采集，以在所有三个体素维度上实现高空间分辨率。当前的研究详细介绍了深度学习工具的部署，以实现对作为国家 AD 成像计划的一部分获取的 3D FLAIR 加权图像进行自动 WMH 分割和表征。在 DDI 研究的 441 名参与者（194 名男性，平均年龄：(64.91 +/- 9.32) 岁）中，两个内部网络在五个国家收集点进行了培训和验证。三个模型在来自 441 名参与者的保留内部数据子集和来自国际合作者的包含 29 个案例的外部数据集上进行了测试。这些测试集是独立评估的。使用五个既定的 WMH 性能指标与地面实况人机交互分割进行比较。测试的三个网络的结果中，3D nnU-Net 的性能最好，平均骰子相似系数得分为 0.76 +/- 0.16，性能优于内部开发的 2.5D 模型和 SOTA 深度贝叶斯网络。随着 MRI 协议中 3D FLAIR 加权图像的使用越来越多，我们的结果表明，WMH 分割模型可以在 3D 数据上进行训练，并产生与最先进技术相当或更好的 WMH 分割性能，而无需包含 T1 加权图像系列。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了深度学习工具在挪威影像数据库中对3D FLAIR磁共振图像进行白质高信号（WMH）分割的效果。
AI.motivation: 随着3D FLAIR磁共振成像在临床协议中的普及，需要开发无需T1加权图像的自动化WMH分割方法，以提高阿尔茨海默病等疾病的诊断效率。
AI.method: 在441名受试者的数据集上训练并验证了两种内部网络模型，同时测试了三种模型（包括3D nnU-Net、2.5D模型和深度贝叶斯网络），使用Dice相似性系数等指标与人工标注结果对比。
AI.result: 3D nnU-Net模型表现最佳，平均Dice相似性系数为0.76±0.16，优于其他模型且无需依赖T1加权图像。
AI.conclusion: 3D FLAIR数据可用于训练高效的WMH分割模型，3D nnU-Net在性能上达到或超越现有方法，为临床提供了无需T1图像的解决方案。

tldr: 本文评估了深度学习工具在挪威影像数据库中对3D FLAIR磁共振图像进行白质高信号（WMH）分割的效果。
motivation: 随着3D FLAIR磁共振成像在临床协议中的普及，需要开发无需T1加权图像的自动化WMH分割方法，以提高阿尔茨海默病等疾病的诊断效率。
method: 在441名受试者的数据集上训练并验证了两种内部网络模型，同时测试了三种模型（包括3D nnU-Net、2.5D模型和深度贝叶斯网络），使用Dice相似性系数等指标与人工标注结果对比。
result: 3D nnU-Net模型表现最佳，平均Dice相似性系数为0.76±0.16，优于其他模型且无需依赖T1加权图像。
conclusion: 3D FLAIR数据可用于训练高效的WMH分割模型，3D nnU-Net在性能上达到或超越现有方法，为临床提供了无需T1图像的解决方案。
search_text: Segmenting white matter hyperintensities on isotropic three-dimensional Fluid Attenuated Inversion Recovery magnetic resonance images: Assessing deep learning tools on norwegian imaging database 各向同性三维流体衰减反转恢复磁共振图像上的白质高信号分割：评估挪威成像数据库上的深度学习工具 Automated segmentation of white matter hyperintensities (WMHs) is an essential step in neuroimaging analysis of Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI). Fluid Attenuated Inversion Recovery (FLAIR-weighted) is an MRI contrast that is particularly useful to visualize and quantify WMHs, a hallmark of cerebral small vessel disease and Alzheimer's disease (AD). Clinical MRI protocols migrate to a three-dimensional (3D) FLAIR-weighted acquisition to enable high spatial resolution in all three voxel dimensions. The current study details the deployment of deep learning tools to enable automated WMH segmentation and characterization from 3D FLAIR-weighted images acquired as part of a national AD imaging initiative. Among 441 participants (194 male, mean age: (64.91 +/- 9.32) years) from the DDI study, two in-house networks were trained and validated across five national collection sites. Three models were tested on a held-out subset of the internal data from the 441 participants and an external dataset with 29 cases from an international collaborator. These test sets were evaluated independently. Five established WMH performance metrics were used for comparison against ground truth human-in-the-loop segmentation. Results of the three networks tested, the 3D nnU-Net had the best performance with an average dice similarity coefficient score of 0.76 +/- 0.16, performing better than both the in-house developed 2.5D model and the SOTA Deep Bayesian network. With the increasing use of 3D FLAIR-weighted images in MRI protocols, our results suggest that WMH segmentation models can be trained on 3D data and yield WMH segmentation performance that is comparable to or better than state-of-the-art without the need for including T1-weighted image series. 白质高信号 (WMH) 的自动分割是磁共振成像 (MRI) 神经影像分析的重要步骤。流体衰减反转恢复（FLAIR 加权）是一种 MRI 造影剂，对于可视化和量化 WMH 特别有用，WMH 是脑小血管疾病和阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 的标志。临床 MRI 协议迁移到三维 (3D) FLAIR 加权采集，以在所有三个体素维度上实现高空间分辨率。当前的研究详细介绍了深度学习工具的部署，以实现对作为国家 AD 成像计划的一部分获取的 3D FLAIR 加权图像进行自动 WMH 分割和表征。在 DDI 研究的 441 名参与者（194 名男性，平均年龄：(64.91 +/- 9.32) 岁）中，两个内部网络在五个国家收集点进行了培训和验证。三个模型在来自 441 名参与者的保留内部数据子集和来自国际合作者的包含 29 个案例的外部数据集上进行了测试。这些测试集是独立评估的。使用五个既定的 WMH 性能指标与地面实况人机交互分割进行比较。测试的三个网络的结果中，3D nnU-Net 的性能最好，平均骰子相似系数得分为 0.76 +/- 0.16，性能优于内部开发的 2.5D 模型和 SOTA 深度贝叶斯网络。随着 MRI 协议中 3D FLAIR 加权图像的使用越来越多，我们的结果表明，WMH 分割模型可以在 3D 数据上进行训练，并产生与最先进技术相当或更好的 WMH 分割性能，而无需包含 T1 加权图像系列。 本文评估了深度学习工具在挪威影像数据库中对3D FLAIR磁共振图像进行白质高信号（WMH）分割的效果。 Martin Soria Røvang,Per Selnes,Bradley John MacIntosh,Inge Rasmus Groote,Lene Paalhaugen,Sudre Carole,Tormod Fladby,Atle Bjørnerud eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Kechi Zhang,Ge Li,Zhi Jin
title: What does Transformer learn about source code?
title_zh: Transformer 从源代码中学到了什么？
comment: First submitted to NeurIPS 2021 and rejected
comments: First submitted to NeurIPS 2021 and rejected
abstract: In the field of source code processing, the transformer-based representation models have shown great powerfulness and have achieved state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in many tasks. Although the transformer models process the sequential source code, pieces of evidence show that they may capture the structural information (\eg, in the syntax tree, data flow, control flow, \etc) as well. We propose the aggregated attention score, a method to investigate the structural information learned by the transformer. We also put forward the aggregated attention graph, a new way to extract program graphs from the pre-trained models automatically. We measure our methods from multiple perspectives. Furthermore, based on our empirical findings, we use the automatically extracted graphs to replace those ingenious manual designed graphs in the Variable Misuse task. Experimental results show that the semantic graphs we extracted automatically are greatly meaningful and effective, which provide a new perspective for us to understand and use the information contained in the model.
summary: In the field of source code processing, the transformer-based representation models have shown great powerfulness and have achieved state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in many tasks. Although the transformer models process the sequential source code, pieces of evidence show that they may capture the structural information (\eg, in the syntax tree, data flow, control flow, \etc) as well. We propose the aggregated attention score, a method to investigate the structural information learned by the transformer. We also put forward the aggregated attention graph, a new way to extract program graphs from the pre-trained models automatically. We measure our methods from multiple perspectives. Furthermore, based on our empirical findings, we use the automatically extracted graphs to replace those ingenious manual designed graphs in the Variable Misuse task. Experimental results show that the semantic graphs we extracted automatically are greatly meaningful and effective, which provide a new perspective for us to understand and use the information contained in the model.
abstract_zh: 在源代码处理领域，基于 Transformer 的表示模型显示了强大的功能，并在许多任务中实现了最先进的（SOTA）性能。尽管变压器模型处理顺序源代码，但有证据表明它们也可以捕获结构信息（例如，语法树、数据流、控制流等）。我们提出了聚合注意力分数，这是一种研究变压器学习的结构信息的方法。我们还提出了聚合注意力图，这是一种从预训练模型中自动提取程序图的新方法。我们从多个角度衡量我们的方法。此外，根据我们的经验发现，我们在变量滥用任务中使用自动提取的图表来代替那些巧妙的手动设计的图表。实验结果表明，我们自动提取的语义图非常有意义和有效，为我们理解和使用模型中包含的信息提供了新的视角。

AI.tldr: 本文研究Transformer模型在源代码处理中学到的结构信息，并提出自动提取程序图的方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer在源代码任务中表现优异，但其如何捕捉结构信息（如语法树、控制流等）尚不明确，且传统方法依赖人工设计的图结构。
AI.method: 提出聚合注意力分数分析结构信息，并构建聚合注意力图自动提取程序图，替代人工设计的图进行实验。
AI.result: 自动提取的语义图在变量误用任务中显著有效，验证了其意义和实用性。
AI.conclusion: 自动提取的结构信息为理解模型内部机制提供了新视角，可提升代码分析任务的效率与效果。

authors_text: Sizhen Bian,Kexuan Guo,Mengxi Liu,Bo Zhou,Paul Lukowicz
title: Magnetic Field Based Hand Tracking
title_zh: 基于磁场的手部追踪
abstract: Sensor-based 3D hand tracking is still challenging despite the massive exploration of different sensing modalities in the past decades. This work describes the design, implementation, and evaluation of a novel induced magnetic field-based 3D hand tracking system, aiming to address the shortcomings of existing approaches and supply an alternative solution. This system is composed of a set of transmitters for the magnetic field generation, a receiver for field strength sensing, and the Zigbee units for synchronization. In more detail, the transmitters generate the oscillating magnetic fields with a registered sequence, the receiver senses the strength of the induced magnetic field by a customized three axes coil, which is configured as the LC oscillator with the same oscillating frequency so that an induced current shows up when the receiver is located in the field of the generated magnetic field. Five scenarios are explored to evaluate the performance of the proposed system in hand tracking regarding the transmitters deployment: "in front of a whiteboard", "above a table", "in front of and in a shelf", "in front of the waist and chest", and "around the waist". The true-range multilateration method is used to calculate the coordinates of the hand in 3D space. Compared with the ground truth collected by a commercial ultrasound positioning system, the presented magnetic field-based system shows a robust accuracy of around ten centimeters with the transmitters deployed both off-body and on-body(in front of waist and chest), which indicates the feasibility of the proposed sensing modality in 3D hand tracking.
summary: Sensor-based 3D hand tracking is still challenging despite the massive exploration of different sensing modalities in the past decades. This work describes the design, implementation, and evaluation of a novel induced magnetic field-based 3D hand tracking system, aiming to address the shortcomings of existing approaches and supply an alternative solution. This system is composed of a set of transmitters for the magnetic field generation, a receiver for field strength sensing, and the Zigbee units for synchronization. In more detail, the transmitters generate the oscillating magnetic fields with a registered sequence, the receiver senses the strength of the induced magnetic field by a customized three axes coil, which is configured as the LC oscillator with the same oscillating frequency so that an induced current shows up when the receiver is located in the field of the generated magnetic field. Five scenarios are explored to evaluate the performance of the proposed system in hand tracking regarding the transmitters deployment: "in front of a whiteboard", "above a table", "in front of and in a shelf", "in front of the waist and chest", and "around the waist". The true-range multilateration method is used to calculate the coordinates of the hand in 3D space. Compared with the ground truth collected by a commercial ultrasound positioning system, the presented magnetic field-based system shows a robust accuracy of around ten centimeters with the transmitters deployed both off-body and on-body(in front of waist and chest), which indicates the feasibility of the proposed sensing modality in 3D hand tracking.
abstract_zh: 尽管过去几十年对不同传感方式进行了大量探索，但基于传感器的 3D 手部跟踪仍然具有挑战性。这项工作描述了一种新型的基于感应磁场的 3D 手部跟踪系统的设计、实现和评估，旨在解决现有方法的缺点并提供替代解决方案。该系统由一组用于产生磁场的发射器、一个用于场强感测的接收器以及用于同步的 Zigbee 单元组成。更详细地说，发射器产生具有注册序列的振荡磁场，接收器通过定制的三轴线圈感测感应磁场的强度，该线圈被配置为具有相同振荡频率的LC振荡器，以便当接收器位于所生成的磁场的场中时会出现感应电流。探索了五种场景来评估所提出的系统在手部跟踪方面关于发射器部署的性能：“在白板前面”、“桌子上方”、“在架子前面和架子中”、“在腰部和胸部前面”和“腰部周围”。采用真距多点定位法计算手部在3D空间中的坐标。与商业超声定位系统收集的地面实况相比，所提出的基于磁场的系统显示出约十厘米的鲁棒精度，发射器部署在离体和体上（腰部和胸部前面），这表明所提出的传感方式在 3D 手部跟踪中的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于感应磁场的3D手部追踪系统，通过设计发射器、接收器及同步单元实现手部位置的高精度检测。
AI.motivation: 现有传感器模态在3D手部追踪中存在局限性，需探索更可靠且成本较低的替代方案以提升追踪精度与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 系统包含磁场发射器、三轴线圈接收器及Zigbee同步模块，利用发射器生成振荡磁场，接收器通过LC振荡电路感应电流，结合真范围多点定位算法计算手部3D坐标。
AI.result: 在五种部署场景下，系统误差约10厘米，与商用超声定位系统对比表现稳健，验证了磁场感应模态在手部追踪中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 磁场感应方法为3D手部追踪提供了有效解决方案，尤其在发射器部署于身体前后时表现出良好精度与适应性。

Five scenarios are explored to evaluate the performance of the proposed system in hand tracking regarding the transmitters deployment: "in front of a whiteboard", "above a table", "in front of and in a shelf", "in front of the waist and chest", and "around the waist". The true-range multilateration method is used to calculate the coordinates of the hand in 3D space. Compared with the ground truth collected by a commercial ultrasound positioning system, the presented magnetic field-based system shows a robust accuracy of around ten centimeters with the transmitters deployed both off-body and on-body(in front of waist and chest), which indicates the feasibility of the proposed sensing modality in 3D hand tracking. 尽管过去几十年对不同传感方式进行了大量探索，但基于传感器的 3D 手部跟踪仍然具有挑战性。这项工作描述了一种新型的基于感应磁场的 3D 手部跟踪系统的设计、实现和评估，旨在解决现有方法的缺点并提供替代解决方案。该系统由一组用于产生磁场的发射器、一个用于场强感测的接收器以及用于同步的 Zigbee 单元组成。更详细地说，发射器产生具有注册序列的振荡磁场，接收器通过定制的三轴线圈感测感应磁场的强度，该线圈被配置为具有相同振荡频率的LC振荡器，以便当接收器位于所生成的磁场的场中时会出现感应电流。探索了五种场景来评估所提出的系统在手部跟踪方面关于发射器部署的性能：“在白板前面”、“桌子上方”、“在架子前面和架子中”、“在腰部和胸部前面”和“腰部周围”。采用真距多点定位法计算手部在3D空间中的坐标。与商业超声定位系统收集的地面实况相比，所提出的基于磁场的系统显示出约十厘米的鲁棒精度，发射器部署在离体和体上（腰部和胸部前面），这表明所提出的传感方式在 3D 手部跟踪中的可行性。 本文提出一种基于感应磁场的3D手部追踪系统，通过设计发射器、接收器及同步单元实现手部位置的高精度检测。 Sizhen Bian,Kexuan Guo,Mengxi Liu,Bo Zhou,Paul Lukowicz eess.SY,cs.HC

authors_text: Wenjia Xu,Jiuniu Wang,Yirong Wu
title: Multi-dimension Geospatial feature learning for urban region function recognition
title_zh: 城市区域功能识别的多维地理空间特征学习
abstract: Urban region function recognition plays a vital character in monitoring and managing the limited urban areas. Since urban functions are complex and full of social-economic properties, simply using remote sensing~(RS) images equipped with physical and optical information cannot completely solve the classification task. On the other hand, with the development of mobile communication and the internet, the acquisition of geospatial big data~(GBD) becomes possible. In this paper, we propose a Multi-dimension Feature Learning Model~(MDFL) using high-dimensional GBD data in conjunction with RS images for urban region function recognition. When extracting multi-dimension features, our model considers the user-related information modeled by their activity, as well as the region-based information abstracted from the region graph. Furthermore, we propose a decision fusion network that integrates the decisions from several neural networks and machine learning classifiers, and the final decision is made considering both the visual cue from the RS images and the social information from the GBD data. Through quantitative evaluation, we demonstrate that our model achieves overall accuracy at 92.75, outperforming the state-of-the-art by 10 percent.
summary: Urban region function recognition plays a vital character in monitoring and managing the limited urban areas. Since urban functions are complex and full of social-economic properties, simply using remote sensing~(RS) images equipped with physical and optical information cannot completely solve the classification task. On the other hand, with the development of mobile communication and the internet, the acquisition of geospatial big data~(GBD) becomes possible. In this paper, we propose a Multi-dimension Feature Learning Model~(MDFL) using high-dimensional GBD data in conjunction with RS images for urban region function recognition. When extracting multi-dimension features, our model considers the user-related information modeled by their activity, as well as the region-based information abstracted from the region graph. Furthermore, we propose a decision fusion network that integrates the decisions from several neural networks and machine learning classifiers, and the final decision is made considering both the visual cue from the RS images and the social information from the GBD data. Through quantitative evaluation, we demonstrate that our model achieves overall accuracy at 92.75, outperforming the state-of-the-art by 10 percent.
abstract_zh: 城市区域功能识别对于有限城市区域的监控和管理具有重要作用。由于城市功能复杂且充满社会经济属性，仅使用配备物理和光学信息的遥感图像并不能完全解决分类任务。另一方面，随着移动通信和互联网的发展，地理空间大数据（GBD）的获取成为可能。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用高维 GBD 数据结合 RS 图像进行城市区域功能识别的多维特征学习模型（MDFL）。在提取多维特征时，我们的模型考虑了通过用户活动建模的用户相关信息，以及从区域图中提取的基于区域的信息。此外，我们提出了一个决策融合网络，它集成了多个神经网络和机器学习分类器的决策，并考虑 RS 图像的视觉线索和 GBD 数据的社交信息做出最终决策。通过定量评估，我们证明我们的模型的总体准确率达到 92.75，比最先进的模型高出 10%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合遥感图像与多维地理大数据的模型，用于提升城市区域功能识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统遥感图像难以全面捕捉城市功能的复杂性，而地理大数据（GBD）能提供社会经济属性信息，需融合多源数据提升分类效果。
AI.method: 设计多维特征学习模型（MDFL），整合用户活动信息与区域图谱信息，并构建决策融合网络，综合遥感视觉特征与GBD社会信息进行分类。
AI.result: 实验表明模型整体准确率达92.75%，较现有最优方法提升10个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 通过多源数据融合与决策集成策略，模型有效提升了城市功能识别精度，为城市监测提供了新方法。

authors_text: Andreas Sauter,Erman Acar,Vincent François-Lavet
title: A Meta-Reinforcement Learning Algorithm for Causal Discovery
title_zh: 用于因果发现的元强化学习算法
abstract: Causal discovery is a major task with the utmost importance for machine learning since causal structures can enable models to go beyond pure correlation-based inference and significantly boost their performance. However, finding causal structures from data poses a significant challenge both in computational effort and accuracy, let alone its impossibility without interventions in general. In this paper, we develop a meta-reinforcement learning algorithm that performs causal discovery by learning to perform interventions such that it can construct an explicit causal graph. Apart from being useful for possible downstream applications, the estimated causal graph also provides an explanation for the data-generating process. In this article, we show that our algorithm estimates a good graph compared to the SOTA approaches, even in environments whose underlying causal structure is previously unseen. Further, we make an ablation study that shows how learning interventions contribute to the overall performance of our approach. We conclude that interventions indeed help boost the performance, efficiently yielding an accurate estimate of the causal structure of a possibly unseen environment.
summary: Causal discovery is a major task with the utmost importance for machine learning since causal structures can enable models to go beyond pure correlation-based inference and significantly boost their performance. However, finding causal structures from data poses a significant challenge both in computational effort and accuracy, let alone its impossibility without interventions in general. In this paper, we develop a meta-reinforcement learning algorithm that performs causal discovery by learning to perform interventions such that it can construct an explicit causal graph. Apart from being useful for possible downstream applications, the estimated causal graph also provides an explanation for the data-generating process. In this article, we show that our algorithm estimates a good graph compared to the SOTA approaches, even in environments whose underlying causal structure is previously unseen. Further, we make an ablation study that shows how learning interventions contribute to the overall performance of our approach. We conclude that interventions indeed help boost the performance, efficiently yielding an accurate estimate of the causal structure of a possibly unseen environment.
abstract_zh: 因果发现是机器学习中最重要的一项主要任务，因为因果结构可以使模型超越纯粹基于相关性的推理，并显着提高其性能。然而，从数据中寻找因果结构在计算量和准确性方面都提出了重大挑战，更不用说在没有一般干预的情况下这是不可能的。在本文中，我们开发了一种元强化学习算法，该算法通过学习执行干预来执行因果发现，从而构建明确的因果图。除了对可能的下游应用有用之外，估计的因果图还为数据生成过程提供了解释。在本文中，我们展示了与 SOTA 方法相比，我们的算法可以估计出良好的图，即使是在以前未见过潜在因果结构的环境中也是如此。此外，我们进行了一项消融研究，显示学习干预如何有助于我们方法的整体表现。我们的结论是，干预措施确实有助于提高绩效，有效地准确估计可能看不见的环境的因果结构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种元强化学习算法，通过学习干预来实现因果发现，构建显式因果图。
AI.motivation: 因果发现对机器学习至关重要，但现有方法在计算效率和准确性上存在挑战，且通常需要干预才能完成。
AI.method: 开发元强化学习算法，通过学习干预策略以构建因果图，并通过消融实验验证干预效果。
AI.result: 算法在未见过的环境中表现优于现有方法，消融实验表明干预学习显著提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 干预策略能有效提升因果结构估计的准确性，尤其适用于未知环境。

authors_text: Quande Liu,Youpeng Wen,Jianhua Han,Chunjing Xu,Hang Xu,Xiaodan Liang
title: Open-world Semantic Segmentation via Contrasting and Clustering Vision-Language Embedding
title_zh: 通过对比和聚类视觉语言嵌入进行开放世界语义分割
abstract: To bridge the gap between supervised semantic segmentation and real-world applications that acquires one model to recognize arbitrary new concepts, recent zero-shot segmentation attracts a lot of attention by exploring the relationships between unseen and seen object categories, yet requiring large amounts of densely-annotated data with diverse base classes. In this paper, we propose a new open-world semantic segmentation pipeline that makes the first attempt to learn to segment semantic objects of various open-world categories without any efforts on dense annotations, by purely exploiting the image-caption data that naturally exist on the Internet. Our method, Vision-language-driven Semantic Segmentation (ViL-Seg), employs an image and a text encoder to generate visual and text embeddings for the image-caption data, with two core components that endow its segmentation ability: First, the image encoder is jointly trained with a vision-based contrasting and a cross-modal contrasting, which encourage the visual embeddings to preserve both fine-grained semantics and high-level category information that are crucial for the segmentation task. Furthermore, an online clustering head is devised over the image encoder, which allows to dynamically segment the visual embeddings into distinct semantic groups such that they can be classified by comparing with various text embeddings to complete our segmentation pipeline. Experiments show that without using any data with dense annotations, our method can directly segment objects of arbitrary categories, outperforming zero-shot segmentation methods that require data labeling on three benchmark datasets.
summary: To bridge the gap between supervised semantic segmentation and real-world applications that acquires one model to recognize arbitrary new concepts, recent zero-shot segmentation attracts a lot of attention by exploring the relationships between unseen and seen object categories, yet requiring large amounts of densely-annotated data with diverse base classes. In this paper, we propose a new open-world semantic segmentation pipeline that makes the first attempt to learn to segment semantic objects of various open-world categories without any efforts on dense annotations, by purely exploiting the image-caption data that naturally exist on the Internet. Our method, Vision-language-driven Semantic Segmentation (ViL-Seg), employs an image and a text encoder to generate visual and text embeddings for the image-caption data, with two core components that endow its segmentation ability: First, the image encoder is jointly trained with a vision-based contrasting and a cross-modal contrasting, which encourage the visual embeddings to preserve both fine-grained semantics and high-level category information that are crucial for the segmentation task. Furthermore, an online clustering head is devised over the image encoder, which allows to dynamically segment the visual embeddings into distinct semantic groups such that they can be classified by comparing with various text embeddings to complete our segmentation pipeline. Experiments show that without using any data with dense annotations, our method can directly segment objects of arbitrary categories, outperforming zero-shot segmentation methods that require data labeling on three benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 为了弥合监督语义分割与获取一个模型来识别任意新概念的现实世界应用之间的差距，最近的零样本分割通过探索未见和已见对象类别之间的关系而引起了广泛关注，但需要大量具有不同基类的密集注释数据。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的开放世界语义分割管道，该管道首次尝试通过纯粹利用互联网上自然存在的图像标题数据来学习分割各种开放世界类别的语义对象，而无需对密集注释进行任何努力。我们的方法，视觉语言驱动的语义分割（ViL-Seg），采用图像和文本编码器为图像标题数据生成视觉和文本嵌入，并具有赋予其分割能力的两个核心组件：首先，图像编码器通过基于视觉的对比和跨模式对比进行联合训练，这鼓励视觉嵌入保留对于分割任务至关重要的细粒度语义和高级类别信息。此外，在图像编码器上设计了一个在线聚类头，它允许将视觉嵌入动态分割成不同的语义组，以便可以通过与各种文本嵌入进行比较来对它们进行分类，以完成我们的分割管道。实验表明，在不使用任何具有密集注释的数据的情况下，我们的方法可以直接分割任意类别的对象，优于需要在三个基准数据集上进行数据标记的零样本分割方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需密集标注数据的开放世界语义分割方法，通过利用互联网上的图像-文本对数据实现任意类别的对象分割。
AI.motivation: 传统零样本分割方法依赖大量密集标注数据，难以适应真实世界中不断出现的新概念，且标注成本高昂。
AI.method: 提出ViL-Seg框架，结合视觉和文本编码器生成嵌入表示，通过视觉对比学习和跨模态对比学习保留细粒度语义，并设计在线聚类头动态分割视觉嵌入为语义组。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上无需密集标注数据即可直接分割任意类别对象，优于需要标注数据的零样本分割方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过纯互联网图像-文本数据训练，ViL-Seg实现了开放世界语义分割，为无需人工标注的现实场景应用提供了新思路。

search_text: Open-world Semantic Segmentation via Contrasting and Clustering Vision-Language Embedding 通过对比和聚类视觉语言嵌入进行开放世界语义分割 To bridge the gap between supervised semantic segmentation and real-world applications that acquires one model to recognize arbitrary new concepts, recent zero-shot segmentation attracts a lot of attention by exploring the relationships between unseen and seen object categories, yet requiring large amounts of densely-annotated data with diverse base classes. In this paper, we propose a new open-world semantic segmentation pipeline that makes the first attempt to learn to segment semantic objects of various open-world categories without any efforts on dense annotations, by purely exploiting the image-caption data that naturally exist on the Internet. Our method, Vision-language-driven Semantic Segmentation (ViL-Seg), employs an image and a text encoder to generate visual and text embeddings for the image-caption data, with two core components that endow its segmentation ability: First, the image encoder is jointly trained with a vision-based contrasting and a cross-modal contrasting, which encourage the visual embeddings to preserve both fine-grained semantics and high-level category information that are crucial for the segmentation task. Furthermore, an online clustering head is devised over the image encoder, which allows to dynamically segment the visual embeddings into distinct semantic groups such that they can be classified by comparing with various text embeddings to complete our segmentation pipeline. Experiments show that without using any data with dense annotations, our method can directly segment objects of arbitrary categories, outperforming zero-shot segmentation methods that require data labeling on three benchmark datasets. 为了弥合监督语义分割与获取一个模型来识别任意新概念的现实世界应用之间的差距，最近的零样本分割通过探索未见和已见对象类别之间的关系而引起了广泛关注，但需要大量具有不同基类的密集注释数据。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的开放世界语义分割管道，该管道首次尝试通过纯粹利用互联网上自然存在的图像标题数据来学习分割各种开放世界类别的语义对象，而无需对密集注释进行任何努力。我们的方法，视觉语言驱动的语义分割（ViL-Seg），采用图像和文本编码器为图像标题数据生成视觉和文本嵌入，并具有赋予其分割能力的两个核心组件：首先，图像编码器通过基于视觉的对比和跨模式对比进行联合训练，这鼓励视觉嵌入保留对于分割任务至关重要的细粒度语义和高级类别信息。此外，在图像编码器上设计了一个在线聚类头，它允许将视觉嵌入动态分割成不同的语义组，以便可以通过与各种文本嵌入进行比较来对它们进行分类，以完成我们的分割管道。实验表明，在不使用任何具有密集注释的数据的情况下，我们的方法可以直接分割任意类别的对象，优于需要在三个基准数据集上进行数据标记的零样本分割方法。 本文提出了一种无需密集标注数据的开放世界语义分割方法，通过利用互联网上的图像-文本对数据实现任意类别的对象分割。 Quande Liu,Youpeng Wen,Jianhua Han,Chunjing Xu,Hang Xu,Xiaodan Liang cs.CV

authors_text: Christoph Wernhard
title: CD Tools -- Condensed Detachment and Structure Generating Theorem Proving (System Description)
title_zh: CD工具——压缩分离和结构生成定理证明（系统描述）
abstract: CD Tools is a Prolog library for experimenting with condensed detachment in first-order ATP, which puts a recent formal view centered around proof structures into practice. From the viewpoint of first-order ATP, condensed detachment offers a setting that is relatively simple but with essential features and serious applications, making it attractive as a basis for developing and evaluating novel techniques. CD Tools includes specialized provers based on the enumeration of proof structures. We focus here on one of these, SGCD, which permits to blend goal- and axiom-driven proof search in particularly flexible ways. In purely goal-driven configurations it acts similarly to a prover of the clausal tableaux or connection method family. In blended configurations its performance is much stronger, close to state-of-the-art provers, while emitting relatively short proofs. Experiments show characteristics and application possibilities of the structure generating approach realized by that prover. For a historic problem often studied in ATP it produced a new proof that is much shorter than any known one.
summary: CD Tools is a Prolog library for experimenting with condensed detachment in first-order ATP, which puts a recent formal view centered around proof structures into practice. From the viewpoint of first-order ATP, condensed detachment offers a setting that is relatively simple but with essential features and serious applications, making it attractive as a basis for developing and evaluating novel techniques. CD Tools includes specialized provers based on the enumeration of proof structures. We focus here on one of these, SGCD, which permits to blend goal- and axiom-driven proof search in particularly flexible ways. In purely goal-driven configurations it acts similarly to a prover of the clausal tableaux or connection method family. In blended configurations its performance is much stronger, close to state-of-the-art provers, while emitting relatively short proofs. Experiments show characteristics and application possibilities of the structure generating approach realized by that prover. For a historic problem often studied in ATP it produced a new proof that is much shorter than any known one.
abstract_zh: CD Tools 是一个 Prolog 库，用于在一阶 ATP 中试验压缩分离，它将最近以证明结构为中心的形式化观点付诸实践。从一阶 ATP 的角度来看，凝聚分离提供了一个相对简单但具有基本特征和严肃应用的设置，使其成为开发和评估新技术的基础。 CD 工具包括基于证明结构枚举的专用证明器。我们在这里重点关注其中之一，SGCD，它允许以特别灵活的方式混合目标驱动和公理驱动的证明搜索。在纯粹的目标驱动配置中，它的作用类似于子句表或连接方法族的证明者。在混合配置中，其性能要强大得多，接近最先进的证明器，同时发出相对较短的证明。实验表明了该证明器实现的结构生成方法的特点和应用可能性。对于 ATP 中经常研究的一个历史问题，它产生了一个比任何已知证明都要短得多的新证明。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为CD Tools的Prolog库，用于在一阶自动定理证明中实现基于证明结构的压缩分离方法，并重点描述了其中的SGCD证明器。
AI.motivation: 压缩分离为自动定理证明提供了简单但具有核心特性和实际应用的框架，适合开发和评估新型证明技术，但需要实际工具验证其有效性。
AI.method: 开发基于证明结构枚举的专用证明器，其中SGCD证明器结合目标驱动和公理驱动的搜索策略，支持灵活的混合配置。
AI.result: SGCD在混合配置下性能接近最先进证明器，且生成更短证明；针对历史问题生成了比已知证明短得多的新证明。
AI.conclusion: 结构生成方法在自动定理证明中展现出潜力，CD Tools为相关研究提供了实用工具，SGCD的混合策略值得进一步探索。

authors_text: Mahsa Noroozi,Lorenz Kies
title: Performance Analysis of Universal Robot Control System Using Networked Predictive Control
title_zh: 使用网络预测控制的通用机器人控制系统性能分析
abstract: Networked control systems are feedback control systems with system components distributed at different locations connected through a communication network. Since the communication network is carried out through the internet and there are bandwidth and packet size limitations, network constraints appear. Some of these constraints are time delay and packet loss. These network limitations can degrade the performance and even destabilize the system. To overcome the adverse effect of these communication constraints, various approaches have been developed, among which a representative one is networked predictive control. This approach proposes a controller, which compensates for the network time delay and packet loss actively. This paper aims at implementing a networked predictive control system for controlling a robot arm through a computer network. The network delay is accounted for by a predictor, while the potential of packet loss is mitigated using redundant control packets. The results will show the stability of the system despite a high delay and a considerable packet loss. Additionally, improvements to previous networked predictive control systems will be suggested and an increase in performance can be shown. Lastly, the effects of different system and environment parameters on the control loop will be investigated.
summary: Networked control systems are feedback control systems with system components distributed at different locations connected through a communication network. Since the communication network is carried out through the internet and there are bandwidth and packet size limitations, network constraints appear. Some of these constraints are time delay and packet loss. These network limitations can degrade the performance and even destabilize the system. To overcome the adverse effect of these communication constraints, various approaches have been developed, among which a representative one is networked predictive control. This approach proposes a controller, which compensates for the network time delay and packet loss actively. This paper aims at implementing a networked predictive control system for controlling a robot arm through a computer network. The network delay is accounted for by a predictor, while the potential of packet loss is mitigated using redundant control packets. The results will show the stability of the system despite a high delay and a considerable packet loss. Additionally, improvements to previous networked predictive control systems will be suggested and an increase in performance can be shown. Lastly, the effects of different system and environment parameters on the control loop will be investigated.
abstract_zh: 网络控制系统是反馈控制系统，其系统组件分布在通过通信网络连接的不同位置。由于通信网络是通过互联网进行的，并且存在带宽和数据包大小的限制，因此出现了网络约束。其中一些限制是时间延迟和数据包丢失。这些网络限制会降低性能，甚至破坏系统的稳定性。为了克服这些通信限制的不利影响，已经开发了各种方法，其中具有代表性的方法是网络预测控制。该方法提出了一个控制器，主动补偿网络时延和丢包。本文旨在实现一个网络预测控制系统，通过计算机网络控制机器人手臂。网络延迟由预测器考虑，而数据包丢失的可能性则通过使用冗余控制数据包来减轻。结果将显示系统的稳定性，尽管存在高延迟和大量丢包。此外，还将建议对以前的网络预测控制系统进行改进，并展示性能的提高。最后，将研究不同系统和环境参数对控制回路的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过网络化预测控制方法实现对机械臂的控制，解决网络延迟和数据包丢失带来的性能问题。
AI.motivation: 网络通信的带宽和延迟限制可能导致控制系统性能下降甚至不稳定，需开发有效方法应对网络约束。
AI.method: 采用预测器补偿网络延迟，并通过冗余控制数据包缓解数据包丢失影响，改进现有网络预测控制方案。
AI.result: 实验表明系统在高延迟和显著数据包丢失情况下仍保持稳定，性能较传统方法有所提升。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的网络预测控制方案能有效应对网络不确定性，改进后的系统参数对控制环路具有显著影响。

search_text: Performance Analysis of Universal Robot Control System Using Networked Predictive Control 使用网络预测控制的通用机器人控制系统性能分析 Networked control systems are feedback control systems with system components distributed at different locations connected through a communication network. Since the communication network is carried out through the internet and there are bandwidth and packet size limitations, network constraints appear. Some of these constraints are time delay and packet loss. These network limitations can degrade the performance and even destabilize the system. To overcome the adverse effect of these communication constraints, various approaches have been developed, among which a representative one is networked predictive control. This approach proposes a controller, which compensates for the network time delay and packet loss actively. This paper aims at implementing a networked predictive control system for controlling a robot arm through a computer network. The network delay is accounted for by a predictor, while the potential of packet loss is mitigated using redundant control packets. The results will show the stability of the system despite a high delay and a considerable packet loss. Additionally, improvements to previous networked predictive control systems will be suggested and an increase in performance can be shown. Lastly, the effects of different system and environment parameters on the control loop will be investigated. 网络控制系统是反馈控制系统，其系统组件分布在通过通信网络连接的不同位置。由于通信网络是通过互联网进行的，并且存在带宽和数据包大小的限制，因此出现了网络约束。其中一些限制是时间延迟和数据包丢失。这些网络限制会降低性能，甚至破坏系统的稳定性。为了克服这些通信限制的不利影响，已经开发了各种方法，其中具有代表性的方法是网络预测控制。该方法提出了一个控制器，主动补偿网络时延和丢包。本文旨在实现一个网络预测控制系统，通过计算机网络控制机器人手臂。网络延迟由预测器考虑，而数据包丢失的可能性则通过使用冗余控制数据包来减轻。结果将显示系统的稳定性，尽管存在高延迟和大量丢包。此外，还将建议对以前的网络预测控制系统进行改进，并展示性能的提高。最后，将研究不同系统和环境参数对控制回路的影响。 本文旨在通过网络化预测控制方法实现对机械臂的控制，解决网络延迟和数据包丢失带来的性能问题。 Mahsa Noroozi,Lorenz Kies cs.RO

authors_text: Petra Bevandić,Siniša Šegvić
title: Automatic universal taxonomies for multi-domain semantic segmentation
title_zh: 多域语义分割的自动通用分类法
abstract: Training semantic segmentation models on multiple datasets has sparked a lot of recent interest in the computer vision community. This interest has been motivated by expensive annotations and a desire to achieve proficiency across multiple visual domains. However, established datasets have mutually incompatible labels which disrupt principled inference in the wild. We address this issue by automatic construction of universal taxonomies through iterative dataset integration. Our method detects subset-superset relationships between dataset-specific labels, and supports learning of sub-class logits by treating super-classes as partial labels. We present experiments on collections of standard datasets and demonstrate competitive generalization performance with respect to previous work.
summary: Training semantic segmentation models on multiple datasets has sparked a lot of recent interest in the computer vision community. This interest has been motivated by expensive annotations and a desire to achieve proficiency across multiple visual domains. However, established datasets have mutually incompatible labels which disrupt principled inference in the wild. We address this issue by automatic construction of universal taxonomies through iterative dataset integration. Our method detects subset-superset relationships between dataset-specific labels, and supports learning of sub-class logits by treating super-classes as partial labels. We present experiments on collections of standard datasets and demonstrate competitive generalization performance with respect to previous work.
abstract_zh: 在多个数据集上训练语义分割模型最近引起了计算机视觉社区的广泛兴趣。这种兴趣是由昂贵的注释和跨多个视觉领域达到熟练程度的愿望所激发的。然而，已建立的数据集具有相互不兼容的标签，这会破坏野外的原则性推理。我们通过迭代数据集集成自动构建通用分类法来解决这个问题。我们的方法检测数据集特定标签之间的子集-超集关系，并通过将超类视为部分标签来支持子类逻辑的学习。我们对标准数据集的集合进行了实验，并展示了相对于之前的工作具有竞争力的泛化性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动构建通用分类法的方法，以解决多领域语义分割中不同数据集标签不兼容的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集标签互不兼容，导致多领域语义分割模型难以实现跨域推理，且标注成本高昂。
AI.method: 通过迭代数据集集成检测标签间的子集-超集关系，并利用超类作为部分标签学习子类logits。
AI.result: 在多个标准数据集上实验表明，该方法在跨域泛化性能上优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 自动构建通用分类法能有效解决多领域语义分割的标签不兼容问题，提升模型跨域适应能力。

authors_text: Marco Orsingher,Paolo Zani,Paolo Medici,Massimo Bertozzi
title: Revisiting PatchMatch Multi-View Stereo for Urban 3D Reconstruction
title_zh: 重新审视 PatchMatch 多视图立体以进行城市 3D 重建
comment: Poster presentation at IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV 2022, https://iv2022.com/)
comments: Poster presentation at IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV 2022, https://iv2022.com/)
abstract: In this paper, a complete pipeline for image-based 3D reconstruction of urban scenarios is proposed, based on PatchMatch Multi-View Stereo (MVS). Input images are firstly fed into an off-the-shelf visual SLAM system to extract camera poses and sparse keypoints, which are used to initialize PatchMatch optimization. Then, pixelwise depths and normals are iteratively computed in a multi-scale framework with a novel depth-normal consistency loss term and a global refinement algorithm to balance the inherently local nature of PatchMatch. Finally, a large-scale point cloud is generated by back-projecting multi-view consistent estimates in 3D. The proposed approach is carefully evaluated against both classical MVS algorithms and monocular depth networks on the KITTI dataset, showing state of the art performances.
summary: In this paper, a complete pipeline for image-based 3D reconstruction of urban scenarios is proposed, based on PatchMatch Multi-View Stereo (MVS). Input images are firstly fed into an off-the-shelf visual SLAM system to extract camera poses and sparse keypoints, which are used to initialize PatchMatch optimization. Then, pixelwise depths and normals are iteratively computed in a multi-scale framework with a novel depth-normal consistency loss term and a global refinement algorithm to balance the inherently local nature of PatchMatch. Finally, a large-scale point cloud is generated by back-projecting multi-view consistent estimates in 3D. The proposed approach is carefully evaluated against both classical MVS algorithms and monocular depth networks on the KITTI dataset, showing state of the art performances.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了基于 PatchMatch 多视图立体 (MVS) 的基于图像的城市场景 3D 重建的完整流程。输入图像首先被输入到现成的视觉 SLAM 系统中，以提取相机位姿和稀疏关键点，用于初始化 PatchMatch 优化。然后，使用新颖的深度法线一致性损失项和全局细化算法在多尺度框架中迭代计算像素深度和法线，以平衡 PatchMatch 固有的局部性质。最后，通过在 3D 中反投影多视图一致估计来生成大规模点云。所提出的方法在 KITTI 数据集上针对经典 MVS 算法和单目深度网络进行了仔细评估，显示出最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于改进的PatchMatch多视图立体视觉（MVS）技术的城市三维重建方法。
AI.motivation: 传统MVS方法在复杂城市场景中存在局部优化不足和深度估计不一致的问题，需提升重建精度与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 结合视觉SLAM初始化相机参数，通过多尺度框架迭代计算像素级深度与法线，引入深度-法线一致性损失及全局优化算法。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上优于经典MVS算法和单目深度网络，达到当时最先进的三维重建性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡了PatchMatch的局部特性，显著提升了城市场景大规模点云重建的质量。

authors_text: Marco Orsingher,Paolo Zani,Paolo Medici,Massimo Bertozzi
title: Efficient View Clustering and Selection for City-Scale 3D Reconstruction
title_zh: 城市规模 3D 重建的高效视图聚类和选择
abstract: Image datasets have been steadily growing in size, harming the feasibility and efficiency of large-scale 3D reconstruction methods. In this paper, a novel approach for scaling Multi-View Stereo (MVS) algorithms up to arbitrarily large collections of images is proposed. Specifically, the problem of reconstructing the 3D model of an entire city is targeted, starting from a set of videos acquired by a moving vehicle equipped with several high-resolution cameras. Initially, the presented method exploits an approximately uniform distribution of poses and geometry and builds a set of overlapping clusters. Then, an Integer Linear Programming (ILP) problem is formulated for each cluster to select an optimal subset of views that guarantees both visibility and matchability. Finally, local point clouds for each cluster are separately computed and merged. Since clustering is independent from pairwise visibility information, the proposed algorithm runs faster than existing literature and allows for a massive parallelization. Extensive testing on urban data are discussed to show the effectiveness and the scalability of this approach.
summary: Image datasets have been steadily growing in size, harming the feasibility and efficiency of large-scale 3D reconstruction methods. In this paper, a novel approach for scaling Multi-View Stereo (MVS) algorithms up to arbitrarily large collections of images is proposed. Specifically, the problem of reconstructing the 3D model of an entire city is targeted, starting from a set of videos acquired by a moving vehicle equipped with several high-resolution cameras. Initially, the presented method exploits an approximately uniform distribution of poses and geometry and builds a set of overlapping clusters. Then, an Integer Linear Programming (ILP) problem is formulated for each cluster to select an optimal subset of views that guarantees both visibility and matchability. Finally, local point clouds for each cluster are separately computed and merged. Since clustering is independent from pairwise visibility information, the proposed algorithm runs faster than existing literature and allows for a massive parallelization. Extensive testing on urban data are discussed to show the effectiveness and the scalability of this approach.
abstract_zh: 图像数据集的规模一直在稳步增长，损害了大规模 3D 重建方法的可行性和效率。在本文中，提出了一种将多视图立体（MVS）算法扩展到任意大图像集合的新方法。具体来说，它的目标是重建整个城市的 3D 模型，从配备多个高分辨率摄像头的移动车辆获取的一组视频开始。最初，所提出的方法利用姿势和几何形状的近似均匀分布并构建一组重叠的簇。然后，为每个集群制定整数线性规划（ILP）问题，以选择保证可见性和可匹配性的最佳视图子集。最后，分别计算和合并每个簇的局部点云。由于聚类独立于成对可见性信息，因此所提出的算法比现有文献运行得更快，并且允许大规模并行化。讨论了对城市数据的广泛测试，以显示该方法的有效性和可扩展性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对城市规模3D重建的高效视角聚类与选择方法，以解决大规模图像数据集带来的效率问题。
AI.motivation: 现有大规模3D重建方法在处理城市级图像数据时存在效率低下和可行性不足的问题，需提升算法可扩展性与计算效率。
AI.method: 通过将图像分为重叠聚类，结合整数线性规划（ILP）选择每簇最优视角子集，独立计算并合并局部点云，实现并行化加速。
AI.result: 在城市数据集上的实验验证了方法的有效性与可扩展性，相比现有文献具有更优的运行速度与并行处理能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过视角聚类与优化选择，为城市级大规模3D重建提供了高效且可扩展的解决方案。

conclusion: 该方法通过视角聚类与优化选择，为城市级大规模3D重建提供了高效且可扩展的解决方案。
search_text: Efficient View Clustering and Selection for City-Scale 3D Reconstruction 城市规模 3D 重建的高效视图聚类和选择 Image datasets have been steadily growing in size, harming the feasibility and efficiency of large-scale 3D reconstruction methods. In this paper, a novel approach for scaling Multi-View Stereo (MVS) algorithms up to arbitrarily large collections of images is proposed. Specifically, the problem of reconstructing the 3D model of an entire city is targeted, starting from a set of videos acquired by a moving vehicle equipped with several high-resolution cameras. Initially, the presented method exploits an approximately uniform distribution of poses and geometry and builds a set of overlapping clusters. Then, an Integer Linear Programming (ILP) problem is formulated for each cluster to select an optimal subset of views that guarantees both visibility and matchability. Finally, local point clouds for each cluster are separately computed and merged. Since clustering is independent from pairwise visibility information, the proposed algorithm runs faster than existing literature and allows for a massive parallelization. Extensive testing on urban data are discussed to show the effectiveness and the scalability of this approach. 图像数据集的规模一直在稳步增长，损害了大规模 3D 重建方法的可行性和效率。在本文中，提出了一种将多视图立体（MVS）算法扩展到任意大图像集合的新方法。具体来说，它的目标是重建整个城市的 3D 模型，从配备多个高分辨率摄像头的移动车辆获取的一组视频开始。最初，所提出的方法利用姿势和几何形状的近似均匀分布并构建一组重叠的簇。然后，为每个集群制定整数线性规划（ILP）问题，以选择保证可见性和可匹配性的最佳视图子集。最后，分别计算和合并每个簇的局部点云。由于聚类独立于成对可见性信息，因此所提出的算法比现有文献运行得更快，并且允许大规模并行化。讨论了对城市数据的广泛测试，以显示该方法的有效性和可扩展性。 本文提出了一种针对城市规模3D重建的高效视角聚类与选择方法，以解决大规模图像数据集带来的效率问题。 Marco Orsingher,Paolo Zani,Paolo Medici,Massimo Bertozzi cs.CV

authors_text: Dihe Huang,Ying Chen,Shang Xu,Yong Liu,Wenlong Wu,Yikang Ding,Chengjie Wang,Fan Tang
title: Adaptive Assignment for Geometry Aware Local Feature Matching
title_zh: 几何感知局部特征匹配的自适应分配
abstract: The detector-free feature matching approaches are currently attracting great attention thanks to their excellent performance. However, these methods still struggle at large-scale and viewpoint variations, due to the geometric inconsistency resulting from the application of the mutual nearest neighbour criterion (\ie, one-to-one assignment) in patch-level matching.Accordingly, we introduce AdaMatcher, which first accomplishes the feature correlation and co-visible area estimation through an elaborate feature interaction module, then performs adaptive assignment on patch-level matching while estimating the scales between images, and finally refines the co-visible matches through scale alignment and sub-pixel regression module.Extensive experiments show that AdaMatcher outperforms solid baselines and achieves state-of-the-art results on many downstream tasks. Additionally, the adaptive assignment and sub-pixel refinement module can be used as a refinement network for other matching methods, such as SuperGlue, to boost their performance further. The code will be publicly available at https://github.com/AbyssGaze/AdaMatcher.
summary: The detector-free feature matching approaches are currently attracting great attention thanks to their excellent performance. However, these methods still struggle at large-scale and viewpoint variations, due to the geometric inconsistency resulting from the application of the mutual nearest neighbour criterion (\ie, one-to-one assignment) in patch-level matching.Accordingly, we introduce AdaMatcher, which first accomplishes the feature correlation and co-visible area estimation through an elaborate feature interaction module, then performs adaptive assignment on patch-level matching while estimating the scales between images, and finally refines the co-visible matches through scale alignment and sub-pixel regression module.Extensive experiments show that AdaMatcher outperforms solid baselines and achieves state-of-the-art results on many downstream tasks. Additionally, the adaptive assignment and sub-pixel refinement module can be used as a refinement network for other matching methods, such as SuperGlue, to boost their performance further. The code will be publicly available at https://github.com/AbyssGaze/AdaMatcher.
abstract_zh: 无检测器特征匹配方法由于其优异的性能目前引起了极大的关注。然而，由于在块级匹配中应用相互最近邻准则（即一对一分配）而导致几何不一致，这些方法仍然在大尺度和视点变化方面遇到困难。因此，我们引入了 AdaMatcher，它首先通过精心设计的特征交互模块完成特征相关性和共同可见区域估计，然后在估计图像之间的尺度的同时对块级匹配进行自适应分配，最后通过比例对齐和缩放来细化共同可见匹配。亚像素回归模块。大量实验表明，AdaMatcher 的性能优于可靠基线，并在许多下游任务上取得了最先进的结果。此外，自适应分配和子像素细化模块可以用作其他匹配方法（例如 SuperGlue）的细化网络，以进一步提高其性能。该代码将在 https://github.com/AbyssGaze/AdaMatcher 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaMatcher方法，解决大规模和视角变化下局部特征匹配的几何不一致问题。
AI.motivation: 现有无检测器特征匹配方法在视角变化和大规模场景中因一对一匹配导致几何不一致，影响性能。
AI.method: 通过特征交互模块估计特征相关性和共可见区域，结合自适应分配与尺度估计，并利用尺度对齐和亚像素回归优化匹配结果。
AI.result: AdaMatcher在多个任务中达到SOTA性能，其模块可作为改进网络提升SuperGlue等方法效果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效解决几何不一致问题，代码开源且模块具有通用性。

authors_text: Valentin Penaud--Polge,Santiago Velasco-Forero,Jesus Angulo
title: Fully trainable Gaussian derivative convolutional layer
title_zh: 完全可训练的高斯导数卷积层
comment: ef:29th IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (IEEE ICIP), Oct 2022, Bordeaux, France
comments: ef:29th IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (IEEE ICIP), Oct 2022, Bordeaux, France
abstract: The Gaussian kernel and its derivatives have already been employed for Convolutional Neural Networks in several previous works. Most of these papers proposed to compute filters by linearly combining one or several bases of fixed or slightly trainable Gaussian kernels with or without their derivatives. In this article, we propose a high-level configurable layer based on anisotropic, oriented and shifted Gaussian derivative kernels which generalize notions encountered in previous related works while keeping their main advantage. The results show that the proposed layer has competitive performance compared to previous works and that it can be successfully included in common deep architectures such as VGG16 for image classification and U-net for image segmentation.
summary: The Gaussian kernel and its derivatives have already been employed for Convolutional Neural Networks in several previous works. Most of these papers proposed to compute filters by linearly combining one or several bases of fixed or slightly trainable Gaussian kernels with or without their derivatives. In this article, we propose a high-level configurable layer based on anisotropic, oriented and shifted Gaussian derivative kernels which generalize notions encountered in previous related works while keeping their main advantage. The results show that the proposed layer has competitive performance compared to previous works and that it can be successfully included in common deep architectures such as VGG16 for image classification and U-net for image segmentation.
abstract_zh: 高斯核及其导数已在之前的几项工作中用于卷积神经网络。这些论文中的大多数提出通过线性组合一个或多个固定或可稍微训练的高斯核（带或不带导数）来计算滤波器。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于各向异性、定向和移位高斯导数内核的高级可配置层，它概括了先前相关工作中遇到的概念，同时保留了其主要优点。结果表明，与之前的工作相比，所提出的层具有竞争性的性能，并且它可以成功地包含在常见的深度架构中，例如用于图像分类的 VGG16 和用于图像分割的 U-net。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种全可训练的各向异性高斯导数卷积层，用于改进卷积神经网络的特征提取能力。
AI.motivation: 传统方法使用固定或部分可训练的高斯核基组合生成滤波器，限制了模型灵活性和性能表现。
AI.method: 设计可配置的各向异性、定向和位移高斯导数核，构建全参数可训练的卷积层结构。
AI.result: 在图像分类（VGG16）和分割（U-Net）任务中达到与现有方法相当的性能指标。
AI.conclusion: 该层有效融合了高斯导数核的数学特性，可作为通用模块集成到多种深度网络架构中。

authors_text: Wejia Wu,Zhuang Li,Jiahong Li,Chunhua Shen,Hong Zhou,Size Li,Zhongyuan Wang,Ping Luo
title: Real-time End-to-End Video Text Spotter with Contrastive Representation Learning
title_zh: 具有对比表示学习的实时端到端视频文本识别器
comment: merge the paper with arXiv article 2207.08417. We will withdraw the two paper and create new one
comments: merge the paper with arXiv article 2207.08417. We will withdraw the two paper and create new one
abstract: Video text spotting(VTS) is the task that requires simultaneously detecting, tracking and recognizing text in the video. Existing video text spotting methods typically develop sophisticated pipelines and multiple models, which is not friend for real-time applications. Here we propose a real-time end-to-end video text spotter with Contrastive Representation learning (CoText). Our contributions are three-fold: 1) CoText simultaneously address the three tasks (e.g., text detection, tracking, recognition) in a real-time end-to-end trainable framework. 2) With contrastive learning, CoText models long-range dependencies and learning temporal information across multiple frames. 3) A simple, lightweight architecture is designed for effective and accurate performance, including GPU-parallel detection post-processing, CTC-based recognition head with Masked RoI. Extensive experiments show the superiority of our method. Especially, CoText achieves an video text spotting IDF1 of 72.0% at 41.0 FPS on ICDAR2015video, with 10.5% and 32.0 FPS improvement the previous best method. The code can be found at github.com/weijiawu/CoText.
summary: Video text spotting(VTS) is the task that requires simultaneously detecting, tracking and recognizing text in the video. Existing video text spotting methods typically develop sophisticated pipelines and multiple models, which is not friend for real-time applications. Here we propose a real-time end-to-end video text spotter with Contrastive Representation learning (CoText). Our contributions are three-fold: 1) CoText simultaneously address the three tasks (e.g., text detection, tracking, recognition) in a real-time end-to-end trainable framework. 2) With contrastive learning, CoText models long-range dependencies and learning temporal information across multiple frames. 3) A simple, lightweight architecture is designed for effective and accurate performance, including GPU-parallel detection post-processing, CTC-based recognition head with Masked RoI. Extensive experiments show the superiority of our method. Especially, CoText achieves an video text spotting IDF1 of 72.0% at 41.0 FPS on ICDAR2015video, with 10.5% and 32.0 FPS improvement the previous best method. The code can be found at github.com/weijiawu/CoText.
abstract_zh: 视频文本识别（VTS）是需要同时检测、跟踪和识别视频中文本的任务。现有的视频文本识别方法通常会开发复杂的管道和多个模型，这对于实时应用程序来说并不友好。在这里，我们提出了一种具有对比表示学习（CoText）的实时端到端视频文本识别器。我们的贡献有三方面：1）CoText 在实时端到端可训练框架中同时解决三个任务（例如文本检测、跟踪、识别）。 2）通过对比学习，CoText 可以对长程依赖关系进行建模并学习跨多个帧的时间信息。 3) 设计了一个简单、轻量级的架构，以实现有效和准确的性能，包括 GPU 并行检测后处理、带有 Masked RoI 的基于 CTC 的识别头。大量的实验证明了我们方法的优越性。特别是，CoText 在 ICDAR2015 视频上以 41.0 FPS 的速度实现了 72.0% 的视频文本识别 IDF1，比之前的最佳方法分别提高了 10.5% 和 32.0 FPS。代码可以在 github.com/weijiawu/CoText 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种实时端到端的视频文本检测与识别方法CoText，通过对比学习解决视频中文字的检测、跟踪和识别任务。
AI.motivation: 现有视频文本检测方法依赖复杂流水线和多模型架构，难以满足实时性需求，亟需一种高效统一的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计轻量级端到端框架CoText，结合对比学习建模跨帧时序信息，并采用GPU并行检测后处理与Masked RoI的CTC识别头。
AI.result: 在ICDAR2015video数据集上达到72.0% IDF1值与41.0 FPS，较最佳方法分别提升10.5%精度和32.0 FPS速度。
AI.conclusion: CoText通过统一架构和对比学习有效提升了视频文本检测的实时性与准确性，为实际应用提供了高效方案。
